1Chronicles1:29 Ivbi Ismaẹl keghi do khian ọkaẹgbẹe, ẹwae iweva, ena ọrọre Nabaiọt (eni ovbi Ismaẹl ne okpia ne ọdiọn ọ re a he ẹre re ginna), Keda, Adbil, Mibsam," 
1Chronicles1:30 Misma, Duma, Masa, Hadad, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jetọ, Nafis kevbe Kedema." 
1Chronicles1:32 Ebraham kegha mwẹ egbakhian ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Ketura, ọ keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia ehan ne ẹẹn, ena ọre Zimran, Joksian, Medan, Midian, Isbak kevbe Siua, e Joksian kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, ena ọ re Siẹba kevbe Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:33 E Midian kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia isẹn, ena kegha re, Efa, Efẹ, Hanọk, Abida kevbe Elda." 
1Chronicles1:34 Aizik ne ovbi Ebraham kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, Isọ kevbe Jekọb." 
1Chronicles1:35 Ivbi Isọ kegha re Ẹlifaz, Reuẹl, Jeus, Jalam kevbe Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Ẹwae ni ke urho Ẹlifaz zọ ladian kegha re Tẹman, Ọma, Zefi, Gatam, Kenaz, Timna kevbe Amalẹk." 
1Chronicles1:37 E Reuẹl kegha re erha odede ọghe ẹwae Nahat, Zẹra, Siama kevbe Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Ivbi eseserese Idọm keghi re emwa ni la urho avbe ivbi e Sẹa na rre, e Lotan, ne ọ gha re erha odede ẹwae Hori kevbe Homam. (E Lotan keghi mwẹ ọtẹn okhuo ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Timna.) E Siobal ọ re ọ gha re erha odede avbe ẹwae Alvan, Manahat, Ebal, Siefi kevbe Onam. E Zibiọn kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva Aia kevbe Ana. Ana ọ re ọ gha re erha Disian, e Disian na ọ re ọ gha re erha odede avbe ẹwae Hamran, Esban, Itran kevbe Kieran. Ezẹ ọ re ọ gha re erha odede avbe ẹwae Bilhan, Zaavan kevbe Jaakan, Disian ne ọ gha re erha odede avbe ẹwae Uz kevbe Aran."

1Chronicles2:1 E Jekọb kegha mwẹ emọ iweva: e Riubẹn, e Simiọn, e Livai, e Juda, Isaka, e Zebulọn," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dan, e Josẹf, e Bẹnjamin, e Naftali, e Gad kevbe Asia." 
1Chronicles2:3 E Juda kegha mwẹ emọ Isẹn, amwẹ ọnrẹn ighẹ Batsua ne ovbi e Kenan, keghi biẹlẹ emọ eha ne ẹẹn, ena ọre Ẹr, Onan kevbe Siẹla. Ẹr ne ovbi ẹre ne okpia ne ọdiọn keghi rhia sẹrriọ wẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa na gbe ẹe rua." 
1Chronicles2:4 Ovbi amwẹ ọnrẹn ne a tie ẹre Tama keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eva ne Juda, ena kegha re Pẹrẹs kevbe Zẹra." 
1Chronicles2:5 E Pẹrẹs kevbe gha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, ena ọre Hẹzrọn kevbe Hamul." 
1Chronicles2:6 E Zẹra ne ọtiọnrẹn kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia ehan, ena ọre Zimri, Etan, Heman, Kalkọl kevbe Dada." 
1Chronicles2:7 Ekani ne ovbi e Kami, ne ọkpa vbe uwu ivbi uniẹn Zẹra, keghi si ọkhọ dan ye ivbi Izrẹl uhunmwu vbe ekpa ne ọ na rhie vbe emwi ne a viọ rre vbe okuo, na a wẹ ne a ya ẹe fi ohan ne Osanobua." 
1Chronicles2:8 Ọmokpia ọkpa ọre Etan biẹe, ọnii kegha re Azaraia." 
1Chronicles2:9 E Hẹzrọn kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eha ena ọre Jeramil, e Ram kevbe Kelẹb." 
1Chronicles2:10 Uviẹn ọghe uniẹn ni kevbe ẹgbẹe, Ram ya sẹ Jese, ọ re ọ na khin: E Ram, Aminadab, Nasiọn (ọmwa kpataki vbe ẹwae Juda.)" 
1Chronicles2:11 E Salmọn, e Boaz." 
1Chronicles2:12 Obẹd kevbe Jese. 
1Chronicles2:13 E Jese kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia ihinrọn. Vbene a ya biẹlẹ iran lele egbe ọre ọna khin: Eliab, Abinadab, Siama." 
1Chronicles2:14 Netanẹl, Radai." 
1Chronicles2:15 Ozẹm kevbe Devid. 
1Chronicles2:16 Ọ kevbe gha mwẹ emọ ikhuo eva, e Zeruaia kevbe Abigẹl. E Zuraia ne ovbi e Jese ne okhuo kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena kegha re Abisiai, e Joab kevbe Asahẹl." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigẹl keghi biẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Amasa. 
1Chronicles2:18 E Kelẹb ne ovbi e Hẹzrọn ne okpia keghi rhie Azuba rọnmwẹ, ọ keghi biẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Jeriọt. Okhuo nii keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena ọre: Jesia, Siobab kevbe Adọn." 
1Chronicles2:19 Ugbẹn vbe Azuba ghi wu nẹ, e Kelẹb keghi rhie okhuo ne a tie ẹre Efrat. Irẹn keghi biẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa ne iran he ẹre Họ." 
1Chronicles2:20 Ovbi e Họ ne okpia kegha re Uri, eyẹ ọre kegha re Bazalẹl." 
1Chronicles2:21 E Hẹzrọn ghi rre ọmọ ukpo iyeha, ọ keghi rhie ovbi e Makia ne okhuo ne ọtẹn e Giliad. Iran keghi biẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa ne iran he ẹre Segub." 
1Chronicles2:22 E Segub kegha mwẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa ne iran tie ẹre Jea. e Jea na kegha khaemwisẹ yan ẹvbo eha yan ugie vbe iwewe Giliad. 
1Chronicles2:23 Sokpan, otọe arriọba e Gẹsiọ kevbe Aram keghi khọn munọ ẹvbo iyeha vbe uwu ne iran ye ighẹ igue ne a tie ẹre Jea kevbe Kenat kevbe avbe ẹvbo ni sikẹ ọre. Ivbi uniẹn e Makia ne erha e Giliad ọre emwa ni rre evba hia khin." 
1Chronicles2:24 Ugbẹn vbe Hẹzrọn ghi wu nẹ, e Kelẹb ne ovbi ẹre ne okpia na rhie Efrat ne erha ẹe wu sẹrae rọnmwẹ. Iran na biẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Asiọ ọmwa ne ọ hu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Tẹkoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 E Jeramil ne ovbi e Hẹzrọn ne ọdiọn kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia isẹn, iran ọrọre: Ram ne ọ re ọdiọn, Buna, Orẹn, Ozẹm kevbe Ahija." 
1Chronicles2:26 E Ram kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eha, Maaz, Jamin kevbe Ẹke. E Jeramil vbe gha mwẹ okhuo ọvbehe, ọnii keghi re okhuo ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Atara, iran keghi biẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Onam." 
1Chronicles2:27  
1Chronicles2:28 Onam kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, ena kegha re Siamai kevbe Jadai, e Siamai kevbe gha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, e Nadab kevbe Abisiọ." 
1Chronicles2:29 Abisiọ keghi rhie okhuo ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Abihail, iran keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eva, Aban kevbe Molid." 
1Chronicles2:30 E Nadab ne ọtẹn Abisiọ keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eva, ena kegha re Sẹlẹd kevbe Apeim, sokpan e Sẹlẹd nọ rrọọ keghi wu vbe ne ẹ i na mwẹ ọmọ." 
1Chronicles2:31 Apeim ọ re ọ biẹ Isi, Isi ọ re ọ biẹ Siesian, e Siesian keghi biẹ Alai." 
1Chronicles2:32 E Jada ne ọtẹn Siamai ne okpia kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, ena ọ re Jeta kevbe Jonatan, sokpan, e Jeta keghi wu vbe ne ẹ i na mwẹ ọmọ." 
1Chronicles2:33 E Jonatan kegha mwẹ emọ eva, ena ọre Pẹlẹt kevbe Zaza, ena hia kegha re ivbi Jeramil." 
1Chronicles2:34 E Siesian ma biẹ emọ ikpia, sokpan emọ ikhuo, ọ kegha mwẹ ọviẹn ovbi Igipt ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Jarha," 
1Chronicles2:35 ọ na rhie ovbi ẹre ne okhuo ọkpa ne ẹẹn rhie rọnmwẹ. Iran keghi biẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Atai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Uviẹn uniẹn nii kevbe ẹgbẹe Atai kpao ya sẹ egbe Elisiama ọ re ọna khin: Atai, Natan, e Zabad," 
1Chronicles2:37 Eflal, Obẹd," 
1Chronicles2:38 Jehu, Azaraia," 
1Chronicles2:39 Helẹz, Eleasa." 
1Chronicles2:40 Sismai, Sialọm." 
1Chronicles2:41 Jekamaia kevbe Elisiama. 
1Chronicles2:42 Ọtẹn Jeramil ne ọ re ovbi e Kelẹb ne ọdiọn kegha re Mesia. Mesia ọ re ọ biẹ Zif ne ọ biẹ Maresia ne ọ biẹ Hibrọn. 
1Chronicles2:43 E Hibrọn kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia enẹ, ena ọre Kora, Tapua, Rekẹm kevbe Siẹma." 
1Chronicles2:44 siẹma ọ re ọ gha re erha Raham kevbe erha nọkhua ọghe Jokeam. E Rekẹm ne ọtẹn e Siẹma ne okpia ọ re ọ biẹ Siemai," 
1Chronicles2:45 ne ọ biẹ Maọn ne ọ biẹ Bẹtzọ. 
1Chronicles2:46 E Kelẹb kegha mwẹ egbakhian ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Efa, okhuo ni kevbe biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eha ọvbehe ne ẹẹn, ena ọre Haran, Moza kevbe Gazẹz, e Haran kevbe gha mwẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Gazẹz." 
1Chronicles2:47 (Okpia ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Jadai kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia ehan, ena ọ re Regem, Jotam, Gesian, Pẹlẹt, Efa kevbe Siaaf.)" 
1Chronicles2:48 E Kelẹb kevbe zẹ ọse ọvbehe ne a tie ẹre Maaka, ọ na biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eva ne ẹẹn, ena ọ re Siẹba kevbe Tehana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Ọ ghi vbe sẹ okiekie, ọ kevbe biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eva ọvbehe, ena ọ re Siaaf ne ọ bu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Madmana, kevbe Siieva ne ọ bu avbe ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Makbena kevbe Gibea. E Kelẹb keghi ye biẹ ọmọ okhuo ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Aksa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Ivbi uniẹn e Kelẹb ọ re ena vbe khin. E Họ kegha re ovbi e Kelẹb ne ọdiọn, deba amwẹ ọnrẹn ighẹ Efrat, E Siobal ne ovbi e Họ ne ọdiọn, ọ re ọ bu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre kirriat Jearim." 
1Chronicles2:51 E Saima ne ovbi ẹre ne ukpogieva keghi bu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Bẹtlẹhẹm, e Haref ne ovbi ẹre ne ukpogieha na bu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre ọ Betgada." 
1Chronicles2:52 E Siobal ne ọ bu e kirriat Jearim, ọre ọ gha re erha odede ọghe avbe emwa Harọe, kevbe obọkpa vbe a wa ẹvbo ni rre Menuhot ye ihe eva." 
1Chronicles2:53 Deba avbe ẹwae na ni rre kirriat Jearim: Itrait, Putit, Siumat kevbe Misrait (Ẹwae na ọ re avbe emwa ni rre Zora ke Estao vbe khin.)" 
1Chronicles2:54 E Saima ne ọ bu e Bẹtlẹhẹm ọ re ọ vbe re erha odede ọghe emwa Netofat, Atrọt Bẹt Joab kevbe emwa Zorit ne vbe re ọkpa vbe uwu ẹwae eva ni gha rre Manahat." 
1Chronicles2:55 Avbe ẹwae na ne emwi ne a gbẹnnẹ kevbe ne a ghee gbẹnnẹ wa gua ẹre obọ ro, kegha rre ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Jabẹz. Iran na ọ re emwa Tirat Simiat kevbe Sukat. Iran kegha re Kenit ne iran vbe ivbi Rekab gba gha rọnmwẹ egbe." 
1Chronicles3:1 Emọ ne Devid biẹlẹ vbe Hibrọn ena khin zẹ vbe ne ọ ya biẹlẹ iran lele egbe. Amnọn ne iye ẹe ighẹ Ahinoam ke Jezrẹl rre. E Daniẹl ne iye ẹe ighẹ Abigẹl ke Kamẹl rre. Absalọm ne iye ẹe re Maaka ne ovbi Talmai ne ọba e Gẹsiọ. Adonaija ne iye ẹe re Hagit. Siefatia ne iye ẹe re Abital. Itram ne iye ẹe re Egla. 
1Chronicles3:2  
1Chronicles3:3  
1Chronicles3:4 Iran ehan na, e Hibrọn a na biẹlẹ iran vbe ukpo ihinrọn vbe ukhiọnmwẹ ne Devid ya ẹe vbe ọba vbe evba. Ukpo ehan yan ọgban, ọ re ọ ya rriọba vbe Jerusalẹm." 
1Chronicles3:5 Amwẹ ọnrẹn ighẹ Batsiẹba ne ovbi Amiẹl keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia enẹ nẹẹn, ena ọre Simea, Siobab, Natan kevbe Solomọn." 
1Chronicles3:6 Rẹn kevbe gha mwẹ emọ ikpia ihinrin ọvbehe, ena ọ re Ibha, Elisiua, Elpẹlẹt." 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nẹfẹg, Jafia." 
1Chronicles3:8 Elisiama, Eliada kevbe Ẹlifẹlẹt." 
1Chronicles3:9 Avbe ọse ne ọ zẹlẹe kevbe biẹlẹ emọ ikpia ọvbehe ba enena ne Devid, ọ kevbe gha mwẹ ọmọ okhuo ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Tama." 
1Chronicles3:10 Uviẹn uniẹn e Solomọn ọ re ọna khin ke egbe erha ya sẹ ọmọ: e Solomọn, e Rehoboam, Abija, Asa, e Jehosiafat," 
1Chronicles3:11 e Jehoram, Ahazaia, e Joas," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amezaia, Uzaia, e Jotam," 
1Chronicles3:13 Ehaz, e Hẹzekaia, e Manasẹ," 
1Chronicles3:14 Amọn kevbe Josaia. 
1Chronicles3:15 E Josaia kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia enẹ, ena ọ re Johanan, Jehoiakim, Zedekaia kevbe Joahaz." 
1Chronicles3:16 E Jehoiakim kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, ena ọ re Jehoiakin kevbe Zedekaia." 
1Chronicles3:17 Ivbi uniẹn e Jehoiakin ne ọba, ne iran viọ ẹre oghunmwu gha rrie Babilọn ọ re ena khin. Emọ ikpia ihinrọn ọ re Jehoiakin gha mwẹ, ena ọ re Sieltiẹl," 
1Chronicles3:18 e Malkiram, e Pedaia, e Sienaza, e Jekamaia, Hosiama kevbe Nedabaia." 
1Chronicles3:19 E Pedaia kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, ena ọ re Zerubabẹl kevbe Simẹi. E Zerubabẹl kevbe biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eva, ena ọ re Mẹsiulam kevbe Hananaia deba ọmọ okhuo ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Sielomit." 
1Chronicles3:20 Ọ kevbe gha mwẹ emọ ikpia isẹn ọvbehe, ena ọ re Hasiuba, Ohẹl, e Berakia, Hasadaia, kevbe Jesiab Hẹsed." 
1Chronicles3:21 E Hananaia kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, ena ọ re Pelatia kevbe Jesiaia, e Jesiaia ọ re ọ biẹ Rafaia ne ọ biẹ Anan ne ọ biẹ Obedaia ne erha Siekanaia." 
1Chronicles3:22 E Siekanaia kegha mwẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa, ọnii ọ re Siemaia, kevbe eyẹ ikpia isẹn. Ena ọ re Hatus, Igal, Baraia, Nearaia kevbe Siafat." 
1Chronicles3:23 Nearaia kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena ọ re Ẹliọnai, e Hẹzekaia kevbe Azrikam." 
1Chronicles3:24 Ẹliọnai kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia ihinrọn, ena ọ re Hodavaia, Eliasib, Pelaia, Akub, Johanan, Delaia kevbe Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Eso vbe uwu ivbi uniẹn e Juda ọ re ena khin, e Pẹrẹs, e Hẹzrọn, e Kami, Họ kevbe Siobal." 
1Chronicles4:2 E Siobal ọ re ọ biẹ Reiaia ne ọ biẹ Jahat, ne ọ biẹ Ahumai kevbe Lahad ni re erha odede avbe emwa ni rre Zora." 
1Chronicles4:3 Họ ọrọre ọmọdiọn ne okpia ọghe Efrat ne amwẹ Kelẹb ne erha ẹe. Ivbi uniẹn ọnrẹn ọ re ọ bu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Bẹtlẹhẹm. E Họ keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena ọ re Etam, Pẹnuẹl kevbe Ezẹ. Etam kevbe gha mwẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena ọ re Jezrẹl, Isma kevbe Idbas, kevbe ọmọ okhuo ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Hazelelponi. E Pẹnuẹl ọ re ọ bu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Gẹdọ, Ezẹ keghi bu ne a tie ẹre Husia." 
1Chronicles4:4  
1Chronicles4:5 Asiọ ne ọ bu e Tẹkoa kegha mwẹ ikhuo eva, ena ọ re Hela kevbe Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Rẹn vbe Naara kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia enẹ, ena ọ re Ahuzam, Hẹfa, Temeni kevbe Haahastari." 
1Chronicles4:7 Asiọ kevbe Hela keghi gba biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena kegha re Zerẹt, Izia kevbe Etnan." 
1Chronicles4:8 E Koz ọ re ọ biẹ Anub kevbe Zobeba, rẹn ọ vbe re erha odede ọghe ẹwae uviẹn Ahahẹl ne ovbi e Harum ne okpia." 
1Chronicles4:9 Okpia ọkpa kegha rrọọ ne a tie ẹre Jabẹz, rẹn ọ re ọ vbe gha re ọmwa ne a ye ọghọ na sẹ vbe ẹgbẹe nii rhunmwuda ighẹ ubiẹmwẹ ọnrẹn wa lọghọ iye ẹe, ọ re ọ na he ẹre Jabẹz." 
1Chronicles4:10 Sokpan, e Jabẹz keghi na erhunmwu ghe Osanobua Izrẹl wẹẹ, “Osanobua, fiangbe mwẹ ne u vbe mu otọe ne ọ kpọlọ mẹ. Yaba mwẹ ne u vbe rhie mwẹ lẹre hin obọ emwikemwi ne ọ gha si obalọ yọmwẹ egbe rre.” Osanobua keghi rhie emwi ne ọ na erhunmwu yi ne ẹẹn." 
1Chronicles4:11 E Kelẹb ne ọtẹn e Siuhab kegha mwẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Meha. E Meha ọ re ọ biẹ Eston. 
1Chronicles4:12 Ne ọ biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena ọ re Betrafa, Pasea kevbe Tehina. E Tehina ọ re ọ bu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Nahas. Ivbi uniẹn emwa na keghi ya yin e Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 E Kenaz kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, ena ọ re Otniẹl kevbe Seraia. Otniẹl keghi vbe gha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, ena ọ re Hatat kevbe Meonotai." 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai ọ re ọ biẹ Ọfra. Seraia ọ re ọ biẹ Joab ne ọ bu Iya Owinna, ẹvbo ne emwa hia na re owinna ni guẹ iwinna." 
1Chronicles4:15 E Kelẹb ne ovbi e Jefunẹ kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena ọ re Iru, Ela kevbe Naam. Ela ọ re ọ biẹ Kenaz." 
1Chronicles4:16 Jehalelel kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia enẹ, ena ọ re Zif, Zifa, Tiria kevbe Asarẹl." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ẹzra kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia enẹ, ena ọ re Jeta, e Mered, Efẹ kevbe Jalon. E Mered keghi rhie ovbi ọba Igipt, iran keghi biẹ ọmọ okhuo ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Miriam kevbe emọ ikpia eva, e Siamai kevbe Isba. Isba ọ re ọ bu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Ẹstemoa. E Mered kevbe rhie ovbi e Juda ọkpa, iran keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena ọ re Jered ne ọ bu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Gẹdọ, e Hebẹ ne ọ bu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Soko, kevbe Jekutiẹl ne ọ bu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Zanoa." 
1Chronicles4:18  
1Chronicles4:19 E Hodaia keghi rhie ọtẹn Naham ne okhuo. Ivbi uniẹn iran ọ re ọ bu ẹwae ne a tie ẹre Gam ni rre ẹvbo ne a tiẹ ẹre Keila kevbe ẹwae Maakat ni rre ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Ẹstemoa. 
1Chronicles4:20 E Siimọn kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia enẹ, ena ọ re Amnọn, Rinna, e Benhanan kevbe Tilọn. Isii kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, ena ọ re Zohẹt kevbe Bẹnzohẹt." 
1Chronicles4:21 Ọkpa vbe ivbi e Juda ne ikpia ọ re Siẹla gha a khin. Usun ivbi uniẹn ọnrẹn ọ re Ẹr ne ọ bu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Leka kevbe Laada, ne ọ bu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Maresia, kevbe ẹwae iran ni do ukpọn eto ovbiohuẹ ni rre ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Bẹt Asbea." 
1Chronicles4:22 Jokim kevbe emwa ni rre ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Kozeba, Joas kevbe Saraf ne ọ viọ ikhuo e Moab, ọ na ya yin e Bẹtlẹhẹm. (Ọkpẹre ne ẹmwẹ na kegha rrọọ zẹ vbene a kpa itan rẹn ke otọ gha dee.)" 
1Chronicles4:23 Ọmakhe ọ re iran gha khin ne ọba, iran kegha rre avbe ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Neteim kevbe Gẹdẹra." 
1Chronicles4:24 Emọ ikpia isẹn ọ re Simiọn gha mwẹ, ena ọ re Nemuẹl, Jamin, Jarib, Zẹra, kevbe Siaul." 
1Chronicles4:25 Ovbi e Siaul kegha re Sialọm, eyẹ ọre kegha re Mibsam, ihiẹnhiẹn ọnrẹn kegha re Misma." 
1Chronicles4:26 Ke egbe Misma kpao, uniẹn ni keghi la uviẹn ọghe Hamuẹl, Zekọ kevbe Siimei." 
1Chronicles4:27 E Siimei kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia enẹirrọvbugie kevbe emọ ikhuo ehan, sokpan, etiọnrẹn ma biẹlẹ sẹ vberriọ. Ewae Simiọn ma vbe vuọn yọ zẹ vbene ẹwae Juda gha ye." 
1Chronicles4:28 Rhinrin do sẹ ẹghẹ ọghe Devid ne ọba, avbe ẹvbo na ọ re uniẹn e Simiọn yinrin: Biẹsiẹba, Molada, Hazasial," 
1Chronicles4:29 e Bilha, Ezẹm, Tolad," 
1Chronicles4:30 e Bẹtuẹl, Họma, Ziklag," 
1Chronicles4:31 e Bẹt Makabot, Hazasusim, Bẹtbiri, kevbe Siaareim." 
1Chronicles4:32 Iran yevbe yin ihe isẹn ọvbehe, ena o re: Etam, Ain, Rimọn, Tokiẹm kevbe Asian," 
1Chronicles4:33 kevbe avbe igue ni lẹga iran, rhinrin yasẹ Baalat ne o rre odẹ okuo. Emwi ne iran gbẹnnẹ ye otọ vbekpa uniẹn iran kevbe dọmwadẹ ehe ne iran yinrin ọ re ena khun." 
1Chronicles4:34 Avbe ọkaẹgbẹe ni gha rre dọmwadẹ uniẹn ọ re ena khin: E Mesiobab, e Jamlẹk, e Josaia ne ovbi Amazaia, Joẹl, e Jehu (ne ovbi e Josibia, ne ovbi e Seraia ne ovbi Asiẹl) Ẹliọnai, e Jaakoba, Jesiohaia, Asaia, Adiẹl, ẹ Jesimiẹl, Benaia. Ziza (ne ovbi sifi, ne ovbi Alọn ne ọ re uniẹn e Jedaia, e Simri, kevbe Siemaia). Rhunmwuda ne uniẹn iran na wa gha bun yọ nii," 
1Chronicles4:35  
1Chronicles4:36  
1Chronicles4:37  
1Chronicles4:38  
1Chronicles4:39 iran na wa obọ ghe odẹ orrie, te iran ghi te ra sẹ Gẹrra, iran na vbe do gha viọ emwirri iran rri irunmwu vbe odẹ ahọ ọghe iya ne a bu ẹvbo ni yi." 
1Chronicles4:40 Iran keghi wa otọ ne ọvbẹ aro ne o vbe ma emwiokọ ẹsẹse, ne ọ ivbiẹ kevbe ne ukpokpo i ye. Emwa ni te ka yin evba yi kegha re ivbi e Hamit." 
1Chronicles4:41 Avbe emwa ne a guan kan na keghi si kpao gha rrie Gẹrra vbe ẹghẹ ọba Hẹzekaia, iran keghi dunmwu avbe owa ukpọn kevbe ivbi owa emwa ni te rre ẹvbo nii uan. Iran keghi khulo emwa ni te rre ẹvbo nii kua iran na wa yin ẹnrẹn rhunmwuda evbare ohuan iran wa rre evba ẹsẹse." 
1Chronicles4:42 Arhunmwu iyisẹn isẹn (500) vbe ivbi uniẹn e Simiọn keghi si gha rrie odẹ Ahọ Idọm. Emwa ni viọ iran gha khian kegha re: Pelatia, Neria, Refaia, kevbe Uziẹl, ne ivbi Isi nikpia." 
1Chronicles4:43 Iran keghi gbele ivbe Amalẹk ni ghi te kẹe vbe evba. Evba nii ọ re iran ghi ye ke ẹghẹ nii gha dee. 
1Chronicles5:1 Ivbi uniẹn e Riubẹn ighẹ ovbi e Jekọb ne ọdiọn ọ re ena khin. (Rhunmwuda ne ọ na gu ọkpa vbe uwu avbe egbakhian erha ẹe ru emwi ọdọ vbe amwẹ, ọ keghi mu ehe ọghe emwi ni te khẹke ọmọdiọn fua, a na mu ne Josẹf." 
1Chronicles5:2 Sokpan, ọ rhe ye vberriọ, ẹwae Juda ọ re ọ do wegbe sẹ, ọ na biẹ enọ khaemwisẹ ne ẹwae ni hia.)" 
1Chronicles5:3 E Riubẹn ne ovbi e Jekọb ne ọdiọn keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia enẹ, ena ọ re Hanọk, Palu, Hẹzrọn kevbe Kami." 
1Chronicles5:4 Ivbi uniẹn e Joẹl ke orre ọkpa ya sẹ ọvbehe ọ re ena khin, e Siemaia, e Gọg, e Siimei, e Maika, e Reaia, e Baal kevbe Beera. E Tiglat Pailesa keghi mu Beera, ne ọ gha re ọkaolotu oghunmwu, ọ na mu ẹẹn gha rrie iwe." 
1Chronicles5:5  
1Chronicles5:6  
1Chronicles5:7 Emwa ne eni ẹnrẹn ladian vbe ebe uniẹn ọghe Riubẹn zẹ vbe ọkaolotu ọ re ena khin; e Jeiẹl, e Zẹkaraia," 
1Chronicles5:8 Bẹla ne ovbi Azaz kevbe eyẹ e Siẹma ne uniẹn e Joẹl. Ewae na, ẹvbo Aroa ọ re iran yinrin kevbe otọe ne ọ ke evba laghe odẹ okuọ ọghe Nebo kevbe Baal Meon." 
1Chronicles5:9 Iran kegha mwẹ oghẹn ohuan ni bun vbe otọe Giliad, rhunmwuda ọnii, iran keghi wa mu otọe nii vbe odẹ ahọ vbọ sẹ ato ne ọ wa ya vbẹ sẹ Ẹzẹ Yufretes." 
1Chronicles5:10 Vbe ẹghẹ ọba e Sọl, ẹwae e Riubẹn keghi mu okuo gie emwa Hagrit, iran na gbele iran vbe okuo, iran na yin otọe iran vbe odẹ ahọ e Giliad." 
1Chronicles5:11 Ewae Gad, odẹ okuọ ọghe Riubẹn ọ re iran gha ye vbe otọe Basian, iran keghi ye niẹn obọ ya sẹ Salka vbe odẹ ahọ." 
1Chronicles5:12 E Joẹl ọ re ọ hu uniẹn ne ọ hin usi sẹ vbọ, e Siafam ọ re ọ bu ne ọ ghi zẹ lele ẹe, e Janai kevbe Siafat keghi ye vbe bu uniẹn ọvbehe vbe Basian." 
1Chronicles5:13 Emwa ni ghi dekẹe vbe ẹwae nii, uniẹn ihinrọn na ọrọre ọghe iran: e Maikẹl, e Mẹsiulam, e Siẹba, e Jorai, e Jakan, e Zia, kevbe Ebẹ." 
1Chronicles5:14 Ivbi uniẹn Abihẹl ne ovbi e Huri ọ re iran khin, uviẹn erha iran odede, zẹ vbene a lele ẹe ọ re ena khin: Abihẹl e Huri, e Jaroa, e Giliad, e Maikẹl, E Jesisiai, e Jado, e Buz." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi ne ovbi Abdiẹl kevbe eyẹ e Guni, kegha re ọdiọnwere uniẹn nii." 
1Chronicles5:16 Iran kegha rre otọ e Basian kevbe Giliad vbe ẹvbo ni lele ehe ne aranmwẹ na rria vbe Sairọn. 
1Chronicles5:17 (Ẹghẹ ọba e Jotam ọghe Juda kevbe Jeroboam ne ọba Izrẹl, ọ re a na gbẹnnẹ avbe emwi na ye otọ.)" 
1Chronicles5:18 Ewae Riubẹn, Gad kevbe Manasẹ ne Owẹn Owiẹ kegha mwẹ ivbiyokuo iyeva irrọvbe uri enẹ yan arriaisẹn enẹ yan iyeva (44,760) emwa ne awa ma ẹre emwi ẹsẹse vbe asa, umozo kevbe uhanbọ ne a lo." 
1Chronicles5:19 Iran na keghi mu okuo gie emwa Hagrit ni rre Jetọ, e Nafis kevbe Nodab." 
1Chronicles5:20 Osanobua ọ re iran mu ẹtin iran yan, iran kevbe gha na erhunmwu ghe ẹre ne ọ yi iran obọ. Osanobua keghi họn erhunmwu iran, ọ na gie iran khọn miotọ emwa Hagrit kevbe irogho iran hia." 
1Chronicles5:21 Usun emwi ne iran khọn munọ vbe obọ avbe eghian iran kegha re e kamẹl arriaisẹn ekigbesiyeha (50,000) ohuan arriaisẹn ekigbesiyeha yan uri (250,000) kevbe ekẹtẹkẹtẹ arriaisẹn eva (2,000). Iran kevbe munọ emwa ne agbọn arriaisẹn iyisẹn, (100,000)." 
1Chronicles5:22 Iran gbele ni bun vbe uwu avbe eghian iran rhunmwuda ọ keghi gha re ọghe vbene Osanobua ho ẹre yi. Iran keghi wa yin otọe ni ọ te do sẹ ẹghẹ ne a ya viọ iran gha rrie iwe. 
1Chronicles5:23 Ivbi e Manasẹ ne odẹ ahọ keghi yin otọe e Basian rhinrin ya sẹ Baal Hẹmọn, Seni, Oke Hẹmọn, iran keghi wa gha muan yọ ẹsẹse." 
1Chronicles5:24 Iran na ọ re ọ gha re ọdia ẹgbẹe iran: Efẹ, Isi, Eliẹl, Azriẹl, e Jerimaia, Hodavaia kevbe Jadiẹl. Iran kegha re ivbiyokuo ni hin ukhuaẹn, kevbe ọkaolotu ni hin usi vbe ẹwae iran." 
1Chronicles5:25 Sokpan, avbe emwa na ma guobọ Osanobua avbe erha iran odede, iran keghi hẹe ye otọ ya gha ghoo ẹbọ emwa ne Osanobua khulo hin otọe nii rre." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ẹre Osanobua na ru ẹe ne Pul ne ọba nọkhua ọghe Asiria, (Rẹn a vbe tie ẹre Tiglat Pailesa) ya khọn ẹvbo nii. Ọ keghi munọ avbe ẹwae Riubẹn, e Gad ke odẹ Ahọ e Manasẹ oghunmwu kpao, ọ na ya viọ iran ye Hala, e Habọ kevbe Hara ke ọkpẹn Ẹzẹ Gozan ne iran gha rre evba ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ." 
1Chronicles6:1 E Livai kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena ọ re Gẹsiọn, e Kohat kevbe Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 E Kohat kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia enẹ, ena kegha re Amram, Izia, e Hibrọn kevbe Uziẹl." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amram kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, ena ọ re Errọn kevbe Mosis, kevbe ọmọ okhuo ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Miriam. Errọn kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia enẹ, ena ọre Nadab, Abihu, Eliaza kevbe Itama." 
1Chronicles6:4 Ivbi uniẹn Eliaza ke egbe orre ọkpa ya sẹ ọvbehe ọ re ena khin: e Finihaz, Abisiua," 
1Chronicles6:5 e Buki, Uzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 e Zerahia, e Meraiọt," 
1Chronicles6:7 Amaraia, Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:8 e Zadọk, Ahimaz," 
1Chronicles6:9 Azaraia, e Johanan," 
1Chronicles6:10 Azaraia (ọna ọ gha winna vbe Ọgua Osa ne Solomọn bọ ye Jerusalẹm)," 
1Chronicles6:11 Amaraia, Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:12 e Zadọk, e Sialọm," 
1Chronicles6:13 e Hilkaia, Azaraia," 
1Chronicles6:14 e Seraia kevbe e Jehozadak. 
1Chronicles6:15 E Nebukiadneza ne ọba keghi mu e Jehozadak ba emwa ne ọ viọ gha rrie iwe vbe Juda kevbe ivbi e Jerusalẹm ne Nọyaẹnmwa gie ẹre iwe. 
1Chronicles6:16 E Livai kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena ọ re Gẹsiọn, Kohat kevbe Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Dọmwadẹ ọghe ọe vbe uwu iran kevbe gha mwẹ emọ ikpia. E Gẹsiọn ọ re ọ biẹlẹ Libni kevbe Siimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 E Kohat keghi biẹlẹ avbe Amram, Izia, Hibrọn kevbe Uziẹl," 
1Chronicles6:19 Merari keghi biẹlẹ Mali kevbe Musi. 
1Chronicles6:20 Ivbi uniẹn Gẹsiọn ena khin ke egbe orre ọkpa ya sẹ ọvbehe, e Libni, Jahat, Zima," 
1Chronicles6:21 Joa, Ido, Zẹra, kevbe Jeaterai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Ivbi uniẹn e Kohat ke egbe orre ọkpa ya sẹ ọvbehe ọ re ena khin, Aminadab, e Kora, Asi," 
1Chronicles6:23 Ẹlkana, Ebiasaf, Asi," 
1Chronicles6:24 Tahat, Uriẹl, Uzaia, Siaul." 
1Chronicles6:25 Ẹlkana kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, Amasai kevbe Ahimot." 
1Chronicles6:26 Ivbi uniẹn Ahimot ke egbe orre ọkpa ya sẹ ọvbehe ọ re ena khin Ẹlkana, Zofai, Nahat" 
1Chronicles6:27 Eliab, Jeroham kevbe Ẹlkana." 
1Chronicles6:28 E Samuẹl kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, e Joẹl ne ọ re ọdiọn vbọ, kevbe Abija ne ọ re ọvbokhan." 
1Chronicles6:29 Ivbi uniẹn e Merari ke uniẹn ọkpa ya sẹ ọvbehe, Mali, e Libni, Siimei, Uza," 
1Chronicles6:30 Siimea, Hagaia, Asaia." 
1Chronicles6:31 Avbe emwa na ọ re Devid viọ yọ ne iran gha ru ẹmwẹ enegbe ẹzi kẹn ne a kpe vbe ehe ne a na ga vbe Jerusalẹm, iyeke vbe a ghi mu Ẹkpẹti Ile gha rrie evba nẹ." 
1Chronicles6:32 Ọsegbe ọsegbe ne a i baku ọ re iran ya gha yo Owa Ukpọn ne a ya rẹn ighẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa rre evba, ya gha winna vbe ọ te do sẹ ẹghẹ ne Solomọn na bọ Ọgua Osa." 
1Chronicles6:33 Uviẹn uniẹn iran ni gha rre ukpo nii ọ re ena khin. Ewae ọghe Kohat: Heman ne ọ re ọkaolotu otu ihuan ne okaro, ovbi e Joẹl ọ re irẹn gha khin vbene uviẹn uniẹn ọnrẹn ye ọna khin rhinrin ya sẹ egbe Jekọb: E Heman, e Joẹl, e Samuẹl," 
1Chronicles6:34 Ẹlkana e Jeroham, Eliẹl, e Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 e Zuf, Ẹlkana, e Mahat, Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 Ẹlkana, Joẹl, Azarai, e Zẹfanaia," 
1Chronicles6:37 e Tahat, Asi, Ebiasaf, Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 Izia, e Kohat, e Livai kevbe Jekọb." 
1Chronicles6:39 Asaf ọ gha re ọkaolotu otu ihuan ne ogieva. Uviẹn ọnrẹn keghi la vbenian ya sẹ egbe Livai, Asaf, e Berakia, e Siimea," 
1Chronicles6:40 e Maikẹl e Baseia, e Melkija," 
1Chronicles6:41 Etni, e Zẹra Adaia," 
1Chronicles6:42 Etan, e Ema, e Siimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 e Johat, e Gẹsiọn kevbe Livai." 
1Chronicles6:44 Etan ne ovbi uniẹn e Merari ọ re ọ gha re ọkaolotu otu ihuan ne ogieha. Uviẹn ẹgbẹe ọ re ke ya sẹ egbe Livai vbenian: Etan, Kisii, Abdi, Maluk," 
1Chronicles6:45 Hasiabaia, Amezaia, Hilkaia," 
1Chronicles6:46 Amzi, Bani, Siẹma," 
1Chronicles6:47 e Mali, Musi, Merari, e Livai." 
1Chronicles6:48 Ivbi e Livai nekpa ọ re ọ ghi gha winna ni ghi dekẹe vbe owa ugamwẹ na. 
1Chronicles6:49 Errọn kevbe ivbi uniẹn ọnrẹn ọ re ọ viọ avbe eturari ye imuohan, iran ọ vbe ya emwi ne a ya zọ ese ne a giẹn uan zọ ese vbe Ogiukpo. Obọ iran ọre ọ ye ighẹ ugamwẹ ne a ga vbe uwu Ehe Ne Ọ Huansẹ Ehia kevbe ese na a zọ ne Osanobua ya ye orukhọ bọ ivbi Izrẹl vbene Mosis ne Ọguọmwadia e Nọyaẹnmwa gie odẹ ọ re, ọ re iran ru ẹe." 
1Chronicles6:50 Uviẹn ivbi uniẹn Errọn ọ re ena khin: Eliaza, Finihaz, Abisiua," 
1Chronicles6:51 Buki, Uzi, Zerahia," 
1Chronicles6:52 Meraiọt, Amaraia, Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:53 e Zadọk kevbe Ahimaz. 
1Chronicles6:54 Ehe ne a rhie ne iran ọ na khin ighẹ ivbi uniẹn Errọn ne ẹwae e Kohat. Iran ọ re a ka ghae sẹ ọre obọ vbe otọe ne a mu ne ivbi e Livai. 
1Chronicles6:55 Ne usun ọ re Hibrọn ne ọ rre otọ e Juda ye kẹe kevbe otọe ne aranmwẹ irri na rria ni lẹga ẹre. 
1Chronicles6:56 Sokpan oha kevbe avbe igue ne ọ re ọghe adesẹ ore ẹvbo nii, a keghi mu ne Kelẹb ne ovbi e Jefunẹ." 
1Chronicles6:57 Avbe ẹvbo ne a ghae ne ivbi uniẹn Errọn ọ re e na khin: e Hibrọn ne ẹvbo ne a lẹ gbinna, e Jatẹ kevbe avbe ẹvbo na ighẹ Libna, Ẹstemoa, Hilen, Debẹ, Asian, kevbe Bẹt Siemẹs, deba avbe otọe ne aranmwẹ irri na rria ni rrọọ." 
1Chronicles6:58  
1Chronicles6:59  
1Chronicles6:60 Vbe otọe Bẹnjamin, avbe ẹvbo ne a viọ ne iran deba otọe ne aranmwẹ irri na rria ni rrọọ ọ re ena khin: e Geba, Alemẹt kevbe Anatọt, ehia keghi gba vbe okpẹvbo iwera ne avbe ẹgbẹe iran gha dia." 
1Chronicles6:61 Okpẹvbo igbe vbe otọe e Manasẹ ne Orrie, a keghi yan uta yọ ya gha ẹre ne iran ni dekẹe vbe ẹwae Kohat, vbe dọmwadẹ ẹgbẹe." 
1Chronicles6:62 A kevbe gha ẹvbo iweva ne ẹwae Gẹsiọn vbe ẹgbẹe ọkpọkpa vbe otọe Isaka, Asia, Naftali kevbe Manasẹ ne Orrie vbe Basian." 
1Chronicles6:63 Erriọ zẹ ọ re avbe ghae okpẹvbo iweva ne dọmwadẹ ẹgbẹe ne ẹwae Merari vbe otọe Riubẹn, e Gad kevbe Zebulọn." 
1Chronicles6:64 Erriọ ọ re a na miẹn wẹ ivbi Izrẹl gha okpẹvbo eso ne ivbi e Livai gha ye deba otọe ne aranmwẹ irri na rria ni rrọọ. 
1Chronicles6:65 (Ẹvbo ne a sunu yi vbe otọe e Juda na, Simiọn kevbe Bẹnjamin, uta ọ re a vbe yan ya gha ẹre.)" 
1Chronicles6:66 A kegha okpẹvbo eso kevbe otọ ne aranmwẹ irri na rria Ifreim ne eso vbe ẹgbẹe ẹwae Kohat. Ena ọ re," 
1Chronicles6:67 Siẹkẹm ne ẹvbo ne a lẹ gbinna vbe ẹvbo uhunmwu oke Ifreim, e Gẹzẹ." 
1Chronicles6:68 E Jokmiam, e Bẹt, e Horọn," 
1Chronicles6:69 Aijalọn kevbe Gat Rimọn," 
1Chronicles6:70 vbe otọe ne ọ rre e Manasẹ ne Orrie, a keghi viọ, Anẹ, e Bileam kevbe otọe ne aranmwẹ na rria ni rrọọ ne iran." 
1Chronicles6:71 Ẹgbẹe ni rre ẹwae Gẹsiọn, keghi viọ avbe okpẹvbo nii, kevbe otọ ne aranmwẹ na rria ni lẹga iran ne iran: vbe e Manasẹ ne odẹ Ahọ, e Golan ne ọ rre Basian kevbe Astarrọt." 
1Chronicles6:72 Vbe otọe Isaka, a keghi viọ Kedẹs, Daberat," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramọt kevbe Anem ne iran. 
1Chronicles6:74 Vbe otọe Asia, a keghi viọ Masial, Abdọn," 
1Chronicles6:75 Hukok kevbe Rehọb ne iran. 
1Chronicles6:76 Vbe otọe Naftali, a keghi viọ Kedẹs ne Galili, Hamọn kevbe kirriatam ne iran." 
1Chronicles6:77 Iran ni ghi dekẹe vbe ẹgbẹe ni rre ẹwae Merari, a keghi viọ avbe ẹvbo na kevbe otọe ne aranmwẹ na rria ni rrọọ ne iran vbe otọe Zebulọn: Rimono kevbe Tabọ." 
1Chronicles6:78 Vbe otọe e Riubẹn, vbe odẹ ahọ Ẹzẹ Jọdan vbe a gha gberra, e Jẹriko e Bẹzẹ ne ọ rre uhunmwu oke, e Jaza," 
1Chronicles6:79 e Kedemọt kevbe Mẹfat. 
1Chronicles6:80 Vbe otọe e Gad, e Ramọt ne ọ rre Giliad, Mahanem," 
1Chronicles6:81 Mesbọn kevbe Jazẹ. 
1Chronicles7:1 Isaka kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia enẹ, ena ọ re Tola, e Pua, e Jasiub kevbe Siimron." 
1Chronicles7:2 E Tola kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia ehan, ena kegha re Uzi, e Refaia, e Jeriẹl, e Jamai, Ibsam kevbe Siemuẹl. Iran na kegha re ọdiọnwere ọghe ẹgbẹe ni rre ẹwae Tola, iran kevbe gha re ivbiyokuo ni hin usi vbe ẹghẹ e Devid, ivbi uniẹn iran kegha re uri eha yan arriaisẹn eva yan ugie (22,600)." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzi kegha mwẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Izrahaia. Izrahaia ke ẹe kevbe ivbi ẹre ne ikpia enẹ ighẹ Maikẹl, Obedaia, e Joẹl kevbe Isiaia kegha re ọdiọnwere dọmwadẹ ẹgbẹe." 
1Chronicles7:4 Iran keghi viọ ikhuo ni bun sẹrriọ, iran kevbe biẹlẹ emọ ni bun sẹrriọ wẹ iran keghi sẹtin miẹn arhin arriaisẹn ehan yan ọgban (36,000) ni gha yo okuo viọ ladian vbe uniẹn iran." 
1Chronicles7:5 Inu ne a ka ẹgbẹe ni rre ẹwae Isaka re kegha re arriaisẹn ihinrọn yan iyenẹ (87,000) ni yo okuo." 
1Chronicles7:6 E Bẹnjamin kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena ọ re Bẹla, Bẹkia kevbe Jediaẹl." 
1Chronicles7:7 E Bẹla kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia isẹn, ena ọre Esbọn, Uzi, Uziẹl, e Jerimot kevbe Iri. Iran na kegha re ọkaẹgbẹe vbe ẹwae iran, iran kevbe gha re ivbiyokuo ni hin usi. Arhin ehayan ọgban yan arriaisẹn eva yan ugie (22,000) ni sẹtin yo okuo gha rre ẹgbẹe iran." 
1Chronicles7:8 E Bẹkia kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia ihinrin, ena ọre Zemira, e Joas, Eliezẹ, Eleoinai, Ọmri, e Jerimot, Abija, Anatọt kevbe Alemẹt." 
1Chronicles7:9 Emwi ne a gbẹnnẹ ye otọ vbe ekpa ẹgbẹe iran rhie maa wẹ iran kegha mwẹ arhin uri yan arriaisẹn ugie (20,200) ni sẹtin yo okuo." 
1Chronicles7:10 E Jedial kegha mwẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Bilhan. Bilhan kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia ihinrọn, ena ọre Jeus, e Bẹnjamin Ehud, e Kienaana, e Zetan, Tasis kevbe Ahisiaha." 
1Chronicles7:11 Ekaẹgbẹe iran gha khin vbe ẹwae nii, iran kevbe gha re ivbiyokuo ni hun usi. Uniẹn iran kegha mwẹ arhin uri yan arriaisẹn eha irrọvbugie (17,000) ni sẹtin yo okuo." 
1Chronicles7:12 Ẹwae na ọ re Siupim kevbe Hupim vbe gha khin. E Dan kegha mwẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Husiim. 
1Chronicles7:13 E Naftali kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia enẹ, ena ọre Jaziẹl, e Guni, e Jezẹ kevbe Sialọm, (ivbi uniẹn Bilha iran gha khin.)" 
1Chronicles7:14 Ọse ne ovbi ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Aram ne Manasẹ. zẹe keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eva ne ẹẹn, ena ọre Asriẹl kevbe Makia ne ọ gha re erha Giliad." 
1Chronicles7:15 E Makia keghi rhie okhuo ne Hupim, ọ kevbe rhie ne Siupim. A kegha tie ovbi e Makia ne okpia ne ukpogieva Zẹlofehad, emọ ikhuo ọkpa ọre ọ wa biẹlẹ." 
1Chronicles7:16 E Maaka ne amwẹ Makia keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eva, iran na he iran Pẹrẹs kevbe Siẹrẹs. E Pẹrẹs keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eva, ena ọre Ulam kevbe Rakem." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulam keghi biẹ ọmokpia ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Bedan. Ivbi uniẹn e Giliad ena hia gha khin ighẹ ovbi e Makia kevbe eyẹ e Manasẹ. 
1Chronicles7:18 Ọtẹn e Giliad ne okhuo ighẹ Hamolẹket keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eha ena ọre Isiọd, Abiẹzẹ kevbe Maala." 
1Chronicles7:19 (E Siẹmida kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia enẹ, ena ọre Ahian, e Siẹkẹm, e Likhi kevbe Aniam.)" 
1Chronicles7:20 Ivbi uniẹn Ifreim ke orre sẹ orre ọ re ena khin: E Siutẹla, e Bẹrẹd, e Tahat, Eleada, e Tahat," 
1Chronicles7:21 e Zabad, e Siutẹla, Ifreim kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva ọvbehe gberra Siutẹla. ena kegha re Elead, ne iran gbele ua vbe iran te gha do ẹmila ivbi e Gat ni yan ẹvbo hẹ." 
1Chronicles7:22 Ifreim ne erha iran keghi ye ikpẹdẹ ni bun khiẹ iran, etiọnrẹn ne ikpia keghi gha fu ẹre ẹko rre." 
1Chronicles7:23 Rẹn na dọlegbe tie ọvbokhan rẹn ovbe, ọ keghi hanmwa, ọ na biẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa, iran keghi hẹ ọmọ okpia nii Beraia rhunmwuda ọlọghọmwa ne ẹgbẹe iran miẹn." 
1Chronicles7:24 Ifreim keghi mwẹ ọmọ okhuo ọkpa ne tie ẹre Siera. Okhuo na ọ re ọ bọlọ okpẹvbo Bẹt Horọn Ne ọ ke otọ kevbe Ne ọ ke odọọ, kevbe Uziẹn Siera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Ifreim kevbe gha mwẹ ọmọ okpia ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Refa, ivbi uniẹn ọnrẹn ọre ena khin, e Resiẹf, e Tela, e Tahan," 
1Chronicles7:26 e Ladan, Amihud, Elisiama," 
1Chronicles7:27 e Nọn, kevbe e Jọsua." 
1Chronicles7:28 Otọe ne iran mu ne iran vbe yin kegha re Bẹtẹl kevbe avbe okpẹvbo nii lẹga ẹre ya sẹ Naaran ne odẹ ahọ kevbe e Gẹzẹ ne odẹ orrie kevbe avbe okpẹvbo ni lẹga ẹre, avbe okpẹvbo Siẹkẹm kevbe Aya kevbe okpẹvbo ni lẹga iran kevbe rre ne usun." 
1Chronicles7:29 Ivbi uniẹn e Manasẹ ọ re ọ gha kha yan avbe Bẹt-Sian, e Taanak, e Mẹgido, kevbe Dọ, kevbe avbe okpẹvbo ni lẹga iran. Avbe ehe ne a sunu yi na ọ re ivbi uniẹn Josẹf ne ovbi e Jekọb yinrin." 
1Chronicles7:30 Ivbi uniẹn Asia ọ re ena khin. Emọ ikpia enẹ ọ re ọ biẹlẹe, ena ọ re Imna, Isva, Isvi kevbe Beraia; kevbe ọmọ okhuo ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 E Beraia kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eva, ena ọ re Heba kevbe Malkiẹl. (Malkie ọ re ọ bu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Bizait.)" 
1Chronicles7:32 E Heba kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena ọ re Jaflet, Siọma kevbe Hotan kevbe ọmokhuo ọkpa ne a tie ẹre Siua." 
1Chronicles7:33 E Jafẹt kevbe gha mwẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena ọ re Pasak, Bimhal kevbe Asvat." 
1Chronicles7:34 E Siọma ne ọtiọnrẹn ne okpia kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena ọ re Roga, Jehuba kevbe Aram." 
1Chronicles7:35 Ọtiọnrẹn ighẹ Hotam kevbe gha mwẹ emọ ikpia enẹ, ena ọ re Zofa, Imna, Siẹlẹs, kevbe Amal." 
1Chronicles7:36 Ivbi uniẹn Zofa kegha re Sua, Hanefa, e Suial, Beri, Imra," 
1Chronicles7:37 e Bẹzẹ, e Hod, e Siama, e Silisia, Itran kevbe Biira." 
1Chronicles7:38 Ivbi uniẹn Jetẹ kegha re Jefunẹ, e Pispa kevbe Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ivbi uniẹn Ulla kegha re Ara, Hanniẹl kevbe Rizia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Ivbi uniẹn Asia ọ re iran na hia khin, iran kevbe gha re ọkaẹgbẹe ọghe ẹgbẹe iran, emwa ni gbinna ni hin usi kevbe olotu ne ya ghe. A kevbe miẹn arhin arriaisẹn enẹirrọvbọgban (26,000) ni sẹtin yo okuo vbe ivbi uniẹn Asia." 
1Chronicles8:1 Emọ ikpia isẹn ọre Bẹnjamin gha mwẹ. Ena kegha re vbene a ya biẹlẹ iran lele egbe: E Bẹla, Asbẹl, Ahara," 
1Chronicles8:2 e Noha kevbe Rafa. 
1Chronicles8:3 Ivbi uniẹn e Bẹla kegha re Ada, Gera, Ahihud," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abisiua, kevbe Naaman, Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 e Gera, e Sefufan kevbe Huram." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ivbi uniẹn Ehud kegha re Naaman, Ahija kevbe Gera, iran kegha re ọkaẹgbẹe avbe ẹgbẹe ni rre Geba, sokpan, iran ghi khulo iran ladian, iran na ya yin e Manahat. E Gera ne erha Uza kevbe Ahihud ọ re ọ viọ iran mwẹ obọ ya ru emwi na." 
1Chronicles8:7  
1Chronicles8:8 E Siaharem keghi khulo amwẹ ọnrẹn eveva, ena ọ re Husiim kevbe Baara. Okiekie vbe ọ ghi ya yin e Moab, ọ keghi rhie Hodes, ọ na biẹlẹ emọ ikpia ihinrọn, ena ọ re Jobab, e Zibia, e Misia, e Malkam." 
1Chronicles8:8 E Siaharem keghi khulo amwẹ ọnrẹn eveva, ena ọ re Husiim kevbe Baara. Okiekie vbe ọ ghi ya yin e Moab, ọ keghi rhie Hodes, ọ na biẹlẹ emọ ikpia ihinrọn, ena ọ re Jobab, e Zibia, e Misia, e Malkam." 
1Chronicles8:9  
1Chronicles8:10 E Jeuz, Sakia kevbe Miema. Ivbi ẹre ne ikpia na hia kegha re ekaẹgbẹe." 
1Chronicles8:11 E Husiim keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eva ne ẹẹn, ena ọ re Ahitub kevbe Elpal." 
1Chronicles8:12 Elpal kegha mwẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena ọ re Ebẹ, Misiam kevbe Siẹmẹd. E Siẹmẹd ọ re ọ bu avbe ẹvbo na a tie ẹre Ono kevbe Lọd deba igue ni lẹga iran." 
1Chronicles8:13 E Beraia kevbe Siẹma kegha re ọkaẹgbẹe emwa ni yin Aijalọn, iran na khulo emwa ni rre Gat ladian." 
1Chronicles8:14 Usun ivbi uniẹn e Baraia ọ re iran ye ighẹ Ahio, e Siasiak, e Jeremọt," 
1Chronicles8:15 e Zebedaia, Arad, Edẹ," 
1Chronicles8:16 e Maikẹl, Ispa kevbe Joha." 
1Chronicles8:17 Usun ivbi Elpal ọ re iran ye ighẹ Zebadaia, Mẹsiulam, e Hizki, e Hebẹ," 
1Chronicles8:18 Ismeraia, Izlia kevbe Jobab." 
1Chronicles8:18 Ismeraia, Izlia kevbe Jobab." 
1Chronicles8:19 Usun ivbi e Siimei ọ re iran ye ighẹ Jakim, e Zikri, e Zabdi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai, e Ziletai, Eliẹl," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaia, e Beraia kevbe Simrat." 
1Chronicles8:22 Usun ivbi Siasiak ọ re iran ye ighẹ Ispan, Ebe, Eliẹl," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abdọn, Zikri, ẹ Hanan," 
1Chronicles8:24 e Hanania, Ẹlam, Antotija," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ifdeia kevbe Pẹnuẹl. 
1Chronicles8:26 Usun ivbi Jeroham ọ re iran ye ighẹ Siamsierai, e Sieharaia, Atalaia." 
1Chronicles8:27 E Jaaresia, Elaija, kevbe Zikri." 
1Chronicles8:28 Iran na ọ re ọ gha re ọkaẹgbẹe odede kevbe ivbi iran ne eseserese ni gha rre Jerusalẹm. 
1Chronicles8:29 E Jiẹl ọ re ọ bu ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Gibiọn, ọ na yin evba, a kegha tie amwẹ ọnrẹn Maaka." 
1Chronicles8:30 A na vbe gha tie ovbi ẹre ne okpia ne ọdiọn Abdọn. Emọ ikpia ni dekẹe ne ọ mwẹ kegha re avbe Zọ, e Kis, e Baal, e Nẹẹ, e Nadab." 
1Chronicles8:31 E Gẹdọ, Ahio, Zekẹ," 
1Chronicles8:32 kevbe Miklọt ne ọ bie Siimea, ivbi iran keghi yin ke etẹn iran nekpa ni rre Jerusalẹm." 
1Chronicles8:33 Nẹẹ ọ re ọ gha re erha e Kis, e Kis ọ re ọ biẹ e Sọl. Emọ ikpia enẹ ọ re Sọl gha mwẹ, ena ọ re Jonatan, Malkisua, Abinadab kevbe Esbal." 
1Chronicles8:34 E Jonatan ọ re ọ gha re erha Meribal ne ọ biẹ Maika. 
1Chronicles8:35 E Maika keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia enẹ, ena ọ re Pitan, e Mẹlẹk, e Terea kevbe Ahaz." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahaz ọ re ọ biẹ Jehoada ne ọ vbe biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eha. Ena ọ re Alemẹt, Azmavẹt kevbe Zimri. E Zimri ọ re ọ biẹ Moza," 
1Chronicles8:37 ne ọ biẹ Binia, e Binia keghi biẹ Rafa, e Rafa keghi biẹ Eleasa vbene Eleasa na biẹ Azẹl." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azẹl keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia ehan. Ena ọ re, Azrikam, Bokeru, Ismaẹl, Siearaia, Obedaia kevbe Hanan." 
1Chronicles8:39 Esiẹk ne ọtẹn Azẹl keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia eha, ena ọre Ulam, Jeus kevbe Ẹlifẹlẹt." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ivbi Ulam kegha re ivbiyokuo ni hin usi kevbe ifiẹkpede, emọ iwu kevbe eyẹ, emọ ikpia ne ọ biẹlẹ hia keghi gha re ekigbesiyeha yan iyisẹn (150). Iran hia ne a sunu yi na ẹwae Bẹnjamin ọ re iran gha khin." 
1Chronicles9:1 A keghi gbẹnnẹ eni ivbi Izrẹl hia ye otọ zẹvbe dọmwadẹ ẹgbẹe iran Ebe avbe iran ne Ọba Izrẹl ọ re a gbẹnnẹ emwi na yi. A ka wa viọ ivbi Izrẹl kpao gha rrie Babilọn rhunmwuda orukhọ iran. 
1Chronicles9:2 Emwa kẹkan, avbe ohẹn kevbe Livai rre usun emwa ni ka wa gha die otọ iran." 
1Chronicles9:3 Avbe emwa ni ke ẹwae Juda, e Bẹnjamin, Ifreim kevbe Manasẹ rre keghi ya gha rre Jerusalẹm." 
1Chronicles9:4 Ẹgbẹe uri eha vbe igbe ihinrin (690) vbe ẹwae e Juda keghi gha rre Jerusalẹm ivbi uniẹn Pẹrẹs ne ovbi e Juda, ọmwa ne ọ gha re ọkaolotu iran kegha re Utai ne ovbi Amihud kevbe eyẹ Ọmri. Usun avbe erha iran odede eso kegha re Imri kevbe Bani. Ivbi uniẹn e siela ne ovbi e Juda, ọmwa ne ọ gha re ọkaolotu iran kegha re Asaia, rẹn keghi re ọkaẹgbẹe ọghe ẹgbẹe irẹn. Ivbi uniẹn Zẹra ne ovbi e Juda, ọmwa ne ọ gha re olotu iran kegha re Jeuẹl." 
1Chronicles9:5  
1Chronicles9:6  
1Chronicles9:7 Iran na vbe uwu ẹwae Bẹnjamin kegha rre Jerusalẹm E Salu ne ovbi e Mẹsiulam, ne ọ gha re ovbi e Hodavaia ne ovbi e Hasẹnua, Ibneia ne ovbi Jeroham, Ela ne ovbi Uzi kevbe eyẹ ọghe Maikri, e Mẹsiulam ne ovbi e Siefatia, ne ọ gha re ovbi Reuẹl Ibnija." 
1Chronicles9:8  
1Chronicles9:9 Ẹgbẹe uniẹn na ni dia evba ya kegha re iyisẹn ihinrin, igbe isẹn kevbe ehan (956)." 
1Chronicles9:10 Avbe ohẹn na ọre ọ gha rre Jerusalẹm E Jedaia, e Jehoiarib kevbe Jakin Azaraia ne ovbi e Hilkaia (iran na ọ o gha re ọka ọwa emwi Ọgua Osa) usun avbe erha iran odede kegha re Mẹsiulam, e Zadọk, e Meraiọt kevbe Ahitub. Adaia ne ovbi e Jeroham, ne usun avbe erha iran odede gha re e Pasiọ kevbe Makija, e Maasai ne ovbi Adiẹl, ne usun avbe erha iran odede gha re Jazẹra, e Mẹsiulam, e Mesilemit, kevbe Imnẹ." 
1Chronicles9:11  
1Chronicles9:12  
1Chronicles9:13 Inu avbe ohẹn ni gha re ọkaẹgbẹe ke gha re arriaisẹn ọkpa, iyisẹn ihinrọn kevbe iyeha (1,760). Iran kegha re iguesẹ ni rrọ vbe iwinna hia ne a ghi winna vbe Ọgua Osa." 
1Chronicles9:14 Avbe Livai na o re o gha rre Jerusalẹm: E Siemaia ne ovbi e Hasiub, ne usun avbe erha iran odede gha re. Azrikam kevbe Hasabia, ne ẹwae e Merari e Bakbaka, e Hẹrẹs kevbe Galal. E Matanaia ne ovbi e Mika, ne usun avbe erha iran odede gha re e Zikri kevbe Asaf. Obedaia ne ovbi e Semaia, ne usun avbe erha iran gha re Galal kevbe Jedutun, e Berakia, ne ovbi Asa kevbe eyẹ ọghe Ẹlkana ne ọ gha rre iwewe otọe avbe ne a tie ẹre Nẹtofa." 
1Chronicles9:15  
1Chronicles9:16  
1Chronicles9:17 Usun avbe ọgbalegbe Ọgua Osa ni gha rre Jerusalẹm ke gha re: E Sialọm Akub, e Talmọn, kevbe Ahiman, E Sialọm kegha re ọkaolotu iran." 
1Chronicles9:18 Do sẹ ẹghẹ na, ehe ne a viọ ivbi uniẹn iran yi kegha re odẹ ahọ Urho Ọba. Iran ka vbe gha re ọgbalegbe vbe onurho ne a la la agọ avbe Livai." 
1Chronicles9:19 E Sialọm ne ovbi e Kore kevbe eyẹ Ebiasaf, kevbe iran ni gba re ivbi uniẹn e Kora ọ re ọ ka gha avbe ọgbalegbe vbe onurho Owa Ukpọn ne a ya rẹn ighẹ e Nọyan rre evba zẹ vbene avbe erha iran ka vbe gha ye ne iran na gha re ne ọ gbearoghe agọ e Nọyaẹnmwa." 
1Chronicles9:20 E Finihaz ne ovbi Eleaza, te Nọyaẹnmwa gha deba ẹre! — rẹn ọ gha mwamwa iwinna ne iran ẹghẹ nii." 
1Chronicles9:21 E Zẹkaraia ne ovbi e Meselemia kevbe gha re ọgbalegbe vbe onurho Owa Ukpọn ne a ya rẹn ighẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa rre evba. 
1Chronicles9:22 Vbe uwu ehia, inu emwa ne a zẹe ne iran gha re ọgbalegbe onurho kevbe ehe ne a la la owa ke gha re uri ọkpa vbe vbe iweva (212). A keghi gbennẹẹn eni iran ye otọ zẹ vbene iran ya rre dọmwadẹ igue. E Devid ne Ọba kevbe e Samuẹl ne akhasẹ ọ re ọ viọ iran ye ukpo adazẹ na." 
1Chronicles9:23 Iran kevbe avbe ivbi uniẹn iran ọ re ọ gha gbearoghe onurho Ọgua Osa. Onurho ọkpọkpa kegha rre igienenẹ, okuo ekẹn ahọ kevbe orrie." 
1Chronicles9:24 Ọkaolotu ọgbalegbe kevbe gha rre ọkpọkpa vbọ. 
1Chronicles9:25 Etẹn avbe ọgbalegbe ghi yi iran obọ, igue iran gha ye, iran ghae egbe ye otu do gha khẹ odẹ la ikpẹdẹ ihinrọn." 
1Chronicles9:26 Avbe oka ọgbalegbe ne enẹ kegha re Livai, iran ọre a ghi ka emwi hia ye ọre obọ. Iran ọre ovbe gbearoghe avbe ughugha ni rre Ọgua Osa kẹẹ ke emwi hia ni rre evba." 
1Chronicles9:27 Ehe ne iran ye ke wa sikẹ Ọgua Osa rhunmwuda iwinna ọrọre ne iran gbearoghe ẹre kevbe ne iran gha kie urho ẹre ye otọ owiowiẹ. 
1Chronicles9:28 Avbe Livai nekpa ọre ọ gbearoghe avbe ọkpan ne a ya ru ugamwẹ vbo Ọgua Osa. Iran ọre ọ viọ iran ladian, iran ọ vbe viọ iran la owa vbe ẹghẹikẹghẹ ne a ya lo iran." 
1Chronicles9:29 Iran nekpa kegha gbearoghe avbe emwi iruemwi ni huanrẹn ni dekẹe kevbe irhuarhua, ayọn ofigbọn ọliv, avbe eturari kevbe emwi ni ghi winhin hia." 
1Chronicles9:30 Sokpan iwinna ọre emwi ni winhin ne a gha gha khin. 
1Chronicles9:31 E Livai ne a tie eni ẹnrẹn Matitaia, ne ọre ovbi e Sialọm nọdiọn, vbe uniẹn e Kora, ọ re ọ yan iwinna emwi ne a ghi fian ẹre eka ya ru ugamwẹ imuohan nẹ." 
1Chronicles9:32 Ivbi ẹwae Kohat ọ re yan eka iruemwi ne a lo vbe Ọgua Osa vbe Ẹdẹ Ikẹtin hia. 
1Chronicles9:33 Eso vbe ẹgbẹe avbe Livai ọre ọ yan emwi ihuan ne a kpee vbe Ọgua Osa. Avbe ọkaẹgbẹe avbe ẹgbẹe na eso vbe avbe ughugha ni rre Ọgua Osa ọre iran gha ye, iran i vbe mwẹ obọ vbe avbe iwinna ọvbehe, rhunmwuda, ke asọn ke avan ọ re a ya tie iran ye iwinna." 
1Chronicles9:34 Avbe emwa ne a kha na, avbe ọkaẹgbẹe ẹgbẹe Livai iran gha khin, zevbe uniẹn edọmwadẹ ọghọe ọghe erha iran odede. Avbe ọkaolotu ni gha rre Jerusalẹm ọre iran gha khin." 
1Chronicles9:35 E Jiẹl ọre ọ bu e Gibiọn, ọ na yin ẹnrẹn. A kegha tie amwẹ ọnrẹn Maaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Ovbi ẹre nọdiọn kegha re Abdọn, ivbi nekpa kegha re Zọ, Kis, Baal, Nẹ, Kevbe Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 e Gẹdọ, Ahio, Zẹkaraia kevbe Miklọt," 
1Chronicles9:38 ne erha e Simea. E Jerusalẹm ọre ivbi iran gha deba ivbi ẹgbẹe ọvbehe vbe uniẹn nii. 
1Chronicles9:39 E Nẹ o gha re erha Kis, e Kis ọ gha re erha Sọl. Emọ enẹ e Sọl biẹlẹe: e Jonatan, e Malkisua, Abinadab kevbe Esbal." 
1Chronicles9:40 E Jonatan ọ gha re erha Meribal, ne o gha re erha Maika." 
1Chronicles9:41 E Maika keghi biẹlẹ emọ enẹ, ena ọre Pitọn, e Mẹlẹk, e Tarea kevbe Ahaz." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahaz ọre erha e Jara ne ọ vbe emọ eha, ena ọre Alemẹt Azmavẹt kevbe Zimri, e zimri ọre erha Moza," 
1Chronicles9:43 e Moza ọre erha Binia ne ọ biẹ Refaia, ne ọ biẹ Eleasa, ne ọ biẹ Azẹl." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azẹl keghi mwẹ emọ ehan, ena ọre Azrikam, e Bokeru, Ismaẹl, Searia, Obedaia kevbe Hanan." 
1Chronicles10:1 Ivbi e Filistin keghi gu ivbi Izrẹl khọn okuo vbe Uhunmwu Oke Giboa, Iran keghi gbele ivbi Izrẹl nibun vbe evba, iran ni dekẹe, ke iran kevbe e Sọl kevbe ivbi ẹre eveva, keghi lẹkua." 
1Chronicles10:2 Sokpan, ivbi e Filistin keghi khulo iran, obọ iran keghi vba iran, iran gbele eha vbe ivbi e Sọl. Ena kegha re Jonatan, Abinadab kevbe Malkisua" 
1Chronicles10:3 Igbinna keghi wa wegbe vbe ehe ne Sọl ye. Ifẹnmwẹ avbe eghian keghi vba ẹre, obọ keghi wa daa ẹe ẹsẹse." 
1Chronicles10:4 Rẹn keghi tama igbama ne ọ viọ emwi igbinna mwẹ ọnrẹn “Yuo umozo ruẹ ladian ne u gbe mwẹ uan, ne avbe ivbe e Filistin ni ma rẹn Osa na ghẹ do ya mwẹ gha gbe ogiẹ.” Sokpan, ohan ma gie igbama nii ru ẹe. Ẹre sọl ghi na mu umozo irẹn, ọ na tobọ ẹre de yọ." 
1Chronicles10:5 Igbama nii ghi miẹn ighẹ e Sọl wu, rẹn keghi vbe tobọ ẹre dee ye umozo ọghọe, ọ na wu." 
1Chronicles10:6 Erriọ ọ re a na miẹn wẹ e Sọl kevbe ivbi ẹre nikpia eheha ọ re ọ koko wulo, a ma ghi miẹn ne ọ rriọba vbe uniẹn ọnrẹn ọvbehe." 
1Chronicles10:7 Ugbẹn vbe ivbi Izrẹl ni rre Iya e Jezrẹl ghi họn wẹ ivbi iyokuo lẹkua, kevbe wẹ e Sọl kevbe ivbi ẹre wulo, iran kpao vbe ẹvbo iran rre, iran keghi lẹkua. Ivbi e Filistin keghi gha dee do mu evba." 
1Chronicles10:8 Vbe ẹdẹ ne ọ lele ẹdẹ ne a khọn okuo na, ivbi e Filistin keghi ya gha fu emwi iran ne wulo viọ, iran keghi miẹn ikun e Sọl kevbe ọghe ivbi ẹre vbe uhunmwu Oke Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Iran keghi fian e Sọl uhunmwu, iran kie ẹre ẹwu okuo, iran na giee emwa ne iran viọ ehia la otọ e Filistia hia, ne iran ya iran na iyẹn oghọghọ ma avbe emwa iran kevbe ẹbọ iran." 
1Chronicles10:10 Iran keghi viọ emwi igbinna rẹn ye ọkpa vbe uwu avbe ọgua ẹbọ iran. Iran keghi si uhunmwu ẹnrẹn rrọọ ye ọgua ọkpa vbe uwu avbe ẹbọ iran ne a tie eni ẹnrẹn Dragọn. 
1Chronicles10:11 Ugbẹn vbe ivbi e Gebẹs ne Giliad ghi họn vbene ivbi e Filistin ru e Sọl hẹ," 
1Chronicles10:12 iran ni din sẹ vbe uwu iran keghi ya viọ ikun e Sọl kevbe ọghe ivbi ẹre. iran keghi viọ gha rrie Gebẹs. Iran keghi re iran ye ẹzi okan, iran na khiẹ la ikpẹdẹ ihinrọn." 
1Chronicles10:13 E Sọl wu rhunmwuda, ọ ma ya ekhọe rhie egbe mu Osanobua. Ọ he iyi Osanobua ye otọ ọ kegha gualọ igiodẹ odẹ ne ọ gha ru emwi la vbe obọ emwa ni wulo nẹ kevbe vbe obọ orhiọn emwa ni" 
1Chronicles10:14 ne ọ gha na te ya gha nọ e Nọyaẹnmwa. Rhunmwuda ọnii, e e Nọyaẹnmwa keghi gbe ẹe rua, ọ na mu arriọba ne e Devid ne ovbi e Jese ne ọ gha khaemwisẹ yan." 
1Chronicles11:1 Ivbi Izrẹl hia keghi bu e Devid gha rrie Hibrọn, iran tama rẹn wẹẹ, “Esagiẹn ọkpa ma gba khin." 
1Chronicles11:2 Vbe ẹghẹ ne ọ gberra, uhin vbe Sọl he ye re ọba ima, wẹ ọ re ọ gha viọ ivbi Izrẹl ye okuo, e Nọyaẹnmwa Osanobua ruẹ keghi yan tama ruẹn wẹ u gha su emwa na, u ghi gha re ogie iran.”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Rhunmwuda ọnii, avbe ekaolotu ivbi Izrẹl hia keghi bu e Devid gha die Hibrọn, ọ na yo ulamwẹ ne iran, iran tue ori ye ọre uhunmwu iran keghi ma ẹre ọba Izrẹl zẹ vbene Nọyaẹnmwa la unu e Samuẹl tae zẹẹ." 
1Chronicles11:4 E Devid ne ọba kevbe ivbi Izrẹl hia keghi mu okuo gie Jerusalẹm, e Jebus ọ re a tie ẹre ẹghẹ nii, ivbi e Jebus ne ivbi ọmotọ he ye rre evba." 
1Chronicles11:5 Ivbi e Jebus keghi tama e Devid wẹẹ, “Ẹ i ra sẹtin la adesẹ ore ẹvbo,” sokpan, e Devid keghi khọn mu e Zaiọn ne a gbe odin gaa, ọ re a na do gha tie ẹre “Ẹvbo e Devid.”" 
1Chronicles11:6 E Devid keghi kha wẹẹ, “Ọmwa ne ọ rhirhi ka gbe ovbi e Jebus ọ re ọ ra gha re ọkaokuo nọkhua ọghe ivbiyokuo!” E Joab ne a tie iye ẹe Zeruaia keghi ke odaro igbinna nii, ọ re ọ na do gha re ọkaokuo nọkhua." 
1Chronicles11:7 Rhunmwuda ne Devid na ya yin ẹvbo ne a gbe odin gaa nii," 
1Chronicles11:8 a na do gha tie ẹre, “Ẹvbo e Devid.” Ọ keghi dọlegbe bọ ẹvbo nii, ọ na suẹn ọnrẹn vbe ehe ne a na ya ekẹn ran uye vbe obọ agọ ọghe oke nii, e Joab keghi ya khọn ehe ni ghi dekẹe vbe ẹvbo nii fo." 
1Chronicles11:9 E Devid kegha wegbe yọ ẹdẹgbegbe, rhunmwuda, e Nọyaẹnmwa Noghodua deba ẹre." 
1Chronicles11:10 Eni avbe ivbiyokuo e Devid ni hin usi ọ re ena khin, iran na ọ re ọ yaba ivbi Izrẹl nekpa, ru iyobọ ne ẹẹn ne ọ rriọba zẹ vbene Nọyaẹnmwa kha re, iran kevbe ya arriọba ẹre igie muotọ." 
1Chronicles11:11 Ne okaro vbọ ọrọre Jasiọbim ne uniẹn Hakmọn, ne ọ gha re ọkaolotu “Iran ne Eha.” Ọ keghi ya umozo gu arhin iyisẹn yan uri gbinna vbe okuo ọkpa, ọ na gbele iran hia a." 
1Chronicles11:12 Ne ọ ghi zẹ lele “Iran ne Eha,” ni hin usi kegha re Eliaza ne ovbi e Dodo ne ovbi uniẹn Ahọ." 
1Chronicles11:13 Rẹn mudia ke Devid gu ivbi e Filistin gbinna vbe okuo e Pas Demim. Ugbo ọka rẹn gha ye vbe ivbi Izrẹl vẹ kua vbe okuo. 
1Chronicles11:14 Ẹre irẹn vbe emwa rẹn na mudia vbe adesẹ ugbo nii, iran na gu ivbi e Filistin gbinna. E Nọyaẹnmwa keghi rhie a khọnmiotọ ne ẹẹn." 
1Chronicles11:15 Ọ ghi sẹ ẹdẹ ọkpa, eha vbe uwu avbe iyokuo ọgban nii hin usi sẹ kegha rrie okuta nọkhua ne Devid na gha rre ọkpẹn uvun okuta Adulam, vbe avbe ivbiyokuo e Filistin bu agọ ye Iya e Refeim." 
1Chronicles11:16 Vbe ẹghẹ ne a kha na, e Devid kegha rre uhunmwu oke ne a gbe odin gaa. Ivbi e Filistin eso keghi mu e Bẹtlẹhẹm." 
1Chronicles11:17 Ẹmwẹ owa keghi gha da e Devid, ọ keghi kha wẹẹ, “Vbọ rrọọ nian akpawẹ, I gha miẹn ọmwa ne ogha sa amẹ uhae ne ọ rre onurho e Bẹtlẹhẹm gun mwẹ wọn.”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Ivbiyokuo ni hin usi eha keghi ya uhunmwu ha agọ ivbi e Filistin gberra, iran keghi sa amẹ vbe uhae nii, iran na mu bu e Devid gha dee. Sokpan, ọ ma wọn ẹn, ọ keghi hihiẹ ọe ku otọ zẹ vbe emwi izọ ese ghe Nọyaẹnmwa," 
1Chronicles11:19 ọ wẹẹ, “Ohan i gun mwẹ wọn ọna, te ọ ra yevbe ne a wọn esagiẹn emwa na ni rhie uhunmwu da ẹbe.” Rhunmwuda ọnii, ọ ma wọẹn. Iwinna udinmwẹ ne ivbiyokuo eha ni hin usi winnaẹn ọ re ọnii khin." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abisiai ne ọtẹn e Joab ọ re ọ gha re ọkaolotu iran ne “Ọgban Ni hin usi.” Ọ keghi ye asoro ẹre gu arhin iyisẹn eha (300) gbinna, ọ na gbele iran hia a, ọ na do hin usi sẹẹ vbe uwu ẹbu “Iran ne Ọgban,” ọ na do gha re olotu iran." 
1Chronicles11:21 Rẹn ọ re ọ hin usi sẹẹ vbe uwu “Iran ne Ọgban,” sokpan ọ ma hin usi vba “Iran ne Eha.”" 
1Chronicles11:22 E Banaia ne ovbi e Jehoiada ne ovbi ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Kabzil kevbe gha re ovbiyokuo ne ọ hin usi. Emwi udinmwẹ ni bun ọ re ọ ru, uwu ne ọ na gbele ivbiyokuo e Moab eva ni hin usi. Ẹghẹ ọkpa, ọ na la uwu uvun vbe ẹghẹ ne esia ya dee, ọ na ya gbe oduma." 
1Chronicles11:23 Ọ kevbe gbe ovbi Igipt ọkpa ne gẹdẹgbẹẹ ne ọ sẹ omwa emita ihinrọn vbe ukhiọnmwẹ vbe utanmwẹ, ọ na vbe mu asoro nọkhua mwẹ ne ọ ya gbinna. E Benaia keghi ya orhokhua yan rẹn, ọ na sanmwẹ ọre asoro hin obọ ovbi Igipt ni rre, ọ na ya gbe ẹe rua." 
1Chronicles11:24 Ena ọ re emwi udinmwẹ ne Benaia ru khin ọmwa ne ọ vbe re ọkpa vbe uwu “Iran ne Ọgban.” 
1Chronicles11:25 Rẹn kakabọ hin usi sẹẹ vbe uwu ẹbu “Iran ne Ọgban” sokpan ọ ma hin usi vba “Iran ne Eha.” E Devid keghi ya ẹe ru ọkaolotu iran ne ọ ya khẹ egbe. 
1Chronicles12:1 Ẹghẹ ne Devid na gha rre Ziklag ne ọ lẹ gha rrie ne ọ miẹn ehe na lẹ e Sọl fe, ivbiyokuo ne ọ kpee ne ọ ke yo okuo kevbe ne ọ gia mu ẹtin yan ni bun," 
1Chronicles12:2 ne ivbi ẹwae Bẹnjamin ne Sọl ke rre, keghi ya deba ẹre. Iran sẹtin ye obọ erha ọmwa ra obọ iye ọmwa fi ifẹnmwẹ ra umọvọn." 
1Chronicles12:3 Emwa ni gha viọ iran mwẹ khian kegha re Ahieza kevbe Joas ne ivbi e Siemaa ne ọ ke Gibea rre. Nene avbe ivbiyokuo ọrọre: E Jeziẹl kevbe Pẹlẹt ne ivbi Azmavẹt Beraka kevbe Jehu ni ke Anatọt rre Ismaia ne ọ ke Gibiọn rre, ọmwa ne ọ re ovbiyokuo ne ọ hin usi kevbe ọkpa vbe uwu avbe ọkaolotu “Iran ne Ọgban” E Jerimaia, Jahaziẹl, Johannan kevbe Jozabad ni ke Gẹdẹra rre Eluzai, Jerimot, Bealia, Siemarai kevbe Siefatia ni ke Harif rre Ẹlkana, Isiaia, Azariẹl, Joeze kevbe e Jasiọbim ne ivbi uniẹn e Kora E Joela kevbe Zebadaia ne ivbi e Jeroham ni ke Gẹdọ rre." 
1Chronicles12:3 Emwa ni gha viọ iran mwẹ khian kegha re Ahieza kevbe Joas ne ivbi e Siemaa ne ọ ke Gibea rre. Nene avbe ivbiyokuo ọrọre: E Jeziẹl kevbe Pẹlẹt ne ivbi Azmavẹt Beraka kevbe Jehu ni ke Anatọt rre Ismaia ne ọ ke Gibiọn rre, ọmwa ne ọ re ovbiyokuo ne ọ hin usi kevbe ọkpa vbe uwu avbe ọkaolotu “Iran ne Ọgban” E Jerimaia, Jahaziẹl, Johannan kevbe Jozabad ni ke Gẹdẹra rre Eluzai, Jerimot, Bealia, Siemarai kevbe Siefatia ni ke Harif rre Ẹlkana, Isiaia, Azariẹl, Joeze kevbe e Jasiọbim ne ivbi uniẹn e Kora E Joela kevbe Zebadaia ne ivbi e Jeroham ni ke Gẹdọ rre." 
1Chronicles12:4  
1Chronicles12:5  
1Chronicles12:6  
1Chronicles12:7  
1Chronicles12:8 Eni iran ena khin ighẹ avbe ivbiyokuo ni hin usi kevbe ni kpee vbe okuo ne a yo, ni ke ẹwae e Gad rre do deba ivbiyokuo e Devid vbe ẹghẹ ne ọ na gha rre ehe ne a gbe odin ga vbe ato. Iran kegha re emwa ne asoro kevbe asa ne a lo mobọ gua ẹre obọ ro. Iran kevbe mu ohan vbe aro zẹ vbe oduma, iran kevbe rhulẹ zẹ vbe ẹrhuẹ ne uhunmwu oke." 
1Chronicles12:9 Vbene a ya mwamwa edọmwadẹ ọghe ọe ye ukpo ọ re ọna khin: Ẹzẹ, Obedaia, Eliab, e Mismana, e Jerimaia, Atai, Eliẹl, Johanan, Elzabad, Jerimaia kevbe Makbanai." 
1Chronicles12:10  
1Chronicles12:11  
1Chronicles12:12  
1Chronicles12:13  
1Chronicles12:14 Eso vbe uwu avbe emwa ni ke uniẹn e Gad rre na kegha re ọkaokuo negiẹrẹ ni gbe aro ghe ivbiyokuo iyisẹn. 
1Chronicles12:15 Vbe uki ne okaro ọghe ukpo ọkpa, ne Ẹzẹ e Jọdan na ro kpa ku oke, iran keghi fian ẹzẹ ni rra, iran na vẹ emwa ni rre iya ni kua ke odẹ ahọ ke odẹ orrie ọghe ẹzẹ ni." 
1Chronicles12:16 Ẹghẹ ọkpa, ikpia eso keghi si egbe koko vbe Bẹnjamin kevbe Juda, iran na bu e Devid vbe ehe ne ọ ye ne a gbe odin ga vbe ato." 
1Chronicles12:17 E Devid keghi bu iran gha khian, ọ tama iran wẹẹ, “A dẹghe te uwa rre zẹ vbe ọse ne uwa do yọmwẹ obọ, I miẹn uwa yi, wa deba ima! Sokpan, dẹghe te uwa mwẹ ọnrẹn vbe ekhọe ne uwa do rhie mwẹ yan eghian mwẹ obọ, egbe ne a rhe ya miẹn wẹ I ma ru uwa emwirhọkpa, Osanobua avbe erha mwẹ odede gha rẹn, ọ ghi rria uwa ikhi.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Orhiọn Osanobua keghi hin yan ọkpa vbọ, Amasai ne ọ ghi khian ọkaolotu nọkhua ọghe “Iran ne Ọgban” ọ keghi wẹẹ, “E Devid ne ovbi e Jese, otu ruẹ ma ye Ọ dunna ẹn ọ re ọwuẹ kevbe iran ni yuọ obọ Wẹ ọ re Osanobua yaba.” E Devid keghi rhan obọ miẹn iran, ọ na viọ iran ye ukpo vbe ivbiyokuo ẹre." 
1Chronicles12:19 Ivbiyokuo eso vbe ẹwae Manasẹ keghi ya deba e Devid vbe ẹghẹ ne ọ na lele ivbi e Filistin ladian vbe iran ra ya gu e Sọl gbinna. Vbene ẹmwata, ọ ma ru iyobọ ne ivbi e Filistin rhunmwuda ohan mu avbe ọba iran wẹ ọ gha fi iran ne Sọl ne arowa ẹre nẹdẹ, iran na wẹ ne ọ werriegbe gha rrie Ziklag." 
1Chronicles12:20 Ọ ghi werriegbe dee, avbe ivbiyokuo na ọ re ọ gberra ghe obọ ọghe Devid: Adna, e Jozabad, Jediaẹl, e Maikẹl, Jozabad, Elihu kevbe Ziletai. Ẹghẹ ne iran na gha rre Manasẹ ivbiyokuo arriaisẹn ọ re ọkpọkpa vbe uwu iran gha gbe aro ghe." 
1Chronicles12:21 Iran kegha winna ne Devid vbe ukpo olotu ivbiyokuo ẹre rhunmwuda, ivbiyokuo ni hin usi ọre iran hia gha khin. Okiekie, iran kevbe gha re ekaolotu vbe ivbiyokuo Izrẹl." 
1Chronicles12:22 Uhin ighẹ ẹdẹgbegbe ọre emwa ya gha deba ivbiyokuo e Devid, sẹrriọ wẹ vbe ọma ghi he kpẹe, ivbiyokuo ẹre keghi khian ọrhẹnrhẹn." 
1Chronicles12:23 Ẹghẹ ne Devid na gha rre Hibrọn, ivbiyokuo ne a ma ẹre emwi ni bun ọre ọ ya deba ẹre ne iran ru iyobọ ya ma ẹre ọba zẹ vbene Nọyaẹnmwa tae ye otọ. Avbe iran ni ọ re ena khin: E Juda: arhin uri i rrọ vbe arriaisẹn ihinrọn (6,800) ni mwẹ emwi igbinna ọghe asa kevbe asoro. E Simiọn: arhin iyisẹn yan arriaisẹn ihinrọn (7,100) ne a ma ẹre emwi ẹsẹse; E Livai: arhin arria eha yan arriaisẹn enẹ (4,600); Ivbi uniẹn Errọn ni lele Jehoiada: iyisen yan arriaeha yan arriaisẹn eha (3,700); Etẹn e Zadọk ne ọmọ ne igbinna gua ẹre obọ ro kegha re arhin eva yan ugie (22) nihiunsi; Bẹnjamin (uniẹn e Sọl tobọre): arhin arriaisẹn eha (3,000). Iran nibun sẹ vbe Bẹnjamin ọ re ọ wa yegbe ba e Sọl; Ifreim: arria enẹ yan arriaisẹn ugie (20,800) ni wa hin usi vbe ẹwae iran; E Manasẹ ne orrie: arhin arriaisẹn evairrọ vbe ugie (18,000) ne a zẹe ne iran ya ma Devid ọba. Isaka: Ekaolotu uri (200) deba emwa ni rre ototọ asẹ iran (avbe ekaolotu na rẹn emwi ne ọ kere ne Izrẹl ru ke ẹghẹ ne ọ ke yi ne a ya ruẹe;) E Zebulọn: arhin arriaisẹn ekigbe siyeha (50,000) emwa ni gie a ya egbe yan kevbe ni mu egbe vbe ẹghẹ hia ni iran ya gbinna, emwa ne a ma ẹre emwi vbene a lo emwi igbinna ne ọ rhirhi a gha khin hẹ; E Naftali: avbe ekaolotu arriaisẹn (1,000) do deba arhin arriaisẹn ehairrọ vbe iyeva (37,000) ne a viọ emwi igbinna asa kevbe asoro na; E Dan: arhin arriaeha yan arriaisẹn evairrọ vbe ọgban (28,600) ne a ma ẹre emwi; Asia: arhin arriaisẹn iyeva (40,000) ni mu egbe ne iran ya gbinna vbe okuo. Ẹwae ni rre odẹ ahọ e Jọdan kegha re Riubẹn, e Gad kevbe Manasẹ ne odẹ Ahọ: Arhin arriaisẹn iyehan (120,000) ne a ma ẹre vbene a lo emwi igbinna ne ọ rhirhi gha khin hẹ." 
1Chronicles12:24 Avbe ivbiyokuo na hia ni wa mu egbe okuo kegha rrie Hibrọn vbene iran na yan yọ wẹ te iran ra ma e Devid ọba Izrẹl hia. Iran ne ivbi Izrẹl ni dekẹe hia, emwi ọkpa ni ọre ọ rre iran ekhọe vbe emwi ne iran wẹ iran ra ru." 
1Chronicles12:25 Iran keghi gu e Devid gbe ikpẹdẹ eha vbe evba vbene iran na gha rri evbare ne emwa ẹvbo nii ne ihua iran le ni iran. 
1Chronicles12:26 Emwa kegha viọ evbare ughughan ke urria rre vbene iran na ya ẹsin ihẹ, ekẹtẹkẹtẹ, ẹmila amwẹ, ẹkhuia, hẹ evbare ni rre, avbe irhuarhua, ebe uwọnmwẹ, ọmọ erhan ne a kae re, ayọn, ofigbọn oliv, ke ehe ne ọ rrei rre, vbene Isaka ye kevbe Zẹbulọn kevbe Naftali. Iran kevbe viọ ẹmila kevbe ohuan gie iran gha gbele re. Ena hia kegha re ne a ya rhie maa vbene ẹko rhiẹnrhiẹn emwa hia hẹ, la ehe ne ẹvbo nii sẹe, ehe ne ọ rhanmwẹ." 
1Chronicles13:1 E Devid ne ọba ke gu avbe olotu arhin arriaisẹn kevbe iyisẹn zẹ iro. 
1Chronicles13:2 Ọ na tama ivbi Izrẹl hia wẹẹ, “A dẹghe wa yobọ yọ kevbe wẹ iho e Nọyaẹnmwa ne Osanobua mwa nọ, wa gie ima gie emwa bu ivbi ẹvbo ima nekpa kevbe avbe ohẹn kevbe Livai ni rre ẹvbo iran, ne a tama iran ne iran gie ima miẹn egbe vbe edinran." 
1Chronicles13:3 Ma ghi ya mu Ẹkpẹti Ile e Nọyaẹnmwa, ne a wa yangbe vbe ẹghẹ ne Sọl na gha re ọba, rre.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Iro na keghi wa yẹ emwa hia, iran na khuẹnniẹn yọ." 
1Chronicles13:5 Ẹre Devid na si emwa ni hia ke ehe ne ẹvbo ni sẹe ehe ne ọ rhanmwẹ koko ke uwu Igipt vbe odẹ ekẹn ya sẹ Ada e Hamat vbe odẹ okuọ, ne iran miẹn ehe na ya mu Ẹkpẹti Ile Nọyaẹnmwa ke kirriat Jearim gha die Jerusalẹm." 
1Chronicles13:6 E Devid kevbe emwa ni kegha rrie Baala, ọnii nọ wẹ kirriat Jearim vbe otọe Juda, ne iran ya mu Ẹkpẹti Ile Osanobua rre ne ọ mwẹ eni e Nọyaẹnmwa ne ọ tota ye ẹkete vbe odukhunmwu emwi ni zẹ ifuẹn nii." 
1Chronicles13:7 Iran keghi mu Ẹkpẹti Ile nii ladian vbe owa Abinadab iran na mu ẹẹn yan okotọ ọgbọn. Uza kevbe Ahio kegha rhie aro lele ẹe kevbe ọkotọ nii. 
1Chronicles13:8 Vbene Devid kevbe emwa nekpa na gha ya ẹtin iran hia iwu ne iran ya rhie ọghọ ne Osanobua. Iran kegha so ihuan iran na gha kpe avbe ẹzi kẹn, akpata ema, isẹ kevbe okpe." 
1Chronicles13:9 Iran ghi sẹ ako otọ ne Kidọn na khuọn ọka, ẹmila keghi kpigogo, ọ re Uza na niẹn obọ ya da Ẹkpẹti Ile yi." 
1Chronicles13:10 Vbe ọwarọkpa, ohu Uza keghi mu e Nọyaẹnmwa, ọ na gbe ẹe rua rhunmwuda ne ọ na ye obọ kan ẹkpẹti nii. Ọ keghi wu vbe odaro e Nọyaẹnmwa." 
1Chronicles13:11 Ọre a na gha tie evba ni Pẹrẹs Uza ke ẹghẹ ni gha dee, ohu keghi kakabọ mu e Devid rhunmwuda izohu ọ re Nọyaẹnmwa na rria Uza ikhi." 
1Chronicles13:12 Ohan Osanobua keghi gha mu e Devid ọ na kha wẹẹ, “Vbe imẹ a ghi ra ye ya sẹtin mu Ẹkpẹti Ile gha khian hẹ nian?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Rhunmwuda ọnii, e Devid ma ghi mu ẹẹn gha rrie Jerusalẹm sokpan, ọ keghi sọrae ye owa Obẹd Idọm ne ovbi ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Gat." 
1Chronicles13:14 Ọ keghi gbe uki eha vbe evba. E Nọyaẹnmwa na fiangbe ẹgbẹe Obẹd Idọm kevbe emwi hia ni re ọghe ọe. 
1Chronicles14:1 E Hiram ne ọba e Taia keghi gie ukọ ẹki ne a do bu e Devid. Ọ keghi viọ erhan sida kevbe avbe igbokuta kevbe avbe owinna ne ẹẹn ne ọ ya bọ ẹguae. 
1Chronicles14:2 Evba ọre Devid na rẹn wẹ te Nọyaẹnmwa ka irẹn uhe ye aga zẹ vbe ọba Izrẹl, ọ Kevbe gie arriọba ẹre gha maa, rhunmwuda emwa rẹn." 
1Chronicles14:3 Ọ ghi sẹ Jerusalẹm, ẹ Devid keghi ye viọ ikhuo ni bun, ọ kevbe biẹlẹ emọ ikpia kevbe emọ ikhuo." 
1Chronicles14:4 E Jerusalẹm ọ re a na biẹlẹ avbe emọ na ne ẹẹn. Iran ọ re, Siama, Siobab, Natan, e Solomọn," 
1Chronicles14:5 Iba, Elisiua, Elpẹlẹt," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nẹfẹg, Jafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elisiama, Biliada kevbe Ẹlifẹlẹt." 
1Chronicles14:8 Avbe Filistin ghi họn ighẹ a ma e Devid ọba ọghe otọe Izrẹl hia, ivbiyokuo iran keghi ladian ne iran ya mu ẹẹn. Ẹre Devid na vbe ladian ne ọ ya vba iran." 
1Chronicles14:9 Ivbi e Filistin ghi sẹ Iya Refeim, iran keghi suẹn gha fu emwi viọ." 
1Chronicles14:10 E Devid keghi nọọn Osanobua wẹẹ, “Ne I gu iran gbinna ra, u gha gun mwẹ khọn miotọ ra.” E Nọyaẹnmwa keghi wanniẹn wẹẹ, “Ẹn, ya gu iran gbinna, I gha guẹ khọn miotọ!”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Ẹre Devid na dekun iran vbe Bal Pẹrazim, ọ na khọn miẹn iran otọ. Rẹn keghi kha wẹẹ, “Osanobua rhie mwẹ ya khọn la iyokuo eghian mwẹ gberra zẹ vbe orogho amẹ.” Ọre ọ zẹe ne a na tie evba ni Bal Pẹrazim." 
1Chronicles14:12 Avbe ivbi e Filistin ghi lẹ, iran na sẹ avbe amazẹ iran rae. Ẹre Devid na wẹ ne a giẹn iran uan." 
1Chronicles14:13 Ọ ma ghi vbe kpẹe, ivbi e Filistin keghi werriegbe gha die iya ni, iran na dọlegbe gha fu emwi viọ." 
1Chronicles14:14 E Devid kevbe nọ Osanobua, ọ keghi wanniẹn wẹẹ, “Ghẹ dekun iran vbe emwa, sokpan, lẹga ne u ya la obọ nọkpa dekun iran vbe ọkpẹn erhan balsam." 
1Chronicles14:15 U gha họn igiawẹ vbe uhunmwu erhan, u ghi dekun iran rhunmwuda I gha ke odaro ne uẹn ne I ya khọn iyokuo e Filistin muotọ.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 E Devid keghi ru vbene Osanobua khare, ọ na khulo ivbi e Filistin werriegbe ke Gibiọn kpao ya sẹ Gẹzẹ." 
1Chronicles14:17 Ẹmwẹ e Devid keghi titi gba ehe hia, e Nọyaẹnmwa keghi gie ohan rẹn gha mu agbọn ẹvbo hia." 
1Chronicles15:1 E Devid keghi bọlọ owa ọghe obọ ẹre ye Ẹvbo e Devid. Ọ na vbe dọlọ ihe eso yi ne Ẹkpẹti Ile ọghe Osanobua. Ọ na mu owa ukpọn yọ. 
1Chronicles15:2 Ẹre irẹn na kha wẹẹ, “Avbe Livai ọkpa ọ re ọ ra gha mu Ẹkpẹti Ile rhunmwuda, iran ọ re Nọyaẹnmwa zẹe ne ọ gha mu ẹẹn, ne iran vbe gha winna ne irẹn ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 E Devid keghi rhunmwuda ọnii tie ivbi Izrẹl hia gha die Jerusalẹm ne a miẹn ehe na mu Ẹkpẹti Ile gha die ehe ne a dọlọ yi ye otọ khẹ ọre. 
1Chronicles15:4 Vbe iyekọnii, ọ keghi gie ne a tie ivbi Errọn kevbe avbe Livai." 
1Chronicles15:5 Uriẹl keghi viọ arhin iyehan (120) ba egbe ke ẹe kevbe uniẹn ọghe Kohat ne Livai gha dee. 
1Chronicles15:6 Asaia keghi viọ arhin ugie yan uri (220) mwẹ obọ ke uniẹn Merari gha dee. 
1Chronicles15:7 E Joẹl keghi viọ arhin ọgban yan iyisẹn (130) mwẹ obọ ke uniẹn Gisiọn gha dee. 
1Chronicles15:8 Siemaia keghi viọ arhin uri (200) mwẹ obọ ke uniẹn Elizafan gha dee. 
1Chronicles15:9 Eliẹl keghi viọ arhin iyenẹ (80) mwẹ obọ ke uniẹn Hibrọn gha dee. 
1Chronicles15:10 Aminadab keghi viọ arhin iweva yan iyisẹn (112) mwẹ obọ ke uniẹn Uziẹl gha dee. 
1Chronicles15:11 E Devid keghi tie Zadọk kevbe Abiata ne ohẹn la owa, kevbe avbe Uriẹl, Asaia, Joẹl, Siemaia, Eliẹl kevbe Aminadab ne Livai." 
1Chronicles15:12 Ọ keghi tama avbe Livai na wẹẹ, “Wa ọrọre olotu avbe uniẹn avbe Livai, wa họnmwẹ egbe uwa kevbe ọghe Livai ne ihua uwa, ne uwa miẹn ehe na mu Ẹkpẹti Ile ọghe Nọyaẹnmwa Osanobua Izrẹl gha die ehe ne I dọlọyi ye otọ khẹ ọre." 
1Chronicles15:13 Rhunmwuda ne uwa i na rre evba ne uwa mu ẹẹn vbe okaro, e Nọyaẹnmwa ne Osanobua ima keghi rri ima oya ye ne ima ma na ga ẹe vbene ọ te ke yi.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Rhunmwuda ọnii, avbe Livai keghi ya họnmwegbe ne iran miẹn ehe na mu Ẹkpẹti Ile ọghe Nọyaẹnmwa ne Osanobua Izrẹl." 
1Chronicles15:15 Avbe Livai keghi ya erhan dada ẹe vbe izabọ zẹ vbene Nọyaẹnmwa la unu e Mosis tae. 
1Chronicles15:16 E Devid keghi tama olotu avbe Livai wẹ ne ọ zẹlẹ avbe Livai ne iran gha so ihuan kevbe ne iran vbe gha kpe akpata kevbe ukusẹ ọghe oghọghọ. 
1Chronicles15:17 Emwa ne iran zẹlẹe vbe uniẹn ne iran gha kpe avbe isẹ ẹrọnmwọ ọ re ena khin: E Heman ne ovbi e Joẹl, ọtiọnrẹn ighẹ Asaf ne ovbi e Berakia kevbe Etan ne ovbi e Kusiaia ne uniẹn e Merari. Iran kevbe zẹlẹ avbe Livai na ne iran ru iyobọ ne iran ni kpe akpata ne urhu ẹre ye ghẹnrẹn. Iran na ọrọre Zẹkaraia, Jaaziẹl, Siemiramot, Jẹhiẹl, Uni, Eliab, Maaseia kevbe Benaia. Avbe Livai ne iran zẹ ne ọ gha kpe akpata ne urhu ẹre ma vbe yo gbe ọre ena khin: Matitaia, Elifelehu, Mikneia, Azazaia deba Obẹd Idọm kevbe Jeiẹl ne ni khẹ Ọgua Osa." 
1Chronicles15:18  
1Chronicles15:19  
1Chronicles15:20  
1Chronicles15:21  
1Chronicles15:22 A keghi zẹẹ Kienanaia ne ọ gha re ọkaolotu avbe Livai ne ikpemaba rhunmwuda ọ mobọ guẹ emwi ne a kpe ẹsẹse. 
1Chronicles15:23 A keghi zẹlẹe Berakia kevbe Ẹlkana deba Obẹd Idọm kevbe Jehaia ne iran gha khẹ Ẹkpẹti Ile. A keghi zẹlẹ avbe ohẹn ighẹ e Siebanaia, e Josiafat, Netanẹl, Amasai, e Zẹkaraia, e Benaia kevbe Eliezẹ ne iran gha kpe okpe vbe odaro Ẹkpẹti Ile." 
1Chronicles15:24  
1Chronicles15:25 Ẹre Devid ne ọba, avbe olotu Izrẹl kevbe avbe ekaokuo nekhua na gha rrie owa Obẹd Idọm ne iran ya mu Ẹkpẹti Ile gha dee, iran keghi ru emwiukpo nọkhua." 
1Chronicles15:26 Iran keghi ye ẹmila ihinrọn kevbe ohuan ihinrọn zọ ese ne aro miẹn ehe na daa ẹe ighẹ Osanobua gha yi iran obọ ighẹ avbe Livai ni mu Ẹkpẹti nii. 
1Chronicles15:27 Etovbiohuẹ ne sẹguẹn ọre a ya do ẹwu ne Devid yọe, erriọ vbe nọ ne iran ni kpe ema, Kienanaia ne ọkaolotu iran kevbe avbe Livai ni mu nene Ẹkpẹti. E Devid keghi rhuan adaghọ." 
1Chronicles15:28 Ẹre ivbi Izrẹl hia na lele Ẹkpẹti Ile gha die Jerusalẹm deba uwemwẹ oghọghọ, kevbe urhu okpe, ẹkperẹ kevbe ukusẹ deba urhu akpata." 
1Chronicles15:29 Vbene a wa mu Ẹkpẹti nii la adesẹ ore ẹvbo, e Mikal ne ovbi e Sọl keghi rhie aro la ewindo ghe ẹre, ọ keghi ya dẹghe Devid ne ọba, ọ gha kuu, ọ gha vbọ yo vbọ rre ne oghọghọ, ẹmwẹ ọnrẹn keghi sọnnọ ẹn ruan." 
1Chronicles16:1 Iran keghi mu Ẹkpẹti Ile nii gha rrie ehe ne Devid ru ye otọ khẹ ọre, iran na mu ẹẹn ye uwu ẹre. Iran na zọ ese, iran na vbe sisara ghe Osanobua." 
1Chronicles16:2 E Devid ghi zọ ese nii fo nẹ, ọ keghi fiangbe emwa nii vbe eni e Nọyaẹnmwa, ọ na ghae evbare gba iran hia obọ." 
1Chronicles16:3 Ọ keghi rhie ne orhiọnkpọkpa vbe Izrẹl ke ikpia kevbe ikhuo, ududu ebrẹd ọkpọkpa, ikele emiowo ne a tọẹn, kevbe avbe ọmọ erhan eso." 
1Chronicles16:4 E Devid keghi zẹlẹ eso vbe uwu avbe e Livai ne iran ru ugamwẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa ne Osanobua Izrẹl vbe odaro Ẹkpẹti Ile nii, vbe ekpa ne iran gha na gha so ihuan rho ẹre." 
1Chronicles16:5 A keghi zẹ Asaf olotu iran, vbene Zẹkaraia na gha re ne ọ zẹ diake ẹe. E Jeiẹl, Siemiramot, e Jẹhiẹl, e Matitaia, Eliab, e Benaia, Obẹd Idọm kevbe Jeiẹl na gha re ni kpe akpata. Asaf ghi gha kpe isẹ." 
1Chronicles16:6 Avbe ohẹn eveva, e Benaia kevbe Jahaziẹl ghi gha kpe okpe vbe ẹghẹ ọre vbe odaro Ẹkpẹti Ile." 
1Chronicles16:7 Ẹghẹ nii ọ re Devid na mu ẹmwẹ ihuan ne a so ya rho e Nọyaẹnmwa ye Asaf kevbe avbe Livai ne ihuare obọ. 
1Chronicles16:8 Wa rhie ekpọnmwẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa, wa guan ẹmwẹ ukpọlọmwẹ ọnrẹn wa na iyẹn emwi ne ọ ru ma ẹvbo hia." 
1Chronicles16:9 Wa so ihuan urhomwẹ ghe Nọyaẹnmwa, ta emwi ọyunnuan ne ọ ru ladian." 
1Chronicles16:10 Wa ghọghọ wẹ ọghe ọe ma khin. wa gi emwa ni ga ẹe hia gha ghọghọ. 
1Chronicles16:11 Wa bu e Nọyaẹnmwa ya nọ ẹre iyobọ wa vbe gha ga ẹe vbe ne a i na dobọyi. 
1Chronicles16:12 Wa ne ivbi uniẹn Jekọb, ọguọmwadia Osanobua, ivbi uniẹn Izrẹl ne Nọyaẹnmwa hannọ zẹ wa ye iwinna ọyunnuan ne Osanobua winnaẹn rre kevbe ohiẹn ne ọ buru." 
1Chronicles16:13  
1Chronicles16:14 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọrọre Osanobua mwa, iyi ẹre, ọghe otọ agbọn hia nọ." 
1Chronicles16:15 Wa ghẹ ta mianmian ile ọghe Nọyaẹnmwa, ne irẹn tae ne ọ gha rrọọ etẹbitẹ." 
1Chronicles16:16 Ile ne ọ gu Ebraham ta, emwi ne ọ ve Aizik re." 
1Chronicles16:17 E Nọyaẹnmwa gu e Jekọb ta ile, egbe ne ọ gha rrọọ rhinrin ẹdẹ." 
1Chronicles16:18 “I gha mu otọ Kenan nuẹn ọwuẹ ra gha nọ.” Erriọ ọ re ọ tae. 
1Chronicles16:19 Ibozẹghẹ ọ re emwa e Nọyaẹnmwa gha khin orhunmwuyẹn vbe otọe Kenan. 
1Chronicles16:20 Iran kpolugho ke ẹvbo ọkpa gha rrie ọvbehe, ke otọe arriọba ọkpa gha rrie ọvbehe." 
1Chronicles16:21 Sokpan, Osanobua ma gie ọmwarhọkpa kpokpo iran, ne ọ ya tan ifuẹn ga iran, ọ yobọ sekhae ne avbe ọba wẹẹ:" 
1Chronicles16:22 “Ghẹ kuan ọguọmwadia ni zẹe, ghẹ yobọ kan avbe akhasẹ mwẹ.”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Wa so ihuan ne Nọyaẹnmwa, wa otọ agbọn hia wa gha na iyẹn ne ọ maa ni ẹdẹgbegbe wẹ, ọ miẹn ima fan nẹ." 
1Chronicles16:24 Wa ta ẹmwẹ uyi ẹre ma uhunmwu ẹvbo hia kevbe iwinna rẹn nekhua ma avbe emwa hia. 
1Chronicles16:25 E Nọyaẹnmwa kpolo, ne a kakabọ rho nọ te a ra gha rhie uyi ne ẹẹn sẹ avbe ẹbọ hia." 
1Chronicles16:26 Ẹbọ avbe agbọn ẹvbo nekpa hia, amazẹ kẹkan nọ sokpan e Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ yi avbe ẹrinmwi." 
1Chronicles16:27 Uyi kevbe ẹtin lẹga ẹre ẹtin kevbe oghọghọ vuọn Ọgua Osa ẹre. 
1Chronicles16:28 Emwa hia ni rre agbọn, wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa, rho uyi kevbe ẹtin ẹnrẹn." 
1Chronicles16:29 Wa rho eni e Nọyaẹnmwa ne ọ mwẹ uyi wa zẹ ọhẹ rre, ne uwa gha die Ọgua Osa ẹre wa ya uhunmwu rhanmwẹ otọ ne Nọyaẹnmwa, vbe ọ gha ladian vbe uhuanmwẹ ọnrẹn." 
1Chronicles16:30 Wa gha guọ vbe odaro ẹre, agbọn na hia a mu ẹkun agbọn sẹ otọ nẹ gbain vbe ihe ẹre a i ghi sẹtin vbọe ọvbehe." 
1Chronicles16:31 Wa gha ghọghọ otọ kevbe iso wa tama agbọn ẹvbo hia ighẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọba! 
1Chronicles16:32 Wa gha vannọ, okun kevbe emwi ni rre uwu uwa wẹ!" 
1Chronicles16:33 Erhan ne oha hia gha davan ne oghọghọ vbe odaro e Nọyaẹnmwa, vbe ọ gha rre do rriọba yan agbọn." 
1Chronicles16:34 Wa rhie ekpọnmwẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa, rhunmwuda ọ maa; etẹbitẹ ọ re aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa rẹn khin." 
1Chronicles16:35 Wa tama rẹn wẹẹ, “Miẹn ima fan Osanobua Ọmiọnmwafan mwa si ima koko; ne u miẹn mwa fan vbe obọ agbọn ẹvbo nii ne ima miẹn ehe na gha kpọnmwẹ ne a vbe gha rho eni ruẹn ne ọ huanrẹn.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Rho e Nọyaẹnmwa ne Osanobua Izrẹl wa rho ẹre nia kevbe rhinrin ẹdẹ! Ẹre emwa ni hia na kha wẹẹ, “Ise,” iran na rho e Nọyaẹnmwa." 
1Chronicles16:37 E Devid ne ọba keghi wa rhie Asaf kevbe avbe Livai ne ihua ẹre yọ fẹẹrẹ ighẹ ugamwẹ ne a ru vbe ehe ne a mu Ẹkpẹti Ile yi. Te a wẹ ne iran gha winna iwinna iran vbe evba ẹdẹgbegbe. 
1Chronicles16:38 Obẹd Idọm ne ovbi e Jedutun, deba arhin eva irrọ vbekigbe siyenẹ ọvbehe vbe uniẹn ọnrẹn kegha re ni ru iyobọ. E Hosa kevbe Obẹd Idọm kegha re ni khẹ onurho." 
1Chronicles16:39 Sokpan, e Zadọk ne ohẹn kevbe avbe ohẹn ne ihua ẹre kegha re ni yan ugamwẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa vbe he ne a na ga vbe Gibiọn." 
1Chronicles16:40 Iran ghi gha giẹn ohoho ese vbe uhunmwu Ogiukpo vbe owiẹ kevbe ota hia, zẹ vbene a gbẹn ọẹn ye uhi ne Nọyaẹnmwa gbẹn ne ivbi Izrẹl." 
1Chronicles16:41 E Heman kevbe Jedutun keghi wa gu iran gha rre evba, deba emwa ọvbehe ne a wa hannọ ne iran gha so ihuan ne Nọyaẹnmwa rhunmwuda aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa ẹnrẹn ọghe etẹbitẹ." 
1Chronicles16:42 E Heman kevbe Jedutun ọ re ọ vbe gha gbearoghe avbe okpe kevbe isẹ kevbe emwi ne a kpe ọvbehe ni dekẹ hia ne a kpee vbe a gha so ihuan urhomwẹ. Ivbi uniẹn Jedutun ọ re ọ gha gbe aro ghe avbe onurho. 
1Chronicles16:43 Ẹre dọmwadẹ ọghọe na gha rri owa. E Devid kevbe gha rrie owa ne ọ vbe ya tota ke emwa rẹn vbe omwa ẹghẹ eso. 
1Chronicles17:1 Ẹguae ẹre ọ re Devid gha ye vbe ẹghẹ na. Ọ ghi sẹ ẹdẹ ọkpa, o keghi gie ne a tama e Natan wẹẹ, “Ghe nian, owa sida mẹ ye vbe emwa na, sokpan Ẹkpẹti Ile Nọyaẹnmwa rre Owa Ukpọn.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 E Natan keghi wanniẹn wẹẹ, “Ru emwi ne uwẹ a rhirhi mwamwa vbe ekhọe ruẹ rhunmwuda, Osanobua rrọọ yaba ruẹ.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Sokpan, asọn ni e Nọyaẹnmwa tama e Natan wẹẹ," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Gha khian ya tama e Devid ne ọguọmwadia mwẹ wẹ I tama rẹn wẹẹ, ‘Ẹ i re uwẹ ọ gha bọ Ọgua Osa mẹ ne I gha dia." 
1Chronicles17:5 Ke ẹghẹ ne I ya fan Izrẹl vbe irri gha dee do sẹ ẹdẹnẹrẹ na, I ma he di Ọgua Osa ya, uwu owa ukpọn ọre I gha dia, I ghi vbe gha si ke ihe ọkpa la ọvbehe." 
1Chronicles17:6 Vbe uwu okhian ne I he lele ivbi Izrẹl khian, I ma he nọ ọmwa rhọkpa vbe uwu avbe olotu ne I zẹe wẹ vbọzẹ ne iran ma na he ya sida bọ Ọgua Osa mẹ.’" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Rhunmwuda ọnii, tama e Devid ne ọguọmwadia mwẹ wẹ mẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa ne Oghodua, ọ re ọ tama rẹn wẹẹ, ‘I rhie ruẹ ke ehe ne u na su ohuan vbe oha ladian, I na ya ru enọkhaemwisẹ yan Izrẹl ne emwa mwẹ." 
1Chronicles17:8 I mudia kuẹ vbe ehe ne u he la hia, I kevbe gha khọn avbe eghian ruẹn muotọ zẹ vbene u ya nana sikẹ odaro. I gha ya uwẹ hin usi zẹ vbe avbe ọkaolotu ne ọ he kpọlọ sẹẹ vbe agbọn na." 
1Chronicles17:9 I zẹ ihe ọkpa ne Izrẹl ne emwa mwẹ nẹ, I vbe gbe iran ẹkun sẹ otọ nẹ vbe evba, ehe ne iran ra gha ye vbene a i ghi na vbe zẹ iran kpokpo ọvbehe. Ke ne iran ya la otọ na gha dee, ọ re emwa ni khọn ke ya gha gu iran gbinna, sokpan, egbọre i ghi ra dọlegbe sunu ọvbehe. I yan rẹn ighẹ I gha khọn avbe eghian ruẹn hia muotọ, I gha vbe viọ emọ nuẹn." 
1Chronicles17:10  
1Chronicles17:11 Wẹ ghẹ ghi wu nẹ, a na vbe re ruẹ ba avbe erha a odede, I gha ya ọkpa vbe uwu ivbuẹ rriọba. I ghi ya arriọba ẹre owẹ muotọ ne ọ wegbe." 
1Chronicles17:12 Rẹn ọ re ọ gha bọ Ọgua Osa mẹ, I gha ru ẹe ne a miẹn wẹ uniẹn ni rriọba ọghe ọe ghi gha khian rhinrin ẹdẹ." 
1Chronicles17:13 Mẹ ghi gha re erha ẹe, rẹn ghi vbe gha re ovbi mwẹ, mẹ i ra rhie obọ hin ẹre iyeke rre vbene I ru e Sọl ne I rhie hin evba rre, ne uwẹ miẹn ehe na do rriọba." 
1Chronicles17:14 I gha viọ emwa mwẹ ye ọre obọ deba arriọba mwẹ ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ. Uniẹn ni rriọba ọghe ọe, ẹ i ra fo ẹdẹ.’ ”" 
1Chronicles17:15 E Natan keghi na iyẹn emwi hia ne Osanobua rhie ma rẹn ma e Devid. 
1Chronicles17:16 Ẹre Devid ne ọba na la uwu owa ukpọn ne a ya rẹn ighẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa rre evba, ọ keghi tota, ọ na na erhunmwu wẹẹ, “E Nọyaẹnmwa Osanobua, emwi hia ne u he ru mẹ ma zẹdẹ khẹ ke mwẹ ra ẹgbẹe mwẹ." 
1Chronicles17:17 Levba sevba, te u ye ru yan. U yan ye otọ vbe ekpa ivbi uniẹn mwẹ vbe ọghe ẹdẹ nakhuẹ, kevbe wanwanna nian e Nọyaẹnmwa ne Osanobua, obọ ne a ya mu ọmwa ne ọ kpọlọ ọ re u ya mu mwẹ." 
1Chronicles17:18 De emwi ne I ghẹ ghi ye tama ruẹn nian. U wa rẹn mwẹ ẹsẹse, sevba, u keghi rhie ọghọ mẹ, mẹ ne ọguọmwadia ruẹ." 
1Chronicles17:19 Te ọ yẹ ruẹ u na zẹẹ ọe vbe iro ne u ru emwi na mẹ wẹ ne u rhie vbene I gha kpọlọ hẹ vbe ẹdẹ nakhuẹ ma mwẹ. 
1Chronicles17:20 Nọyaẹnmwa, ọmwa ne ọ yevbe uwẹ i rrọọ. Ma wa rẹn ke otọe gha dee ighẹ wẹ ọkpa ọrọre Osanobua." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ẹvbo ọvbehe ne ọ yevbe Izrẹl i rre agbọn na, emwa ne uwẹ viọ hin ọviẹn rre ne u miẹn ehe na ya iran ru emwa ruẹn. Emwi nekhua kevbe ni yan ọmwa unu uan ne u ru ne iran, ye otiti ruẹ gba otọe agbọn hia. U fan emwa ruẹn vbe irri vbe Igipt, u kegha khulo agbọn ẹvbo ọvbehe ladian vbene iran ya nana ghe odaro." 
1Chronicles17:22 U ya Izrẹl khian emwa ruẹn nẹ ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ, wẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa keghi khian Osanobua iran." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Banbanna nian, e Nọyaẹnmwa, eyan nu u yan rẹn vbe ekpa mwẹ kevbe uniẹn mwẹ, U ghi mu ẹẹn sẹ rhinrin ẹdẹ, ne u ru vbene u tae ighẹ u gha ru." 
1Chronicles17:24 Otiti ruẹ gha kpolo, emwa hia ghi vbe gha kha rhinrin ẹdẹ wẹẹ, ‘E Nọyaẹnmwa ne Oghodua ọrọre Osanobua iran ne ivbi Izrẹl.’ We gha vbe rhie uniẹn ọba mwẹ lẹre rhinrin ẹdẹ." 
1Chronicles17:25 I mwẹ udinmwẹ ne I na erhunmwu na ghe ruẹ, Osanobua mwẹ rhunmwuda, u rhie avbe emwi na hia ma mwẹ, mẹ ne ọguọmwadia ruẹ, u kevbe tama mwẹ wẹ u gha ye avbe ivbi uniẹn mwẹ ma ọba." 
1Chronicles17:26 Wẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa ọrọre Osanobua, u kevbe yan eyan ọyunnuan vbenian ma mwẹ." 
1Chronicles17:27 Te I rinmwian wẹ ne u fiangbe ivbi uniẹn mwẹ, ne iran miẹn ehe na gha miẹn aro ne ọ maa ruẹn. Wẹ Nọyaẹnmwa fiangbe iran nẹ, afiangbe ruẹ gha rhuẹ yan iran ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Ọ ghi kpee fua kherhe, e Devid ne ọba keghi dọlegbe mu okuo gie ivbi e Filistin, ọ na khọn miẹn iran otọ. Ọ keghi mu e Gat kevbe igue ni lẹga ẹre hin ototọ ase iran rre." 
1Chronicles18:2 Ọ keghi khọn ivbi e Moab, iran na gha ga gie ẹe." 
1Chronicles18:3 Vbe iyeke ọnii, e Devid keghi mu okuo gie Hadadezẹ ne ọba otọ e Siria ni rre Zọba vbe ọkpẹn otọ e Hama rhunmwuda, e Hadadezẹ keghi te gha ho ne ọ la odẹ uhunmwu e Yufretes la otọe ni do gha kha yan rẹn." 
1Chronicles18:4 E Devid keghi khọn mu arriaisẹn (1,000) vbe avbe ikẹkẹ okuo ẹre deba iran ni hin ẹsin arriaisẹn ihinrọn (7,000) kevbe ivbiyokuo ni ye owẹ khian arriaisẹn ugie (20,000). Ọ keghi viọ ẹsin ni gha sẹtin si ikẹkẹ okuo iyisẹn (100) ye otọ, ọ na kun ni ghi dekẹe hia use." 
1Chronicles18:5 Ugbẹn vbe ivbi e Siria ni rre Damaskọs ghi gie ivbiyokuo ne iran ya ye Hadadezẹ ne ọba obọ, e Devid ne ọba keghi dekun iran, ọ na gbele arhin arriaisẹn evayan ugie (22,000) vbọ." 
1Chronicles18:6 Iyeke ọnii, ọ keghi bu agọ ivbiyokuo ye ẹvbo iran, iran na khian emwa ni rre ototọ ẹre, iran na gha ga gie ẹe. E Nọyaẹnmwa keghi gie obọ e Devid gha ke odukhunmwu vbe ehe hia." 
1Chronicles18:7 E Devid keghi khọn mu avbe asa igoru ne ewọe e Hadadezẹ viọ re, ọ na hẹ iran werriegbe gha rrie Jerusalẹm." 
1Chronicles18:8 Ọ keghi vbe kun oze ọrhẹnrhẹn vbe Tibhat kevbe Kun, ne ẹvbo ne Hadadezẹ gbearoghe, gha rrie. (Avbe oze nii ọ re Solomọn ghi ya ru ẹgbẹdin nọkhua, ke orre kevbe avbe ọkpan ne a lọ vbe Ọgua Osa.)" 
1Chronicles18:9 E Toi ne ọba Hamat keghi họn wẹ e Devid wa khọn ivbiyokuo e Hadadezẹ hia muotọ. 
1Chronicles18:10 Ọ keghi rhunmwuda ọnii gie Joram ne ovbi ẹre ne ọ ya wẹ e Devid ne ọba do, ne ọ vbe gu ẹe ghọghọ ye ne obọ ẹre na ke ukhunmwu ne Hadadezẹ ne irẹn vbe Toi he ka gba gbinna yi inugba ne ọ khin. E Joram keghi viọ emwi ihaoko ne a ya igoru, esiliva kevbe oze ru gie Devid." 
1Chronicles18:11 E Devid na ya ehia fi ohan ne a ya gha ru ugamwẹ, deba avbe igoru kevbe esiliva ne ọ viọ kevbe avbe ẹvbo ne ọ khọn rẹn gha dee, avbe Idọm, e Moab, Amọn, Filistia kevbe Amalẹk." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abisiai ne a tie eni iye ẹe Zeruaia keghi khọn ivbi Idọm vbe Iya Umwẹ, ọ na gbele arriaisẹn evairrọvbugie (18,000) vbe uwu iran." 
1Chronicles18:13 Ọ na bu agọ ivbiyokuo lele ehe hia vbe Idọm. Iran ni rre evba keghi do gha ga gie Devid ne Ọba. E Nọyaẹnmwa keghi gie Devid gha khọnmiotọ vbe ehe hia. 
1Chronicles18:14 E Devid keghi rriọba yan otọ Izrẹl hia. Ọ keghi ru ẹe ne a miẹn wẹ a ya obọ esi gha mu emwa hia vbe ne a i na vbe zẹ ọmwarhọkpa ẹkpe. 
1Chronicles18:15 E Joab ne ọtẹn Abisiai kegha re ọkaokuo nọkhua yan ivbiyokuo, e Jehosiafat ne ovbi Ahilud kegha re ne ọ sin emwi hia ẹro." 
1Chronicles18:16 E Zadọk ne ovbi Ahitub kevbe Ahimẹlẹk ne ovbi Abiata, kegha re ohẹn, e Seraia kegha re ọgbenbe ẹguae." 
1Chronicles18:17 E Benaia ne ovbi e Jehoiada kegha re ọkaolotu iran ne Devid ya khẹ egbe, ivbi e Devid ni ikpia kevbe gha rre ukpo ni yo vbe oga ọba ẹre." 
1Chronicles19:1 Ọ ghi kpee fua kherhe, e Nahas ne ọba Amọn keghi wu, e Hanun ne ovbi ẹre na rriọba." 
1Chronicles19:2 E Devid ne ọba keghi kha wẹẹ, “I gha kpe iku gie Hanun zẹ vbene imẹ vbe erha ẹe vba gha ye.” E Devid keghi rhunmwuda ọnii gie emwa ya gbe ọdamwẹ ne ẹẹn. Iran ghi sẹ Amọn, vbe iran ghi ya miẹn Hanun ne ọba Amọn." 
1Chronicles19:3 Avbe ọkaolotu Amọn ke tama ọba wẹẹ, “Te uwẹ ro wẹ te Devid gie emwa na do miẹn ọẹn rhunmwuda ne ọ na ya ọghọ ne erha a? Te ọ gie iran rre zẹ vbe ọrhẹ ne iran do ghe otọe na ghe ne ọ miẹn ehe na do khọn rẹn!”" 
1Chronicles19:4 E Hanun na munọ emwa ne Devid gie ẹre uhunmwu, ọ na gbẹn iran ẹtu kua, ọ na giagia ẹwu iran la ẹkun, ọ na wẹ ne iran gha rrie." 
1Chronicles19:5 Ekhue ma gie iran rrie. E Devid ghi họn emwi ne ọ sunu, ọ keghi gie ne a khama iran wẹ ne iran yakọ vbe Jẹriko, ne iran ghẹ he rre vbẹ i re te ẹtu iran sọn nẹ." 
1Chronicles19:6 E Hanun ne ọba kevbe emwa Amọn rẹnrẹn wẹ iran ho ẹ Devid ẹmwẹ nẹ iran keghi rhunmwuda ọnii zẹ uwan esiliva ne ọ sẹ omwa etọni iyeva ne iran hae ya mọmọ ikẹkẹ okuo kevbe emwa ni hin ẹnrẹn vbo obọ Mẹsopotamia ne ọ ke odọọ kevbe Maka kevbe Zọba ne ẹvbo ni rre otọe Siria. 
1Chronicles19:7 Ikẹkẹ okuo arriaisẹn evayan ọgban (32,000) ne iran mọmọ ẹn deba ivbiyokuo ọba ọghe Maka keghi bu agọ ye ọkpẹn Mẹdeba. Ivbi Amọn hia kevbe ke ẹvbo iran hia ladian iran na mu egbe igbinna." 
1Chronicles19:8 E Devid ghi họn emwi ne ọ sunu khian, ọ na gie Joab kevbe ivbiyokuo hia gha khian." 
1Chronicles19:9 Ivbi Amọn keghi ladian, iran na ya ghae ye unu odẹ ne a la la Raba ne ọre igiogbe ẹvbo iran, avbe ọba ni do yi iran obọ keghi ya ghae ye oha ne ọvbẹ aro." 
1Chronicles19:10 E Joab ghi miẹn wẹ avbe eghian gha la irẹn aro la iyeke rre, ọ keghi hannọ iran ni maa sẹ vbe ivbiyokuo Izrẹl, ọ keghi viọ iran ye ehe ne iran na mu aro da ivbi e Siria."
