Job2:9 Amwẹ ọnrẹn keghi tama rẹn wẹẹ, “Te u ye sikan mu ẹẹn vbe ne u ye de ẹdẹ, u he tie ihẹn ne Osanobua ne u wu?”" 
Job2:10 E Job keghi wanniẹn wẹẹ, “Ẹmwẹ oya ọ re ọ ke unu ẹn ladian. Osanobua gha rhie emwi ne ọ maa giẹ ọmwa, ma ghi ye oghọghọ miẹn ẹnrẹn. Vbọzẹ ne a gha na gha gui ẹzọ uwunu a deghẹ ọ giẹ ọlọghọmwa rre?” Vbene ọlọghọmwa na wegbe sẹ, e Job ma fi unu giẹ Osanobua. Avbe Ihua E Job Rre" 
Job2:11 Eha vbe uwu avbe se ne Job mwẹ keghi re, Ẹlifaz ne ovbi ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Tẹman, e Bildad ne ovbi e Siua kevbe Zofa ne ovbi e Naama. Iran ghi họn vbene emwi ba so e Job hẹẹ, iran na wẹ iran ra ya fu ẹre ẹko rre." 
Job2:12 Urria iran he ye vbe iran bẹghe Job sokpan iran ma ghi rẹn ọnrẹn. Ẹghẹ ne iran ghi ya rẹn ọnrẹn, iran keghi gbe akhe eve ua, iran na yanghan ukpọn ye egbe iran ẹkun, iran na gha zẹ ebubẹ fi, iran na gha kpolo ye uhunmwu." 
Job2:13 Iran keghi gu ẹe tota ye otọ vba la avan ihinrọn kevbe asọn ihinrọn vbene iran ma na guan hiehiere rhunmwuda, iran miẹn wẹ obọ ọlọghọmwa ni da ẹe ẹsẹse." 
Job3:1 Vbe okiekie, e Job keghi rhan unu ẹnrẹn, ọ na guan, ọ keghi ya amẹ unu ne ẹdẹ ne a biẹ ọe. E Job keghi kha wẹẹ," 
Job3:2 “Osanobua, fi ẹde ne a biẹ mwẹ unu. Fi ẹre unu ighẹ asọn ne a hanmwa mwẹ." 
Job3:3  
Job3:4 Osanobua fi ẹdẹ nẹdẹrriọ werriẹ khian ebiebi. Ghẹ dọlegbe ye ẹdẹ nẹdẹrriọ rre. Ghẹ giẹ uwanmwẹ dọlegbe wan yọ. 
Job3:5 Gi ẹe khian ẹdẹ akhiẹ kevbe ebiebi ne ọ mwẹ imi, ye okuku amẹ gue ẹre, ne u khiẹn owẹn fua vbọ." 
Job3:6 Khiẹn ẹdẹ nẹdẹrriọ hin ukpo rre, ghẹ giẹ a ghi ka ẹe ba ẹre ọvbehe." 
Job3:7 Ya ẹe khian asọn ọ dihoi rua ne ọyẹnmwẹ i ye. 
Job3:8 Tama avbe oso ya amẹ unu ne ẹdẹ nẹdẹrriọ, iran ni mwẹ asẹ vbe uhunmwu avbe Ugbogiorinmwi amẹ." 
Job3:9 Ghẹ giẹ orhọnmwẹ owiẹ wan uwanmwẹ yọ, rhie idaehọ ẹdẹgbegbe hin asọn nii rre." 
Job3:10 Fi asọn nii unu, ne ọ na giẹ a biẹ mwẹ, ne a na do rhie mwẹ uhunmwu da oya vbe usẹ." 
Job3:11 “Vbọ rrọọ akpawẹ uwu ẹko iye mwẹ ọre, I wu yi, ra ne I lahin rre vbe a wa da biẹ mwẹ." 
Job3:12 Vbọzẹ ne iye mwẹ na mu mwẹ yan iguẹ? Vbọzẹ ne ọ na vbe gha ya mẹ wẹn. 
Job3:13 Akpawẹ te I wu, uwu ikẹtin ọ re I ghẹ gha ye nian," 
Job3:14 I ghẹ ghi gha vbiẹ zẹ vbe avbe ọba kevbe irriegie, ni dọlọ ẹguae ẹghẹ nẹdẹ bọ," 
Job3:15 I ghẹ ghi gha vbiẹ zẹ vbe ivbiọba, ni ya igoru kevbe esiliva vuọn owa iran." 
Job3:16 Ra ne I gha vbiẹ vbe ọmọ ne ọkpa ma gbe ifuẹn na," 
Job3:17 Uwu idin ọ re emwa dan na dobọ iba yi. Iran ne iwinna wọ ẹre egbe ghi miẹn ehe na hẹwẹ. 
Job3:18 Ọfumwegbe ghi sẹ avbe oleghan obọ, iran fe vbe obọ uvannọmwẹ kevbe uhunmwu ọkpannike." 
Job3:19 Agbọn hia rre evba, iran ni hin usi kevbe ne a ma rẹn, avbe eviẹn ghi do khian ni yan egbe iran." 
Job3:20 “Vbọzẹ ne a na giẹ emwa gha tọ ye usẹ yi? Ne a na vbe rhie uwanmwẹ ne nọ khiẹ? 
Job3:21 Iran gha khẹ uwu sokpan iran i miẹn. Idin ọ re ọ ghi yẹ iran sẹ emwi ighobioye hia. 
Job3:22 Iran imwẹ ẹko nọ rhiẹnrhiẹn vbe ẹ i re te iran wu nẹ ne a re iran. 
Job3:23 Osanobua mu aro ye ẹmwẹ ẹdẹnakhuẹ iran. ọ na gba ogba ga iran egbe hia. 
Job3:24 Evbare I gha te re, sokpan I gha khiẹ, mẹ i sẹtin dobọ ikhiẹkhiegbe yi." 
Job3:25 Emwi hia ne ohan rẹn mu mwẹ, kevbe ne afianma rẹn fian mwẹ hia do sunu." 
Job3:26 Ọfumwegbe i rrọ, ikẹtin irrọ mẹ. Ọlọghọmwa mwẹ i vbe mwẹ ufomwẹ.”" 
Job4:1 Ẹre Ẹlifaz ne ovbi ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Tẹman na wanniẹn, ọ wẹẹ, “E Job ohu gha muẹn ra adeghẹ I guan yọ? Mẹ i ghi sẹtin hunwan sẹ ọna." 
Job4:2  
Job4:3 Emwa ni bun ọ re uwẹ he ma ẹre emwi, u keghi vbe rhie ẹtin ye obọ ne ọ luẹluẹe iwu." 
Job4:4 Ọmwa gha ye mitanmitan, egbe na wọ ẹre, ọ na de, ẹmwẹ unu ruẹn ọ re ọ rhie ẹtin ne ẹẹn ne ọ guakpao vbe otọ." 
Job4:5 Eban nian, ọlọghọmwa nii, sẹ uwẹ egbe. Egbe ẹre kan an sẹrriọ wẹ u i ho ne u ziengbe ẹre." 
Job4:6 U ga Osanobua, uyinmwẹ ruẹn ma vbe gha mwẹ okan. Rhunmwuda ọnii, ọ kere ne u gha mwẹ ekhọe ne ọ sotọ kevbe idaehọ." 
Job4:7 Ya ekhọe gua sẹ ọe ghe, sunu ye igiemwi ọkpa, ọghe ọmwa esi ne ọkhọ rruan rẹn." 
Job4:8 Mẹ miẹn emwa ni gua ugbo ọkhọ nẹ, iran na kọ uyinmwẹ ika zẹ vbe emwi okọ, eban nian, emwi ne iran rhọ ọrọre ọkhọ kevbe emwi dan." 
Job4:9 Osanobua keghi ya ohu ẹre fuẹn iran an zẹ vbe okpẹhoho. 
Job4:10 Emwa dan gha vannọ, iran gbọọ zẹvbe oduma, sokpan Osanobua gue unu iran, ọ kevbe kpannọ iran akọn kua." 
Job4:11 Zẹ vbe oduma ne ọ ma miẹn emwi gbe ne ọ re, iran wulo, ivbi iran keghi zagha kua." 
Job4:12 “Ẹghẹ ọkpa, a keghi giẹ uhunmwu urhu nekhuẹrhẹ rre. Ọ khuẹrhẹ sẹrriọ wẹ I ma te ra họn ẹẹn." 
Job4:13 Ọ yevbe imina dan, ọ ma gunmwẹ ghi miẹn ovbe." 
Job4:14 I kegha guọ, I na ki rre. Egbe mwẹ hia kegha mian kpẹkpẹkpẹ rhunmwuda ohan." 
Job4:15 Ẹhoho ne wẹlẹ hoho yọ mwẹ aro. Ohan keghi ye egbe rrirri mwẹ. 
Job4:16 I bẹghe vbe emwi ọkpa mudia vbe evba, I ziẹn aro yọ, sokpan I ma rẹn emwi ne ọ khin, I keghi họn urhu ọkpa ke uwu e hii nii rre." 
Job4:17 ‘Ọmwa gha sẹtin gha re ọmwata vbe odaro Osanobua ra? Ra ne ẹ i mwẹ iruẹn vbe odaro Ayi ne ọ yi ẹe? 
Job4:18 Osanobua i mu ẹtin yan avbe ewọe ẹrinmwi ẹnrẹn, uhin ighẹ ọ yevbe miẹn abakuru vbe obọ avbe odibo ẹre." 
Job4:19 Wẹ yayi ighẹ ọ gha mu ẹtin yan emwi ne a ye obuẹ ma? Emwi ne a ye ebubẹ ru, ne ọ giẹ a lọkọ ua zẹ vbe arriukpa?" 
Job4:20 Ọmwa sẹtin gha rre agbọn vbe owiẹ, vbe ọ te sẹ ota, ọ ghi wu vbe ne ọmwa rhọkpa i na rẹn" 
Job4:21 A ghi miẹn ẹre emwi hia ne ọ te mwẹ; ọ wu vbe ne ẹ i na ye mwẹ ẹwaẹn.’ ” 
Job5:1 “Go tie emwa nian, e Job. Ghe ẹre ghe, adeghẹ ọmwa rhọkpa gha khuẹnniẹn? Odibosa ọkpa rrọọ ne u gha lẹgbinna ra?" 
Job5:2 Ne ọmwa, rhunmwuda ighẹ emwi sọnnọ ẹn, kpokpo egbe ya uhunmwu yọ, uyinmwẹ ukọnmwẹ akpa vbe abobo ọre nọ." 
Job5:3 I miẹn avbe akpa eso, ne ọ yevbe ne ẹkun wa sẹ ọre otọ yi. Sokpan, i keghi tie ihẹn udomwurri ye owa iran." 
Job5:4 Ivbi iran i sẹtin gha rrọ vbe a i mwẹ ẹbe; a i miẹn ne ọ mudia gui ẹzọ iran vbe iko. 
Job5:5 Emwa ohanmwẹ ọ re ọ khian rri emwiokọ akpa, ya sẹ egbe avbe ọka ne ọ zọ vbe uwu igban, emwa ne ovbamẹ gbe ghi yaro ye ẹfe ẹre." 
Job5:6 Ọkhọ i zọ vbe otọe, ẹ i re uwu otọ ọ re ukpokpo ke zọ rre." 
Job5:7 Ẹn o! Ọmwa ọ re ọ si ẹti ye egbe ẹre urhu, vbene ogiọnmwẹ erhẹn kpannọ ke uwu erhẹn ladian." 
Job5:8 “Akpawẹ mẹ ọrọre uwẹ, I ghẹ hẹko sikẹ Osanobua I gha gui ẹzọ mwẹ ma rẹn." 
Job5:9 Ma i sẹtin rẹn iwinna nọkhua ne ọ winna, iwinna ọyunnuan ẹnrẹn i vbe mwẹ ufomwẹ." 
Job5:10 Ọ ghi rhọ amẹ ye otọe nii. Ọ ghi gbe amẹ khakha uwu oha. 
Job5:11 Vbe ẹmwata, Osanobua ọ re ọ tọn ọmẹhẹ mu, ọ ghi vbe rhie oghọghọ ne ni khiẹ hia." 
Job5:12 Ọ ghi duẹ emwamwa emwa ero ua. Ọ ghi ya ifi ne umẹwaẹn khuẹn muẹn sẹrriọ wẹ, a i miẹn ọ dunnaẹn vbe iwinna iran." 
Job5:13  
Job5:14 Iran ghi gha ye obọ baba odẹ vbe ogiavan. 
Job5:15 Sokpan, Osanobua ghi miẹn ovbiogue fan vbe obọ uwu, ọ ghi miẹn ne ẹ i mwẹ fan vbe obọ iran ni zẹ ọre owẹ." 
Job5:16 Ọ rhie idaehọ ne ovbiogue. Ọ gue ọmwa dan unu. 
Job5:17 “Afiangbe nọ ne ọmwa ne Osanobua dia ye odẹ, ọ gha guẹ gui, ghẹ khiẹkhiẹ egbe yọ." 
Job5:18 Osanobua ọ re ọ vbe gba ẹwẹn ne irẹn fiaẹn. Obọ ẹre gha kuan ruẹn, obọ ẹre ọ vbe sinmwi uẹn." 
Job5:19 Kugbakẹghẹrẹ ọ re ọ ya miẹn ruẹn fan hin ikuan egbe rre. 
Job5:20 Ukhunmwu gha rre, ọ gha daa yi ye agbọn, kevbe ẹghẹ okuo, ọ ghi degue ruẹ, hin obọ uwu." 
Job5:21 Osanobua gha miẹn ruẹn fan vbe obọ ovinzẹ, ọ gha miẹn ruẹn fan vbe ọfuan a rre." 
Job5:22 U gha ye ohanmwẹ kevbe piankhanrhan gbe ogie afianma aranmwẹ akọn i ra vbe fian an. 
Job5:23 A i ra miẹn okuta vbe oha ne u na mu ugbo, aranmwẹ akọn i ra vbe guẹ gbinna." 
Job5:24 Ẹghẹ nii, u ghi gha rre irhu ruẹ vbe ọfumwegbe; u gha ya ghe ohuan ruẹn, u ghi miẹn wẹ emwirhọkpa ma ru iran." 
Job5:25 Ubunmwẹ ivbi uẹ gha yevbe ebe ni rre oha erria. 
Job5:26 Zẹ vbe ọka ne ọ wo, ọ te sẹ ẹghẹ emwi orhọ, u gha tọ wirua a." 
Job5:27 E Job ẹghẹ ne ọ taẹn ọ re u a ya gualotọ ọna miẹn. Ẹmwata nọ, rhunmwuda ọnii, rhan obọ miẹn rẹn.”" 
Job6:1 E Job keghi wanniẹn wẹẹ, “Akpawẹ a mwa ọlọghọmwa kevbe akhiẹ mwẹ vbe esike," 
Job6:2  
Job6:3 iran gha khua sẹẹ ekhae ni rre okun. Rhunmwuda ọnii, wa ghẹ giẹ etalọ mwẹ yan uwa unuan." 
Job6:4 Osanobua ne Udazi ye ifẹnmwẹ salọ mwẹ nẹ, obi ni rrọ rọn la mwẹ egbe hia, Osanobua tẹn emwi ni mu ohan ọghọe ye uviẹn khẹ mwẹ." 
Job6:5 “Ekẹtẹkẹtẹ gha rri irunmwu, ẹko ghi vuọn ẹn ẹmila i wogho vbe ọ gha rri irunmwu ne ọ kae." 
Job6:6 Sokpan, gha ọ gha sẹtin rri ukhuankhuan kevbe okuhọ? De orhiẹnrhiẹn ne ọ rre ehe nọfua vbe ekẹn ọkhọkhọ?" 
Job6:7 Evbare vberriọ i khọn mwẹ, emwi ne I rhirhi a re hia, ọ re ọ ghi si emianmwẹ yọ mwẹ egbe." 
Job6:8 Vbọzẹ ne Osanobua i na rhie emwi ne I nọrẹn mẹ yi? Vbọzẹ ne ẹ i na họn erhunmwu mwẹ yi? 
Job6:9 Akpawẹ ọ gha wa giẹ obọ kẹe ne ọ gbe mwẹ uan nian! 
Job6:10 Akpawẹ I rẹnrẹn ighẹ ọ gha ru vberriọ I gha ye oghọghọ san ghe odukhunmwu. Vbene obalọ mwẹ a rhirhi yan kpọlọ sẹ hẹ, mẹ rẹnrẹn wẹ Osanobua huanrẹn, I ma he gbe odan ye ẹmwẹ ọnrẹn ẹdẹ." 
Job6:11 De ẹtin ne I mwẹ ne I gha na ye gha rre agbọn yi? Vbe i a ghi rre agbọn ba vbe idaehọ i ghi rrọ? 
Job6:12 Okuta a ya ma mwẹ ra? Oze ifun egbe mwẹ khin ra? 
Job6:13 Orhiọn i ghi rrọ mwẹ re, ne I gha ya miẹn egbe mwẹ fan! Ehe ne I gha na nọ iyobọ i ghi rrọ." 
Job6:14 “Ẹghẹ ọlọghọmwa vbenian, avbe ọse ne ọ guobọmwa ọ re I ho. Adeghẹ I fi iyeke gbe Osanobua ra ẹn o." 
Job6:15 Sokpan wa ne avbe ọse mwẹ, wa keghi he mwẹ zẹ vbe ẹzẹ ne ọ kae vbe amẹ ma rhọ." 
Job6:16 Isonorhọ kevbe esia ye ẹzẹ zeze. 
Job6:17 Sokpan, owowo gha rre, a ghi ho ehia bẹkun. Otọe ẹzẹ ni ghi dihoi rua, ọ ghi kakaa." 
Job6:18 Iran ni khian vbe ato ghi gualọ amẹ wirua, iran ghi zozo ua, wulo ye uwu ato." 
Job6:19 Ekhẹn ato ni ke Siẹba kevbe Tẹman rre gualọ ẹe. 
Job6:20 Sokpan, idaehọ iran wulo ye ọkpẹn ẹzẹ ne ọ kae." 
Job6:21 Vbene avbe ẹzẹ ni ye ọre uwa khin mẹ, wa ghi miẹn vbene ọ ye mwẹ hẹ, wa keghi ya ohan lẹ mẹ." 
Job6:22 Mẹ nọ uwa ne uwa ya emwi mẹ ra? Ra ne uwa zẹ igho odieke ne ọmwa mẹ? 
Job6:23 Ra ne uwa wọlọ mwẹ hin obọ oghian ra ekhọe dan rre? 
Job6:24 “Ọ ma khekherriọ, wa ma mwẹ emwi, wa ta emwi ne i baku ru ma mwẹ. I gha gbẹdọ ne I danmwehọ uwa." 
Job6:25 Te ẹmwẹ ẹmwata wa la ehọ, sokpan te uwa wa do vbe unu kẹkan." 
Job6:26 Wa ro ighẹ igbe agbanmwẹ ọ re I ye. Vbọzẹ ne uwa ghi na rhie ewanniẹn ye ẹmwẹ ọmwa ne iro han nẹ? 
Job6:27 Wa gha sẹtin yan uta ye ọviẹn ne udefiagbọn, wa ghi silo emwi ọse uwa khuankhuaankhuan ya vuọn ẹfe uwa." 
Job6:28 Wa ziẹn aro yọ mwẹ aro ighẹ I i ta ohoghe. 
Job6:29 Ehe ne uwa he khian sẹ ni, sẹe. Wa do bọ a i ta ẹmwata yi. Wa ghẹ hu abe mẹ. Mẹ ọ re ọ rria asẹ." 
Job6:30 Sokpan, wa ro wẹ ohoghe ẹre I ta. Wa ro ighẹ I i sẹtin rẹn emwi ne ọ maa hin e ne ẹ i maa rre.”" 
Job7:1 “Ẹdagbọn ọmwa nagbọn, te ọ ye vbe okuo ne a ya ẹtin mu ọmwa gha rrie." 
Job7:2 Ọ yevbe ọviẹn ne ọ gualọ irhu ne ọ gha lẹre yi. Zẹ vbe ọmwa iwinna ne ọ diakhẹ ne a ha irẹn osa. 
Job7:3 Ke uki ya dinna uki, mẹ i miẹn emwi ne I rre agbọn ba. Asọn dinna asọn, akhiẹ ehia viọ bu mwẹ rre." 
Job7:4 I gha lovbiẹ wẹ ne I vbiẹ, ẹghẹ ghi tan lọghọọ. I ghi gha werriẹ yo werriẹ rre, khẹ ẹghẹ ne ẹdẹ gha ya gbe." 
Job7:5 Ọ khọe gba mwẹ egbe hia, te ehia ghi bannọ gheghe, ẹtẹ mwẹ hia gha ro kua." 
Job7:6 Ẹdẹ mwẹ hia rrie vbe ne idaehọ ina rrọọ, okhian kẹ ọre sẹ ọkpido ọdukpọn." 
Job7:7 “Osanobua, yerre wẹ, uhiọnrọnmwẹ ọkpa kẹkan ọ re ẹdagbọn mwẹ khin, oghọghọ ne I mwẹ fo nẹ." 
Job7:8 U miẹn mwẹ nian, sokpan ọfo ye evba nẹ, u gha gualọ mwẹ, I kpa a nẹ." 
Job7:9 Zẹ vbe amẹ ne ọ bi ne ọ hoho ua, ọmwa gha wu, ẹ i ghi dọlegbe dee. Iran ni rẹn ọnrẹn ghi mianmian ẹẹn." 
Job7:10  
Job7:11 Ẹn o, vbe i a ghi hunwan hẹ yi! Ohu mu mwẹ, ẹko rriara mwẹ, te I gha guan." 
Job7:12 “Vbe u a ghi na baba mwẹ hẹ yi? Te uwẹ ro wẹ Ugbogiorinmwi ẹzẹ I khin ra? 
Job7:13 I lovbiẹ, I keghi hia ne I hẹwẹ, I te ho ne obalọ mwẹ vbe sẹ mwẹ rae." 
Job7:14 Sokpan wẹ keghi ye imina gha runran mwẹ, u kegha giẹ umian kevbe imina dan gunmwẹ," 
Job7:15 a te do miẹn wẹ a niẹn mwẹ rhie fua, ọre ọ fu mwẹ egbe sẹẹ nẹ I ye gha mu egbe usẹ na khian." 
Job7:16 I zobọ vbọ, agbọn khan mwẹ nẹ, wa hẹko sẹ mwẹ rae; I i ghi mwẹ esa ni gu agbọn ye." 
Job7:17 Vbọzẹ ne ọmwa na ye gẹdẹgbẹ vbe aro ruẹ yi? Vbe u a na vbe zẹ ye emwi ne ọ ru hẹ yi? 
Job7:18 Owiẹ owiẹ u ya rhuan ẹnrẹn ghe, u ghi vbe gha danmwẹ ọẹn kugbakẹghẹrẹ." 
Job7:19 Wẹ i ghi vbe fi aro a kpee kherhe? Ne I miẹn ehe na miẹn asẹn re? 
Job7:20 Orukhọ mwẹ emwi ne ọ si ye uẹ egbe ra, wẹ ne eseghan? Vbe u a ghi na ya mwẹ ru emwi ne a kọn fi hẹ yi? Erriọ ihẹ mwẹ wa khua ruẹ ra?" 
Job7:21 Wẹ i ya orukhọ mwẹ bọ mwẹ ẹdẹ ra? Wẹ i ye abakuru mwẹ bọ mwẹ? Ẹ i ghi kpee wan, I ghi la idin mwẹ. u gha gualọ mwẹ, sokpan, mẹ kpao nẹ.”" 
Job8:1 Ẹre Bildad ne ovbi ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Siua na wanniẹn wẹẹ, “U talọ etalọ owogho ruẹ fo nẹ ra?" 
Job8:2  
Job8:3 Osanobua i bu eku, ẹ i mwẹ ọ ma ru vbene ọ kei yi." 
Job8:4 Ọ gha kẹe, te ivbi uẹ rukhọ ghe Osanobua, ọ re ọ na rri iran oya ne ọ khẹke iran." 
Job8:5 Sokpan, banbanna nian, fiwerriẹ ne u rinmwian Osanobua Oghodua." 
Job8:6 A deghẹ ọmwa ẹmwata ne ẹ i mwẹ iruẹn ọ re u gele khin, Osanobua gha rre do yuọ obọ, ọ ghi rhie igiowa ruẹ, dọlegbe ye ihe, zẹ vbe emwi ne a ya san ruẹn ẹse." 
Job8:7 Avbe emwi ne ọ wi ruẹ hia, ma zẹdẹ sẹ ne a gha ya giẹ, emwi ne Osanobua gha viọ ne uẹn ẹghẹ nii." 
Job8:8 Rhie ẹghẹ kherhe ya ghe ewaẹn emwa nẹdẹ, roro avbe ẹmwata ne avbe erha ima ruẹ re." 
Job8:9 Ẹdẹ agbọn ima kanmwa, ma ma vbe rẹn emwi rhọkpa hiehiere, ma ghi fian agbọn na gberra zẹ vbe aghọnghọn." 
Job8:10 Sokpan, giẹ avbe emwa ẹwaẹn nẹdẹ ma uwẹ emwi, danmwehọ ẹmwẹ ne iran gha ta." 
Job8:11 “Irunmwu i sẹtin zọ vbe ehe ne amẹ iye a i vbe miẹn vbe a gha lahin ekhuọrhọ rre nẹ. 
Job8:12 Amẹ gha ka, iran ọ re ọ ka luẹluẹ, vbe iran ma he sẹ ne a fian ya ru emwi." 
Job8:13 Emwa ni ma rẹn Osanobua yevbe avbe irunmwu nii, iran gha mianmian Osanobua ne idaehọ iran fo." 
Job8:14 Iran mu ẹtin yan ọma oru, ido akpakpa." 
Job8:15 Iran gha ye egbe gọ yan ido akpakpa, ọ gha sẹtin da iran yi ra? Iran gha dobọ mu oma oru, ọ gha sẹtin mu iran mudia ra?" 
Job8:16 Emwa dan ghi zọ zẹ vbe irunmwu vbe uwu ovẹn, zẹ vbe irunmwu ne ọ rhu gba ogba hia." 
Job8:17 Inian iran ghi kinnọ lẹga okuta, ọ ghi sikan mu avbe okuta nekhua." 
Job8:18 Sokpan, vbọlọ iran hin evba rre, ọmwa ne ọ gha ye rẹn ighẹ iran te rre evba i rrọ." 
Job8:19 Onii ọrọre oghọghọ ne emwa dan mwẹ, emwa ọvbehe ghi rre do rhie ihe iran." 
Job8:20 Sokpan Osanobua i he ọmwa ne ọ guobọ ẹre ye otọ, ra ne ọ ru iyobọ ne emwa dan." 
Job8:21 Ọ gha ru ẹe ne u gha giẹ kevbe ne u vbe gha wee," 
Job8:22 sokpan, ọ gha fa iran ni khuiwu ruẹ a, a ghi ho owa avbe emwa dan bẹkun.”" 
Job9:1 Ẹn, I ka họn egbe ẹmwẹ vberriọ yi. Sokpan vbe ọmwa ra sẹtin gu Osanobua gui ẹzọ ne ọ rria asẹ hẹ yi?" 
Job9:2  
Job9:3 Vbe ọmwa ra gu ẹe muan ẹmwẹ hẹ yi? Rẹn gha sẹtin nọ ọta arriaisẹn, ne a i miẹn ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹtin rhie ewanniẹn yọ." 
Job9:4 Osanobua wan ẹsẹse, ọ vbe mwẹ ẹtin, ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹtin mu aro da ẹre irrọ." 
Job9:5 Vbe ne a i na vbe ta ẹe ya, ọ ghi vbọlọ avbe oke, ohu gha muẹn, ọ ghi fuẹn ehia a." 
Job9:6 Osanobua ghi giẹ igbohiotọ, ọ ghi mu otọ rueghe, ọ ghi mu avbe orrẹ ni da agbọn yi rueghe." 
Job9:7 Ọ sẹtin da owẹn yi ne ọ ghẹ yan rre, kevbe ne avbe orhọnmwẹ ghẹ wan uwanmwẹ vbe asọn." 
Job9:8 Ọmwa ne ọ gu Osanobua tan iso i rrọ, ra ne ọ ye owẹ rrilo ugbogiorinmwi ẹzẹ iyeke." 
Job9:9 Osanobua viọ avbe orhọnmwẹ rrọ ye iso, avbe agukisinmwiogie, agho, kevbe iyọkhọkhọ kevbe avbe orhọnmwẹ odẹ ekẹn." 
Job9:10 Ma i sẹtin rẹn otọ iwinna nekhua ne ọ winna, iwinna ọyunnuan ẹnrẹn i vbe mwẹ ọfo." 
Job9:11 Osanobua gberra khian, sokpan mẹ i sẹtin dẹghe ẹre." 
Job9:12 Ọ ghi gha rhie emwi ne ọ khọn rẹn, ọmwa ne ọ wẹ ẹre dobọyi i rrọọ. Ọmwa ne ohan giẹe nọ rẹn wẹ, “Vbe u a ru yi?” ẹ i rrọọ." 
Job9:13 Ohu Osanobua i firaa, Ọ rẹnkhẹn avbe eghian rẹn hia a. Iran ni rhie obọ ye Rehab ne ugbogiorinmwi amẹ iyeke, gha gu ẹe suan." 
Job9:14 De ẹmwẹ ne I gha miẹn, ya rhie ewanniẹn ne Osanobua khekherriọ?" 
Job9:15 A gha rhe miẹn wẹ I ma rẹn ọkpa I ma rẹn eva. Emwi ne I ra miẹn ru i rrọọ, gberra ne I rinmwian Osanobua ne ọ bu ohiẹn mwẹ, wẹ ne ọ tohan mwẹ." 
Job9:16 Gie a kha wẹ ọ rhie ẹghẹ mẹ ne I ya zẹ ne unu mwẹ, mẹ ma yayi ighẹ ọ gha danmwehọ mwẹ." 
Job9:17 Ọ giẹ okpẹhoho, ne ọ do si mwẹ bolua, vbe ne ẹ i na mwẹ otọ." 
Job9:18 Ẹ i gunmwẹ gbe amẹ sa wọn. Ọ ye orriara vuọn ẹdẹ agbọn mwẹ hia. 
Job9:19 Te imẹ ghẹ ghi ze vbe udu ra? Ne I ze vbe udu ma Osanobua? Te I gha mu ẹẹn ye iko ra? De ọmwa ne ọ ra si ẹe gha khian yi? 
Job9:20 I ma rẹn ọkpa, I ma rẹn eva, ekhọe mwẹ vbe dia. Sokpan, ẹmwẹ mwẹ ghi yevbe irri abe. Ẹmwẹ ne I ta hia ghi yevbe ne ọ bu abe gbe mwẹ." 
Job9:21 I ma rẹn ọkpa I ma rẹn eva, sokpan mẹ i ghi zẹ yọ nian. Agbọn khan mwẹ nẹ. Emwi rhọkpa i ghi rrọọ. U rri asẹ ra te u rri abe. Te Osanobua ye fuẹn ima hia a." 
Job9:22  
Job9:23 Ọmwa ne ọ ma rukhọ gha wu udomwurri, Osanobua ghi giẹ." 
Job9:24 Osanobua mu agbọn na ne emwa dan, ọ rhu iran ni bu ohiẹn hia aro, a deghẹ ẹire Osa ọre ọ ru ẹe, de ọmwa ne ọ ghi khin?" 
Job9:25 Ẹdẹ agbọn mwẹ rhulẹ gberra khian, ọkpa ne ọma i rrọọ." 
Job9:26 Agbọn mwẹ gberra, zẹ vbe okọ ne ọ rhulẹ, okhian wa kẹ ọre zẹ vbe oghohọn, ne ọ ra vin mu ofẹn." 
Job9:27 I gha mumu ogie ne I mianmian usẹ. Usẹ mwẹ hia ghi hihiẹ rre do gha runran mwẹ, I rẹnrẹn ighẹ Osanobua ka mwẹ ba ni rriabe nẹ." 
Job9:28  
Job9:29 Deghẹ a ka mwẹ ba ne ọ rria abe nẹ, vbe i a ghi ye domian ba a?" 
Job9:30 Evbakhuẹ ne ọ gha kpe orukhọ mwẹ i rrọ. 
Job9:31 Osanobua fi mwẹ fi uye ni gbe iruẹn nẹ, uhin ighẹ te ekhue mwẹ ghi mu avbe ukpọn mwẹ." 
Job9:32 Akpawẹ ọmwa kẹkan ọ re Osanobua khin, te I gha zẹ ẹmwẹ wanniẹn ọẹn, ma gha gba gha rrie iko ya gui ẹzọ ima." 
Job9:33 Sokpan, ọmwa ne ọ ra guan ye ẹmwẹ na ne ima ẹ i rrọọ. A i miẹn ọmwa ne ọ gha bu ohiẹn imẹ vbe Osanobua." 
Job9:34 Ghẹ ghi rriọ mwẹ oya Osanobua: Hẹ avbe emwi ohan ruẹn kpao hin emwa rre. 
Job9:35 Ohan i mu mwẹ I gha wa guan rhunmwuda, I gba ẹko mwẹ." 
Job10:1 “Agbọn khan mwẹ nẹ, Danmwehọ ẹzọ orriara ne I gui." 
Job10:2 Osanobua, ghẹ bu abe gbe mwẹ, tama mwẹ, de ẹzọ ne u gunmwẹ gui yi." 
Job10:3 We yayi wẹ ọ kere ne ekhọe ruẹ wa wegbe vberriọ? Ne u zan emwi ne uwẹ tobọ ruẹ yi? Ne u vbe ya obọ ye iro ne emwa dan zẹe? 
Job10:4 Aro ne ima ya ghe emwi ọ re uwẹ vbe ya ghe ẹre ra? 
Job10:5 Ẹdagbọn uwẹ vbe kanmwa zẹ vbe ọghe ima ra? 
Job10:6 Vbe u a ghi na zọ uhio orukhọ mwẹ khian hẹ? Ne u na vbe zọlọ abakuru mwẹ hia ladian? 
Job10:7 U rẹnrẹn wẹ I ma rria abe. Ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹtin wọlọ mwẹ hin obọ ruẹ rre, ẹ i rrọọ." 
Job10:8 “Obọ ruẹ ọ re ọ mwamwa mwẹ, ne ọ vbe ma mwẹ. Banbanna nian, avbe obọ nii ọ re ọ ghi rẹnkhẹn mwẹ uan na." 
Job10:9 Yerre wẹ obuẹ ọ re u ya ma mwẹ, te u ghi ra vbe dunmwu mwẹ khian ebubẹ ra?" 
Job10:10 Wẹ ọ re ọ rhie ẹtin ne erha mwẹ ya biẹ mwẹ, wẹ ọ re ọ gunmwẹ wan vbe ẹko iye mwẹ." 
Job10:11 Wẹ ọ re ọ ye ugboloko kevbe inian yi egbe mwẹ. U keghi ye inian nekhua kevbe ikpakpa gue ugboloko nii. 
Job10:12 Wẹ ọ re ọ rhie arrọ kevbe aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa ne ẹ i bẹghe mẹ. Wẹ ọ re ọ gbearoghe mwẹ ne I na rre agbọn. 
Job10:13 Banbanna nian, I do rẹn wẹẹ, te u wa do mwamwa emwi ne u gha ru mwẹ re ke ẹghẹ nii gha dee." 
Job10:14 U kegha baba mwẹ, a deghẹ I gha fidọn. Ne u ghẹ miẹn ehe na yabọ mwẹ." 
Job10:15 I gha fidọn kherhe, I la ẹmwẹ vbe obọ ruẹ. I gha gbe ẹse, a i wẹ mwẹ ọbevbaru, egbe wọ mwẹ, emwi ekhue gba mwẹ egbe." 
Job10:16 Emwi gha dunna mẹ kherhe, u ghi zẹ mwẹ khu zẹ vbe oduma, u ghi gha zẹ edunna, ne emwi miẹn ehe na vba mwẹ." 
Job10:17 Ẹ i mwẹ u ma miẹn ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹ osẹe gbe mwẹ ne uẹn. Ohu mwẹ ne ọ muẹn ghi gha hin ukhumwu, hin ukhunmwu, u ghi gha gualọ emwi ọgbọn ne u gha ru mwẹ re ẹghẹ hia." 
Job10:18 “Vbọzẹ ne u na giẹ a biẹ mwẹ yi Osanobua? Ọ te kei ne I wu vbe ọmwa rhọkpa ma he miẹn mwẹ. 
Job10:19 Akpawẹ te I wa ke ẹko la uwu idin, ọ gha te gha maa, zẹ vbe ọmwa ne ọ ma rrie agbọn na hiehiere." 
Job10:20 Ẹ i re te ẹdagbọn mwẹ ghi ra fo na ra? Rhie obọ hin mwẹ ẹkun rre. Ne a gunmwẹ ye ẹghẹ ne ọ kẹe mẹ zọmọ. 
Job10:21 I gha kpao wan vbe ne I i ghi na vbe dọlegbe dee. I rrie ẹvbo ne ọ vuọn ne ebiebi ke ikhiẹkhiẹ egbe. 
Job10:22 Otọe ebiebi, aghọnghọn kevbe otighi. Ehe ne uwanmwẹ tobọ re na re ebiebi.”" 
Job11:1 Ẹre Zofa ne ovbi e Neama na wanniẹn wẹẹ, “A i miẹn ne ọ gha rhie ewanniẹn ye avbe ẹmwẹ oya na ra? Etalọ vbe nian ọ re ọ ghi ra ye ọmwa rria asẹ ra?" 
Job11:2  
Job11:3 Te uwẹ ro ra e Job ighẹ ma i ra miẹn ẹmwẹ zẹ wanniẹn ọn? Wẹ ẹmwẹ ọtagiẹ ruẹ gha rhie obọ gue ima unu. 
Job11:4 U khare ighẹ ẹmwata ọ re u ta, u wẹ ọmwa ne ọ huanrẹn u khin vbe odaro Osanobua." 
Job11:5 Vbọrrọ nian wẹ Osanobua gha zẹ ẹmwẹ wanniẹn! 
Job11:6 Ọ gha tama ruẹn wẹ ẹwaẹn mwẹ ilawẹ emwi eso rrọ ne ọmwa i sẹtin rẹn otọ ẹre. Oya ne Osanobua rriọ re na, ma sẹ vbene ọ te khẹke uẹ." 
Job11:7 “Wẹ gha sẹtin rẹn okhiẹ kevbe ukpẹ ọre ra ighẹ ẹtin kevbe ukpọlọmwẹ Osanobua? 
Job11:8 Iso i he re ehe ne Osanobua isẹtin gberra, sokpan ọ gberra ehe ne ẹtin ruẹn sẹe. Osanobua rẹn ehe ne iran ni wulo nẹ ye, sokpan wẹ ma rẹn ọnrẹn." 
Job11:9 Ukpọlọmwẹ Osanobua sẹe uvbẹmwẹ agbọn na, ọ vbe vbẹ vbe otọ sẹ okun." 
Job11:10 Deghẹ Osanobua muẹn, ọ na wẹ ne a gui ẹzọ ruẹ, de ọmwa ne ọ gha da ẹre obọ yi yi?" 
Job11:11 Osanobua rẹn emwa ni re ẹwobi, ọ bẹghe emwi dan ne iran ru hia." 
Job11:12 Ẹghẹ ne a gha na biẹ ede zẹ vbe aranmwẹ owa ọ re emwa ni kọn de ẹwe ua, gha na suẹn gha wan." 
Job11:13 “Dọlọ ekhọe ruẹ yi e Job, sua owẹ sẹ ehe ne Osanobua ye." 
Job11:14 Viọ avbe emwi dan kevbe ni la ihan hin owa ruẹ rre. 
Job11:15 Ne u dọlọ mu agbọn hẹn, vbe ne ọ digiẹ kevbe ne ẹ i mu ohan," 
Job11:16 Ẹghẹ nii, u ghi do mianmian ọlọghọmwa ruẹn hia. Zẹ vbe orogho ne ọ lẹ gberra, ne a ma ghi yerre ọvbehe." 
Job11:17 Ẹdagbọn ruẹn ghi wan uwanmwẹ sẹẹ owẹn ogiavan ẹghẹ ne ọ te so ebiebi sẹ vbe ẹdagbọn, ghi wan uwanmwẹ zẹ vbe owiẹ." 
Job11:18 Wẹ ghi do gha rrọ vbe ne ẹkun na sotọ, kevbe ne ọ vuọn ne idaehọ. Osanobua gha degue ruẹ, ọ ghi rhie ikẹtin ne uẹn." 
Job11:19 Afianma avbe eghian ruẹn i ghi ra fian an, emwa ni bun gha do nọ iyobọ vbe obọ ruẹ." 
Job11:20 Sokpan, ọmwa dan gha ghe lẹga, egbe ghi wọ ẹre. Ọ ghi miẹn wẹ ehe ne a la miẹn uhunmwu vbọ i rrọọ. Idaehọ ọkpa ne iran mwẹ ọrọre wẹ, ẹ i mwẹ a ma ghi wu.”" 
Job12:1 Ẹre Job ghi na wanniẹn wẹẹ, “Vbe ẹmwata, wa ọrọre unu emwa hia. Wa gha wu, ẹwaẹn gha wu lele uwa." 
Job12:2  
Job12:3 Sokpan vbene uwa wan, ọ re imẹ vbe wan. Emwi ọkpa ne uwa ya sẹ mwẹ, ẹ i rrọọ. Agbọn hia vbe rẹn emwi ne uwa he ta usin." 
Job12:4 Banbanna nian, uhin ighẹ te avbe ọse mwẹ ghi giẹ mwẹ, iran gha giẹ, a gha rhe miẹn ighẹ, ọmwata ọ re I khin, I ma rria abe. Sokpan, ẹghẹ ọkpa rrọọ, ne Osanobua na họn erhunmwu mwẹ." 
Job12:5 Wa i mwẹ ọlọghọmwa, sevba wa gha ya mwẹ gbogiẹ; wa na gha fi ọmwa ne ọ de khian emwi." 
Job12:6 Avbe oyi kevbe emwa ni ma rẹn Osanobua, ghi gha rrọọ vbe ọfumwegbe. A gha rhe miẹn wẹ, ẹtin obọ iran ọrọre Osanobua iran." 
Job12:7 “Avbe ahianmwẹ kevbe aranmwẹ oha, wa mwẹ emwi ni bun ne iran gha ma uwa ẹre." 
Job12:8 Wa nọ avbe aranmwẹ oke kevbe ọghe okun ne iran ma uwa ẹwaẹn iran. 
Job12:9 Iran hia rẹnrẹn ighẹ obọ e Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ yi iran. 
Job12:10 Osanobua ọ re ọ dia ẹdẹ agbọn avbe emwi ne ọ yi; obọ ẹtin ẹnrẹn ọre ẹdẹ agbọn emwa hia ye. 
Job12:11 Sokpan, zẹ vbene evbare ne a danmwẹ rhiẹnrhiẹn aranmwẹ ruẹn, erriọ ọ re ẹmwẹ ne a họn vbe rhiẹnrhiẹn ehọ ruẹ." 
Job12:12 “Avbe ọmaẹn mwẹ ẹwaẹn, sokpan Osanobua mwẹ ẹwaẹn kevbe ẹtin. Avbe ọmaẹn rherhe bẹghe vbene emwi ra de hẹ. Osanobua rẹn vbene emwi ra de hẹ kevbe, ẹtin ne a ya ru ẹe vbene a gha ru ẹe hẹ." 
Job12:13  
Job12:14 Osanobua gha dunmwu emwi sotọ, de ọmwa ne ọ gha dọlegbe bọ ẹe? Osanobua gha mu ọmwa ye ẹwẹdọ, de ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹtin fan ẹẹn fua?" 
Job12:15 Osanobua gha mu amẹ, uyunmwu ghi rre. Ọ gha zẹ amẹ obọ fua, ogbigbi orogho amẹ ghi rre." 
Job12:16 “Osanobua wegbe, rẹn ọ re ọ khọnmiotọ vbe ẹghẹ hia. Ke ne a rẹrẹ, kevbe ne ọ rẹrẹ ọmwa, obọ ẹtin ẹnrẹn ọ re iran hia ye." 
Job12:17 Ọ ghi miẹn iran ni khaemwisẹ ẹwaẹn, Ọ ghi ya iran ni da kha gha ru emwi ukọnmwẹ." 
Job12:18 Ọ gha silo avbe ọba hin ẹkete iran rre, Ọ ghi ya iran khian eviẹn." 
Job12:19 Ọ ghi gbe avbe ohẹn kevbe emwa ẹtin uhunmwu ke otọ. 
Job12:20 Ọ ye obọ gue emwa ne a mu ẹtin yan unu, ọ ghi vbe miẹn avbe ọmaẹn ẹwaẹn iran." 
Job12:21 Ọ fa iran ni rre ukpo ẹtin uan, ọ kevbe dobọ ẹtin iran ni dakha yi." 
Job12:22 Ọ giẹ uwanmwẹ gha rrie ehe ne ọ so ebiebi zẹ vbe uwu. 
Job12:23 Ọ ye avbe okpẹvbo khian ni wegbe kevbe ni kpọlọ, sokpan, ọ khọn miẹn iran otọ, ọ kevbe fuẹn iran an." 
Job12:24 Ọ ye ọkaolotu iran khian akpa, ọ keghi giẹ iran gha zozo, iro han iran, iran wirua." 
Job12:25 Iran baba odẹ khian vbe uwu ebiebi iran kegha kpigogo, zẹvbe ọdayọn.”" 
Job13:1 “Ẹmwẹ ne u wa talọe hia, I ka họn ehia de yi. I rẹn otọ ehia. Mẹ vbe rẹn sẹ zẹ vbene uwa vbe rẹn. I i re ne ọ ma sẹ ihe uwa." 
Job13:2  
Job13:3 Sokpan Osanobua ọ re ima gba muan ẹmwẹ ighẹ ẹ i re uwa. I ho ne I gui ẹzọ mwẹ ma rẹn. 
Job13:4 Te uwa ya ohoghe mu asa gue amarẹn emwi uwa. Te uwa yevbe ọbo ne ẹ i sẹtin sinmwi ọmwa rhọkpa. 
Job13:5 Wa ghẹ zẹdẹ guan, ne agbọn miẹn ehe na gha ro ighẹ umẹwaẹn ọ re uwa khin." 
Job13:6 “Wa danmwehọ vbe I a gha gui ẹzọ mwẹ. 
Job13:7 Vbọzẹ ne uwa na ta ohoghe yi? Wa yayi ighẹ ohoghe uwa mwẹ emwi ne ọ gha ru ne Osanobua re ra? 
Job13:8 Te uwa ra ta ene unu ẹnrẹn ne ẹẹn ra? Wa ọ re ọ ra gui ẹzọ ẹre vbe iko ra? 
Job13:9 Osanobua gha gbearokotọ ghe uwa, ọ gha miẹn emwi ne ọma ọkpa vbọ ra? Te uwa ro ighẹ wa gha sẹtin do Osanobua ọzuọ vbene uwa do emwa nagbọn ọzuọ na ra?" 
Job13:10 Ọ gha khọn rẹn ne uwa gha do zẹ ọmwa ẹkpe. Te Osanobua gha ye gu uwa gui. 
Job13:11 Ẹtin ẹnrẹn ghi runran uwa. 
Job13:12 Itan ne uwa kpa, te ehia rhiara zẹ vbe emuẹn. ẹmwẹ ne uwa guan ladian ye mitanmitan zẹ vbe obuẹ." 
Job13:13 Wa gbẹdọ ne uwa rhie otọ mẹ ya guan, ehe ne ọ gha de gbe ne ọ degbe." 
Job13:14 “Mẹ mu egbe ne I ya rhie uhunmwu da ẹbe. 
Job13:15 Idaehọ mwẹ fo nẹ, rhunmwuda ọnii, ẹ i ghi mwẹ asa a deghẹ Osanobua gbe mwẹ uan. I gha gui ene unumwẹ ma rẹn." 
Job13:16 U gha ghe, udinmwẹ na ghi do miẹn mwẹ fan, rhunmwuda, ohan i ra giẹ ọmwa dan mudia ye Osanobua odaro." 
Job13:17 Banbanna nian, danmwehọ vbene I rhan otọ emwi hẹ." 
Job13:18 I mu egbe ne I gui ene unumwẹ, rhunmwuda I rẹnrẹn ighẹ mẹ ọ re ọ rria asẹ." 
Job13:19 “Te u ra do ba mwẹ ifi ẹzọ ra Osanobua? U gha ru vberriọ, mẹ mu egbe ne I gha ya hunwan ne I wa wu." 
Job13:20 Gun mwẹ nọ emwi eva, u ghi kue yọ mwẹ re. Iyeke ọnii, I i ghi lẹ ne uẹn." 
Job13:21 Ghẹ ghi rriọ mwẹ oya, ghẹ ye emwi ohan fuẹn mwẹ uan." 
Job13:22 “Osanobua, wẹ ka guan, ne imẹ rhie ewanniẹn yọ. Ra giẹ imẹ ka guan ne uwẹ rhie ewanniẹn mẹ." 
Job13:23 De emwi ne ọ re orukhọ mwẹ yi? De emwi ne I baku ru? De emwi dan ne a ka yọ mwẹ owẹ? 
Job13:24 “Vbe u a ghi na rhie aro lẹre mẹ hẹ yi? Vbe u a ghi na ye aro eghian ghe mwẹ hẹ? 
Job13:25 Te u ho ne u runran mwẹ ra? Mẹ ma vba ebe ne ọ kakae, irunmwu ne ọ kakaa nẹ ọ re uwẹ gu khọn." 
Job13:26 “U wa ba mwẹ ifi ẹzọ ọhanabe, ya sẹ egbe emwi ne I ru vbe I he ye kherhe," 
Job13:27 U rrọ ọgiọrọ yọ mwẹ owẹ, u kegha baba owẹ ne I zẹ vbotọ, u keghi vbe gha zọ uhio ehe ne I rhie owẹ yi." 
Job13:28 Rhunmwuda ọnii nian, I keghi vbiolo kua zẹ vbe erhan ne ọ kẹkẹe, kevbe zẹ vbe ẹwu ne arriukpa re.”" 
Job14:1 “A biẹlẹ ima hia ne ẹ i mwẹ ẹtin kevbe ne ẹ i sẹtin ye egbe ẹre obọ. Agbọn orhikhan ne a i na tọ ọ re ima hia ye. 
Job14:2 Ma ghi zẹgiẹgiẹ wan, a ghi vbe zẹgiẹ luẹluẹ kua zẹ vbe obobo a ghi ho ima bẹkun zẹ vbe obobo." 
Job14:3 Wẹ gha zẹdẹ tọn aro mu ghe imẹ hiehiere ra Osanobua? Ra ne u tie mwẹ ye erhan ẹzọ ne u bu ohiẹn mwẹ? 
Job14:4 Emwi ọkpa ne ọ huanrẹn, ne ọ gha sẹtin ke uwu emwi ne ọ gbe iruẹn zẹ vbene ọmwa nagbọn ye rre, ẹ i rrọọ." 
Job14:5 A ta ẹe ye otọ nẹ vbene ọ gha tọ sẹ hẹ. Inu uki ne ọ gha ya vbe agbọn. U ta ẹe mu olọ yan rẹn nẹ, ẹ i ghi giẹ a fiwerriẹ." 
Job14:6 Rhie aro hin ẹre egbe rre ne u sẹ ọe rae, ne u giẹ ẹe vbe zọmọ vbe agbọn usẹ ne ọ ye, a deghẹ ọ gha sẹtin." 
Job14:7 “Idaehọ ye rrọọ ne erhan ne a tọn gbotọ nẹ. Ọ sẹtin ye vbe fe, ọ ghi zọọ." 
Job14:8 A gha rhe miẹn ighẹ inian rẹn khian ọmaẹn ighẹ ut ukhunmwu ẹnrẹn wu ye uwu otọ. 
Job14:9 Vbene amẹ na rrọọ, ọ gha zọ vbe ovbi erhan." 
Job14:10 Sokpan, ọmwa gha wu, ọghọe wa fo ye evba. Ọ wu nẹ, rẹn ghi ye vbọ nian?" 
Job14:11 “Zẹ vbe ẹzẹ ne amẹ i ghi na lẹ, kevbe avbe odighi ni kae," 
Job14:12 emwa ghi wulo, iran i ghi rhiọrre ọvbehe, iran i ra rueghe egbe vbe ovbe ne iran ye." 
Job14:13 “Akpawẹ u gha ya rhie mwẹ lẹre ye ehe ne iran ni wulo nẹ ye nian, ne a rhie mwẹ lẹre ohu ruẹ te do fo, ne u vbe rhie ẹghẹ ne u gha na ye mwẹ rre ye otọ." 
Job14:14 Ọmwa gha wu nẹ, ọ gha ye rhiọrre do gha rrọọ ra? Sokpan, mẹ gha diakhẹ ẹghẹ ne ọ maa sẹẹ." 
Job14:15 Ẹghẹ nii u ghi tie, mẹ ghi vbe khuẹnniẹn. Ẹko ruẹ ghi do rhiẹnrhiẹn ghe imẹ ne emwi ne uwẹ yi." 
Job14:16 Ẹghẹ nii, u ghi gha baba owẹ ne I rhirhi a zẹ, sokpan, u i ghi ra zọ uhio orukhọ mwẹ." 
Job14:17 U gha yabọ iran, u ghi viọ iran kua, u ghi khiẹn emwi ne I baku ru hia kua." 
Job14:18 “Ẹghẹ dee ne avbe oke nekhua gha na dele. A ghi vbe bilo avbe oke ne gelete kua. 
Job14:19 Amẹ ghi gha wiẹn okuta kua, amẹ ne ọ dae ghi kpọlọ ekẹn otọ gha rrie. Ẹghẹ nii, wẹ fuẹn idaehọ a rrọọ ne ọmwa mwẹ kua." 
Job14:20 Obọ ruẹ ghi gba ọmwa, u ghi rhie ẹre kpao ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ. Ọ gha wu, ugbaro ẹre ghi mu khiẹn." 
Job14:21 Avbe ivbi ẹre gha hin usi sokpan rẹn ighi rẹn, a i vbe tama rẹn vbe a gha fa iran an." 
Job14:22 Obalọ ne ọ rrọ ẹre egbe ọkpa ọ re ọ rẹnrẹn. Kevbe akhiẹ ne ọ rre ọ re ekhọe.” 
Job15:1 Ọre Ẹlifaz ne ovbi ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Tẹman na wanniẹn, ọ wẹẹ, “Etalọ kẹkan, e Job, etalọ kẹkan ọ re ena khin." 
Job15:2  
Job15:3 Ọmwa ne ọ wan ne ọ gha guan vbene uwẹ guan na i rrọọ, ra ne ọ gha ya ẹmwẹ ne ẹ i mwẹ emwi ne a ya ẹe kha zẹ ene unu ẹnrẹn." 
Job15:4 Akpawẹ ọ guẹ ru, a i ghẹ gha miẹn ọmwa ne ọ ye mu ohan Osanobua; a i ghẹ gha miẹn ọmwa ne ọ ye na erhunmwu ghe ẹre." 
Job15:5 Ẹmwẹ ne u ta rhie maa ighẹ ọmwa dan u khin, Te u ho ne u ba ya okpọta zẹ asa." 
Job15:6 Ẹ i re imẹ ọ re ọ gha zẹdẹ bu ohiẹn gbe uẹ, avbe ẹmwẹ ne u guan bu ohiẹn gbuẹ nẹ." 
Job15:7 “Te uwẹ ro ighẹ wẹ ọ re ọmwa ne a ka gha biẹ ye agbọn na ra? Wẹ rre evba vbe Osanobua yi avbe oke nekhua ra? 
Job15:8 Te emwamwa ne Osanobua mwamwaẹn defi uwẹ ehọ ra? Ra te uwẹ ro ighẹ uwẹ ọkpa ọ re ọ wan? 
Job15:9 Emwi ne uwẹ rẹnrẹn ne ima ma rẹn i rrọ. 
Job15:10 Emwa ni fu edẹ ọ re ọ ma ima ẹwaẹn, emwa ne a biẹlẹ nẹ a ke biẹ erha a." 
Job15:11 “Osanobua rhie egbe rọkhọmwẹ ne uẹn, vbe u a ghi na ye he ẹe ye otọ hẹ yi? Aro rọkhọrọkhọ ma ya gha guan ne ẹẹn, avbe ẹmwẹ ni gu egbe ro." 
Job15:12 Sokpan, egbe guọ uwẹ, u keghi ya ohu tọn aro ye ima egbe." 
Job15:13 Ohu Osanobua muẹn ẹsẹse, te u gha niẹn ukpe ghe ẹre." 
Job15:14 “A gha miẹn ọmwa ne ọ gele wa huan fo ra? A gha miẹn ọmwa ne ọ wa gba na vbe odaro Osanobua ra? 
Job15:15 Osanobua i mu ẹtin yan avbe odibo ẹre ne arengbe, u hin ighẹ iran ma huan vbe aro ẹre." 
Job15:16 Ọmwa nagbọn ghi gha si ọkhọ wọn zẹ vbe amẹ, ẹn, te ọmwa kẹkẹ ua, te ọ wa ku ogboi." 
Job15:17 “E Job, danmwehọ emwi ne imẹ vbe rẹn." 
Job15:18 Emwa ni wan ma imẹ ẹmwata nẹ. Egbe ne avbe erha iran vbe ma iran ẹre, iran ma vbe rhie emwi ẹkhokho ọkpa lẹre." 
Job15:19 Ọrriọvbe I rre otọ iran, ọmwa ne ọ gha silo iran hin ehe ne Osanobua ye rre i rrọ." 
Job15:20 “Ọmwa dan ne ọ zẹ ẹrrẹe kpokpo, obalọ ọre ọ ra gha ye vbe ẹdagbọn rẹn hia." 
Job15:21 Utumwẹ afianma ọ re ọ ra gha tu vbe ehọ ẹre vbe ẹghẹ hia. Avbe izigan ghi hẹ rhu ẹe vbe ẹghẹ ne irẹn gha te ya gha ro ighẹ ẹbe fo. 
Job15:22 Idaehọ irrọ ne ẹẹn ighẹ ọ gha miẹn uhunmwu vbe obọ ebiebi, rhunmwuda, umozo diakhẹ ọre vbe ihe ọkpa ne ọ gbe ẹe rua," 
Job15:23 Avbe ugu vbe mudia ne iran rri ikun ẹnrẹn. 
Job15:24 Rẹn rẹnrẹn wẹ te ẹdẹnakhuẹ irẹn so ebiebi, ọfuan rhievbẹ khẹ ọre, zẹ vbe ọba ne ọ wegbe ne ọ fan rhu ẹe." 
Job15:25 “Erriọ ọre ẹdagbọn iran ye, ighẹ iran ni kun ekpa da Osanobua. Ọna vbe gha yagha Udazi." 
Job15:26 Ọmwa ne ọ hio, ne ọ vbe sọtẹ nọ. Ọ gha ye izevbudu tọn asa ẹre mu ghe odukhunmwu. Ọ ghi guọnmwẹ egbe ne ọ ya gu Osanobua gbinna." 
Job15:27  
Job15:28 “Ọnii ọ re ọmwa ne ọ khọn ẹvbo ni bun muotọ, ọ na viọ avbe owa ne avbe ena rẹn lẹ sẹrae." 
Job15:29 Sokpan, okuo gha rẹnkhẹn avbe owa kevbe ẹvbo nii uan. Ẹfe ni i ra tọ vbe obọ ẹre, ne ọ ra tọ vbe emwi ne ọ mwẹ i rrọ. Uhin ighẹ te a ra ho aghọnghọn rẹn bẹkun." 
Job15:30 Rẹn i ra vbe miẹn uhunmwu vbe obọ ebiebi, te irẹn ra yevbe erhan, ne erhẹn giẹn ọre abọ hia a, ẹhoho na khuọnnọ ehọn rẹn kua." 
Job15:31 A deghẹ rẹn wa kọn sẹ vberriọ, ne ọ na mu ẹtin yan ọkhọ, ọkhọ ọrọre ere ne ọ gha vbe re." 
Job15:32 Rẹn gha luẹluẹ ua, ọ te sẹ ẹghẹ ọre, ọ ghi luẹluẹ ua zẹ vbe abọ erhan. Ẹ i ghi ra vbe dọlegbe bi nunuunu ọvbehe." 
Job15:33 Rẹn gha yevbe azara ne ọmọ rẹn khuọn kua, ọ te vbọ, zẹ vbe erhan oliv ne ọ khuọn ebe kua." 
Job15:34 A i ra miẹn ivbi uniẹn emwa dan, erhẹn ọ re ọ gha giẹn owa ne a ya igho odieke bọ." 
Job15:35 Iran na ọrọre emwa ni mwamwa orueghe, iran ghi vbe gha ru emwi dan. Erẹrẹ ọ re ọ vuọn orhiọn iran vbe ẹghẹ hia.”" 
Job16:1 E Job keghi wanniẹn wẹẹ, “I ka họn egbe ẹmwẹ vberriọ de yi. Ẹko ne uwa fu ọmwa ẹre rre, obalọ wa nọ vbe egbe." 
Job16:2  
Job16:3 Te uwa ra wa gha guan khian ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ ra? Te awua vbe a gha miẹn wẹ, ẹ i re uwa ọre ọ guan kiekie ra?" 
Job16:4 Gie a kha ighẹ mẹ ọ re uwa, wa na gha re imẹ, I gha wa sẹtin vbe ta avbe ẹmwẹ ne uwa talọ na. I gha sẹtin ya ẹwaẹn fieghe uhunmwu mwẹ, I gha ghi ye ẹmwẹ ne ọ tue ladian silo uwa kẹ egbe." 
Job16:5 I gha sẹtin ye ibude rhie ẹtin ba uwa ẹtin, I gha wa gha guan khian ne I ya fu uwa ẹko rre." 
Job16:6 Sokpan ẹmwẹ ọkpa ne I gha ta ne ọ mwẹ asa irrọ. I gha gue unu mwẹ, ọnii i wẹ ne obalọ mwẹ fo." 
Job16:7 Osanobua, u wiẹn mwẹ uan nẹ, u keghi giẹ iran gbele emwa mwẹ hia." 
Job16:8 U mu mwẹ piẹn, oghian mwẹ ọre u khin. Ohian vbe uvẹ ọre I ghi ye, emwa ghẹ ghi miẹn ọnii, iran ghi gha kha wẹ I gele rria abe." 
Job16:9 “Osanobua yanghan mwẹ obọ vbe owẹ hẹ kua, rhunmwuda ighẹ ohu mu ẹẹn, ọ keghi suku aro a gha ghe mwẹ." 
Job16:10 Emwa gha niẹn ukpe da mwẹ, iran do lẹga mwẹ, iran kegha gbe ubi yọ mwẹ aro." 
Job16:11 Osanobua wa si mwẹ fi emwa dan obọ nẹ. 
Job16:12 Ọfumwegbe ọ re I te gha ye, sokpan, Osanobua keghi mu mwẹ ẹho, ọ mama mwẹ, ọ na lọkọ mwẹ uan. Osanobua keghi ya mwẹ ru ama ne a na danmwẹ emwi ne a fi," 
Job16:13 ọ kegha filo ifẹnmwẹ gunmwẹ, ke igienenẹ rre. Avbe ifẹnmwẹ nii salọ mwẹ, iran na vbe kuan mwẹ. Sevba, ọ ma ye mwẹ itohan," 
Job16:14 ọ kegha kuan mwẹ yan egbe yan egbe. Ọ keghi dekun mwẹ vbe ovbiyokuo ne ohu rhia ẹre uhunmwu an. 
Job16:15 “I kegha khiẹ, I na gha rhuan ukpọn ne a ya ẹkpo ivin do. I tota ye ebubẹ zẹ vbe ọmwa ne a gbe fua." 
Job16:16 I viẹe ẹsẹse rhinrin ugbaro mwẹ ke do gha baa. Aro mwẹ keghi hue, aghọnghọn gbe okin lẹga ẹre." 
Job16:17 Sokpan, I ma rria abe uyinmwẹ ikẹtin, erhunmwu ẹmwata ọ re I na ghe Osanobua." 
Job16:18 “Ẹ o, otọ agbọn, wa ghẹ gbe gue emwi ne a baku ru ghe mwẹ. Wa ghẹ giẹ a gbe eta rhu ibuohiẹn ẹmwata ne I tu tie." 
Job16:19 Orhiọnkpa rre ẹrinmwi ne ọ gha mudia khọn ekhae mẹ. 
Job16:20 Avbe ọse mwẹ sọnnọ mwẹ, aro mwẹ keghi gbe ameve kua ghe ehe ne Osanobua ye." 
Job16:21 I gualọ ọmwa ne ọ gha rinmwian Osanobua mẹ, zẹ vbene ọmwa rinmwian ne ọse ẹre." 
Job16:22 Rhunmwuda vbe iyeke omwa ukpo eso, I gha lele odẹ ne a i ghi na dọlegbe rre." 
Job17:1 “Ufomwẹ ẹdẹ agbọn mwẹ rre nẹ. Egbe iregbe ne I ghi ya sẹtin hiọnrọn; emwi ne ọ ghi kẹe mẹ i ghi rrọ gberra idin. 
Job17:2 I miẹn vbene emwa hia yan giẹ mwẹ hẹ. 
Job17:3 Emwata ọ re I ta na, Osanobua, miẹn mwẹ ẹmwẹ na vbe obọ. Ọmwa ọvbehe I ghi rrọ ne ọ gha ya egbe ba mwẹ vbe ẹmwẹ ne I guan." 
Job17:4 U gbin iran ekhọe ẹwaẹn nẹ. Ghẹ giẹ obọ iran ke okhunmwu mẹ nian. 
Job17:5 Vbene a ta ẹe nẹdẹ wẹ ọmwa rhunmwuda igho ye ọse ẹre ne a vbokho, ẹvbo ẹre ghi rri oya yọ." 
Job17:6 Eban nian, te emwa ghi kpa itan na mẹ. Iran ghi do gha tulo asẹn yọ mwẹ aro." 
Job17:7 Te akhiẹ ghi ra rhu mwẹ aro, te obọ kevbe owẹ mwẹ ghi ye mighan mighan vbe aghọnghọn." 
Job17:8 Izegbe zẹ iran ni wẹ iran ta ẹmwata, ehia keghi kha wẹ ọmwa dan ọre I khin." 
Job17:9 Iran ni khare wẹ adazẹ iran khin, wa dọlegbe rhie ye ekhọe wẹ iran rri asẹ." 
Job17:10 Sokpan, iran gha do tẹn yọ mwẹ odaro, I i ra miẹn ọkpa kẹkan ne ọ wan vbọ." 
Job17:11 Ẹghẹ mwẹ gberra nẹ; iro ekhọe mwẹ hia rriọkua; idaehọ mwẹ wirua. 
Job17:12 Sokpan, avbe ẹse mwẹ wẹ asọn ighẹ avan nọ, iran wẹ uwanmwẹ sikẹ emwa na, sokpan mẹ rẹnrẹn ighẹ uwu ebiebi ọre I ye." 
Job17:13 Idaehọ ọkpa ne I mwẹ ọrọre ehe ne iran ni wulo nẹ ye. Ehe ne I gha na lovbiẹ gha vbiẹ vbe uwu ebiebi. 
Job17:14 I ghi tie idin wẹ erha mwẹ nọ avbe ọkhọe ni rriọ mwẹ, I ghi tie iran wẹ iye mwẹ kevbe etẹn mwẹ nikhuo ọre iran khin." 
Job17:15 De ehe ne idaehọ ghi ye ye mwẹ re yi? Gha ọ yaro kọ ọkpa? 
Job17:16 Idaehọ i ra lele mwẹ gha khian, vbe i a gha rrie ehe ne iran ni wulo nẹ ye.”" 
Job18:1 E Bildad keghi wanniẹn wẹẹ, “E Job, ọmwa vbene uwẹ ye na i guara hunwan ra? Akpawẹ, u gha sẹtin hunwan nian, ma gha ghi miẹn otọ na guẹ guan." 
Job18:2  
Job18:3 De emwi ne ọ ya uwẹ gha ro yi wẹ te ima hia wa kọn zẹ vbe ẹmila? 
Job18:4 Te u ye ohu ne u mu na ru ikuanegbe ne egbe ruẹ. Emwa gha lẹ kua hin otọ agbọn rre ra rhunmwuda ighẹ ohu mu uwẹ? Te Osanobua ghẹ ghi silo avbe oke nekhua vbọlọ ra ne ẹko miẹn ehe na rhiẹnrhiẹn? 
Job18:5 Ẹ i mwẹ a ma dọ ukpa ọmwa dan yọ. Ubamwẹ ọnrẹn i ra dọlegbe wan uwanmwẹ ọvbehe. 
Job18:6 Ukpa ne ọ baa vbe owa ukpọn rẹn gha so ebiebi. 
Job18:7 Te a te họn ẹmwẹ igiawẹ ọre vbe otọ, sokpan banbanna nian, ọ rrua owẹ ọ de rhunmwuda ude egbe ẹre." 
Job18:8 Ọ khian la uwu ọgua, emwi mu ẹre owẹ," 
Job18:9 ifi mu ẹre ighighian owẹ, ọ na mu ẹn mwẹ." 
Job18:10 A rhuẹ ifi lẹre ye otọ khẹ ọ re, a rhuẹ ifi ye odẹ ne ọ la khian." 
Job18:11 Emwi ne ọ mu ohan diakhẹ ọre lẹga ehe hia. Ọ keghi gha lele ẹre usomwẹ owẹ khian. 
Job18:12 Ọ te ka wa fe yi, sokpan ohanmwẹ ọ ghi gbe ẹe nian. Ọfuan gha khẹ ọre, ọ mudia ke ẹe." 
Job18:13 Emianmwẹ dan gba ẹre egbe hia, ọ kẹkẹ ẹre obọ kẹkẹ ẹre owẹ ua." 
Job18:14 A sanmwẹ ọẹn hin owa ukpọn ne ọ fu ẹre egbe rre. A na wẹ ne ọ do mudia vbe odaro Ogie Uwu. 
Job18:15 Ọmwaikọmwa sẹtin ya di owa ukpọn rẹn ya nian, iyeke vbe a ghi sa ugbofi ya gbele ọkhọe hin rre nẹ." 
Job18:16 Inian kevbe abọ ẹre luẹluẹe, ọ vbe kaka a." 
Job18:17 Usi ẹre fo vbe owa kevbe isi, a ma miẹn ne ọ ghi ye ẹre rre ọvbehe." 
Job18:18 A gha khu ẹe fua hin otọ emwa ni rre agbọn, a ghi khu ẹe fua vbe uwanmwẹ la ebiebi." 
Job18:19 Ẹ i mwẹ ivbi uniẹn ọnrẹn, ọ ma fi ye otọ." 
Job18:20 Ke ahọ ya sẹ orrie, egbe hia ghi gha guẹ ọmwa ne ọ họn emwi ne ọ rruan rẹn." 
Job18:21 Erriọ ẹmwẹ agbọn emwa dan ye. Ẹmwẹ agbọn emwa ni ma ka Osanobua yọ.” E Job keghi kha wẹẹ," 
Job19:1 “Vbe uwa na ye ẹmwẹ ne uwa guan zẹ obalọ yọ mwẹ egbe hẹ yi? 
Job19:2  
Job19:3 Kugba kẹghẹre ọ re uwa ya tie ihẹn mẹ ekhue ẹbọ ne uwa tie mẹ i vbe mu uwa. 
Job19:4 A deghẹ I gele ba emwi ku rru, de ne ọ kan uwa vbọ?" 
Job19:5 Wa ro wẹ wa maa sẹ mwẹ, wa na kha wẹ, ọlọghọmwa ne I ye na rhie maa wẹ I gele rria abe." 
Job19:6 Wa ma miẹn ọẹn ra i ghẹ Osanobua ọre ọ ru emwi na? Ọ khuẹn ifi ne ọ ya mu mwẹ. 
Job19:7 I datu wẹ obọ ẹre da mwẹ, a ma miẹn ọmwa ne ọ danmwehọ. I tu wẹ ne a bu ohiẹn mwẹ ẹse, a ma miẹn ọmwa ne ọ zẹ yọ." 
Job19:8 Osanobua mu emwi gbe odẹ nẹ, I i miẹn ehe la gberra vbọ, ọ ye ebiebi rhie odẹ mwẹ lẹre nẹ." 
Job19:9 Ọ viọ ẹfe ne I mwẹ hia kpao. Ọ rhia uyi ne I te mwẹ hia a. 
Job19:10 Ọ liki mwẹ vbe igienenẹ. Ọ si idaehọ mwẹ vbọ rhie fua, ọ na sẹ mwẹ rae ne I luẹluẹ wu fua." 
Job19:11 Ohu mu Osanobua, ọ gha vannọ okan yan mwẹ, obọ ne ọ ya mu oghian rẹn, dan ọ re ọ ghi ya mu mwẹ." 
Job19:12 Ọ giẹ iyokuo ẹre ne iran dekun mwẹ. Iran tọnnọ uvun igbinna, iran na ghae ga owa ukpọn mwẹ." 
Job19:13 “Osanobua wẹ ne avbe etẹn mwẹ hia he mwẹ ye otọ, ọrriọvbe I ghi khin ne iran ni te ka rẹnmwẹ yi," 
Job19:14 etẹn mwẹ kevbe avbe ẹse mwẹ hia kpao. 
Job19:15 Emwa ni mu otuẹ rrie owa mwẹ mianmian mwẹ, ibiẹka ikhuo ni re eguọmwadia mwẹ, gha ru mwẹ vbe orhunmwuyẹn kevbe ọrriọvbe." 
Job19:16 I gha tie ọguọmwadia, ẹ i ghi khuẹnniẹn, ọ gha khọn rẹn wẹ te I rinmwian wẹ ne ọ ru iyobọ mẹ." 
Job19:17 Te ọvbokhan mwẹ ghi lẹ ne akọn mwẹ ne ọ wia. Etẹn mwẹ ni sikẹ mwẹ i ghi rrọọ. 
Job19:18 Ibiẹka gha miẹn mwẹ, iran ghi gha zan mwẹ, iran ghi gha giẹ mwẹ." 
Job19:19 Avbe ọse ni sikẹ mwẹ sẹẹ gha miẹn mwẹ, egbe ghi wọ iran ye otọ, te iran ne I te ho ẹmwẹ ọnrẹn sẹẹ ghi gun mwẹ gbinna." 
Job19:20 Te ikpakpa egbe mwẹ ghi munọ ikọnmwẹ yan ugboloko mwẹ; egbeiregbe ne I ya miẹn uhunmwu. 
Job19:21 Ọse mwẹ wa khin! Wa vbe tohan imẹ. Obọ Osanobua gbe mwẹ fi otọ nẹ. 
Job19:22 Te uwa ra vbe gha khu mwẹ khian vbene Osanobua ru ẹe ra? Wa ma he ye zẹ obalọ yọ mwẹ egbe sẹ ra? 
Job19:23 “Vbọ rrọọ nian wẹ a gha miẹn ọmwa ne ọ gha ye ẹmwẹ mwẹ rre. Ne ọ gbẹnnẹ ọẹn ye ebe! 
Job19:24 Ra ne ọ ya ematọn ka ẹmwẹ mwẹ ye okuta. Ne ọ gbẹn ọẹn, ne ọ ghẹ wi ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ." 
Job19:25 Sokpan, mẹ rẹnrẹn ighẹ arhiọnkpa rre ẹrinmwi, ne ọ gha do mu ẹzọ mwẹ gui." 
Job19:26 Uhin vbe iyeke vbe emianmwẹ a ghi rri ikpakpa egbe mwẹ na an nẹ," 
Job19:27 egbe na ọ re I ra ye gha mu khian vbe I gha miẹn Osanobua aro. Te I ra ye aro mwẹ na miẹn ọẹn, ẹ i khian vbe gha re orhunmwuyẹn mẹ.” Udu mwẹ kpaẹn fi ẹko vbe uwa kha re wẹẹ," 
Job19:28 “Vbe ima gha ya zẹ obalọ ye ọre egbe hẹ?” Wa gha gualọ ahogui ne uwa miẹn ehe na hẹ rhu mwẹ. 
Job19:29 Sokpan, banbanna nian, wa gha mu ohan umozo, umozo ne Osanobua ya rria orukhọ ikhi, ne uwa miẹn ehe na rẹn wẹ ọmwa ọkpa rrọọ ne ọ bu ohiẹn." 
Job20:1 Ẹre Zofa ne ovbi e Naamat na wanniẹn wẹẹ, “E Job, u wa vulo mwẹ ẹko kpao. I i ghi zin egbe, I gha wa guan." 
Job20:2  
Job20:3 Ẹmwẹ ne u guanrẹn, ẹbọ ọre u tie re. Sokpan, I gha guara rhie ewanniẹn nuẹn." 
Job20:4 Vbe ne a i na gbe awẹawẹ, wẹ rẹnrẹn wẹ ke ẹghẹ nẹdẹ gha dee, vbe ẹghẹ ne a na yi ọmwa ye agbọn na okao okao," 
Job20:5 a ma he miẹn ọmwa dan ọkpa ne egbe rọkhọe kpee vbotọ. 
Job20:6 Ọ sẹtin wan gbighidi, ọ ghi ya tan sẹ iso, ọ ghi kpọlọ sẹrriọ wẹ uhunmwu ẹnrẹn ghi gha dekan ikpakpa iso," 
Job20:7 sokpan, a gha hoho ẹe kua vbe ebubẹ." 
Job20:8 Te a ra ho ẹre bẹkun vbe imina zẹ vbe umian ne a miẹn vbe asọn. A i ghi dọlegbe miẹn ọẹn ọvbehe. 
Job20:9 A ghi ho ẹre bẹkun vbe ehe ne ọ te ka ye; 
Job20:10 ivbi ẹre ghi mu osa emwi ne o do hẹ hae vbe ọghe avbe ivbiogue. 
Job20:11 Te egbe ẹre te ye vbe ọ ghe ọvbokhan ọ keghi vbe wegbe. Sokpan ọ gha khian ebubẹ ban 
Job20:12 Ọkhọ rhiẹnrhiẹn ọẹn vbe unu sẹrriọ ne ọ na koko eso ye unu ne ọ gha winhin so ẹe. 
Job20:13  
Job20:14 Sokpan ọ ghi sẹ ẹko ọ keghi gha rriara zẹ vbene eruanikeruan ghẹ ghi sẹtin rriara sẹ. 
Job20:15 Ọmwa dan ghi kpa ẹfe ne ọ do hẹ ladian Osanobua ghi rhie ẹre ke uwu ẹkpokhurhu ẹre ladian. 
Job20:16 Emwi ne ọmwa dan mi re te ọ ye vbe eruan te ọ gbe ẹe rua zẹ vbene obi ẹyẹn dan sae. 
Job20:17 Rẹn i ra gha rrọ ne ọ miẹn ẹzẹ ofigbọn oliv. Ra avbe ẹzẹ ne ọ lẹ owọn kevbe ewẹn ẹmila. 
Job20:18 Te ọ ra sẹ emwi ne ọ miẹn ẹsọn yi hia rae; ẹ i ra miẹn otọ ya ye ẹfe ẹre ru," 
Job20:19 rhunmwuda ne ọ na yan gbe iran ọ na vbe gha zẹ ivbiogue kpokpo ọ na ya iwegbe mu owa ne ọmwa ọvbehe bọe. 
Job20:20 Ẹko i vuọn ufifimwẹ ọnrẹn. 
Job20:21 Ọ gha rri evbare, ẹ i vbe kẹrre, banbanna nian, ẹfe ẹre sẹ ufomwẹ nẹ." 
Job20:22 Umamwẹ ọnrẹn ghẹ ghi sẹ ehe ne ọ gha sẹ ukhuamwẹ ọkhọ hia, ghi do rẹnkhẹn ọẹn ruan." 
Job20:23 A giee rri emwi ne ọ ho hia, Osanobua gha ya ohu kevbe okuosu rri ẹre oya." 
Job20:24 Ọ gha te wẹ ne irẹn lẹ fe umozo ematọn, uhanbọ oze ghi hae fua." 
Job20:25 Ifẹnmwẹ ha ikinnegbe ẹre ladian, esagiẹn ọnrẹn gha nọnọ kua vbe ukpe ọre ne ọ fi wainwain. Okpe udu ne ọ kpe ẹghele de gbe ẹre orhiọn." 
Job20:26 Emwi hia ne ọ he te khuan ye otọ fuan an; erhẹn ne obọ ọmwa nagbọn ma hie giẹn ọnrẹn giẹn ẹgbẹe ọre hia a. 
Job20:27 Ẹrinmwi vẹ ọre ua ighẹ orukhọ ọmwa na, agbọn keghi sẹ osẹe gbe ẹe." 
Job20:28 A gha fuẹn ẹfe ẹre hia a. Vbe uwu amẹ ne ọ lẹ ọghe ohu Osanobua. 
Job20:29 Erriọ ọre ẹmwẹ ẹdẹ agbọn emwa dan ye. Ẹmwẹ ẹdẹ agbọn ne Osanobua ghae khẹ iran.” 
Job21:1 Ẹre Job na wanniẹn wẹẹ, “Emwi ne I wẹ ne uwa ya fu mwẹ ẹko rre ọrọre ne uwa danmwehọ ẹmwẹ ne I ta." 
Job21:2  
Job21:3 Wa vbe rhie ẹghẹ ne imẹ ya guan, I ghẹ ghi guan nẹ wa sẹtin gha giẹ." 
Job21:4 “Mẹ vbe ọmwa kẹkan i mwẹ egbe ẹzọ; adeghẹ egbe balọ mwẹ, ọ mwẹ otọ." 
Job21:5 Wa tọn aro mu ghe mwẹ. Ọna ma sẹ ne ọ gha si ọbuaroua ye uwa egbe kevbe ọ gbe obọ gbe unu? 
Job21:6 I gha roro ẹmwẹ emwi ne ọ rruan mwẹ, I ghi gha guọ rrigharrigha." 
Job21:7 “Vbọzẹ ne Osanobua na giẹ emwa dan gha rre agbọn yi, iran ghi tọ, agbọn ghi vbe maa iran?" 
Job21:8 Iran biẹlẹe, iran mu eyẹ, iran ghi tọ ne ehia sirra iran wan." 
Job21:9 Osanobua i mu ọfuan rrie owa iran, iran i vbe rre agbọn afianma." 
Job21:10 Ẹn, ẹmila iran ghi gha muan yọ, ehia ghi gha biẹlẹ vbene ọlọghọmwa i na rrọọ." 
Job21:11 Ivbi iran ghi gha ku, san yo san rre vbe ivbi ohuan." 
Job21:12 Iran ghi ku ye ulamwẹ akpata kevbe ẹrogbo. 
Job21:13 Iran ghi lo ẹdẹ agbọn iran vbe ọfumwegbe, iran ghi wu hẹkpẹe vbe nẹi na rrioya." 
Job21:14 “Emwa dan ghi tama Osanobua wẹ ne ọ sẹ iran rae. Iran i ho ne iran rẹn vbene ọ mwamwa ẹdagbọn iran hẹẹ. 
Job21:15 Iran ro wẹ ẹ i mwẹ esa ne a gha ga Osanobua, ra wẹ ọma ọkpa vbe lae dee, wẹ ne a gha na erhunmwu ghe ẹre." 
Job21:16 Iran ghi wẹ ẹtin ekuabọ iran ọre iran ya ru dinna odẹ, sokpan mẹ i sẹtin ye egbe ba iran, vbe odẹ ne iran roro emwi hia." 
Job21:17 “A he do ukpa ọmwa dan yọ ẹdẹ ra? Osanobua he ya ohu rri ọmwa dan oya ẹdẹ ra? 
Job21:18 Ra ne ọ hoho iran gha rrie zẹ vbe ebe ne ọkakae vbe uwu ẹhoho, ra zẹ vbe ebubẹ ne okpẹhoho bi gha rrie?" 
Job21:19 Wa wẹ, ‘Osanobua rria ọmọ ikhi ye orukhọ erha ẹe.’ Ẹn o, giẹ Osanobua rri emwa orukhọ tobọ iran oya. Gie ẹe rhie ma wẹ rhunmwuda orukhọ iran ọre irẹn na ru ẹe." 
Job21:20 Gie emwa orukhọ ya uhunmwu mu oya iran. Wa giẹ iran miẹn ohu Osanobua ne Udazi vbe egbe iran. 
Job21:21 Ọmwa gha wu nẹ, ọ gele ye vbe kan irẹn ra adeghẹ agbọn ma ivbi ẹre?" 
Job21:22 Ọmwa gha sẹtin gha ma ẹre emwi ighẹ Osanobua ne ọ bu ohiẹn iran ni gbakhia? 
Job21:23 Egbe ghi ran emwa eso rhinrin ya sẹ ẹdẹ ne ọ gha wu. Iran ghi wulo hekpẹẹ vbe uwu ọyẹnmwẹ, vbene egbe iran na ye vborovboro." 
Job21:24  
Job21:25 Eso i vbe danmwẹ ọyẹnmwẹ ghe, iran ghi gha rre ekhọe orriara, uwu ẹre ọ re iran vbe wulo yi." 
Job21:26 Sokpan obọkpa nọ, te ehia wulo, a ghi tọnnọ iran ye otọ, ọkhọe ghi ma rhu iran." 
Job21:27 I rẹn ekhọe otilua ne uwa mwẹ. Wa ghi wẹẹ, ‘Owa okpọmwa nii ghi vbo nian, ọmwa nii ne ọ yin uyinmwẹ dan?’" 
Job21:28 Wẹ ma he gu ọmwa ne ọ khian ladian gha iyẹn ẹdẹ ra? 
Job21:29 U ma rẹn iyẹn ne iran do gha na sẹ owa? 
Job21:30 Ẹdẹ ne ohu gha mu Osanobua, ọ na wẹ rẹn ra rri emwa oya, ọmwa dan ọ re ọ la ban ẹghẹ hia." 
Job21:31 A i miẹn ọmwa ne ọ ba ọmwa dan ifi ẹzọ, ra ne ọ rria ẹre ikhi ye emwi dan hia ne ọ he ru." 
Job21:32 A gha mu ẹẹn gha rrie itẹ, gha rrie idin ẹnrẹn ne a tan obọ lẹga." 
Job21:33 Arriaisẹn vbe inu ihe ne ọkhin ghi bi lele iran ni muẹn rrie itẹ, uhin ighẹ ọghọ ọghọ ọ re ekẹn vbe ya degue ikun ẹnrẹn." 
Job21:34 Ẹre uwẹ na, na ho ne u gha ya ẹmwẹ nọ ma khian rẹn fu mwẹ ẹko rre, ohoghe ọre ewanniẹn ne u rhie rre hia khin!”" 
Job22:1 Ẹre Ẹlifaz ne ovbi ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Tẹman na wanniẹn wẹẹ, “Ọmwa ọkpa rrọ ra, giẹ a kha wẹ rẹn ọ ghi wa wan sẹ, ne ọ mwẹ emwi ne ọ ye ne Osanobua?" 
Job22:2  
Job22:3 Emwi esi ne u ru vbe zẹ ẹfe ku Osanobua ra, ra, ne u na maa mwẹ emwi ne ọ ru ne ẹẹn?" 
Job22:4 Ẹ i re ne u na mu ohan Osanobua ọ re ọ si ẹe ne ọ na zẹ okan muẹn, ọ na tie ruẹ ye erhan ezọ?" 
Job22:5 Ẹn o, rhunmwuda ne u na ru orukhọ ne ọ sẹrriọ nọ. Rhunmwuda emwi dan ne u ru hia nọ." 
Job22:6 Ne ọtuẹn miẹn ehe na ha osa ne ọ rriọ re, u keghi miẹn ẹre ukpọn hia, u ma ghi vbe sẹ ọkpa rae nẹ rhie kinnọ ẹkun." 
Job22:7 U ma samẹ ne iran ne egbe wọre wọn, u ma rhie evbare ne ne ohanmwẹ gbe." 
Job22:8 Rhunmwuda ne u na mwẹ ukpo ẹtin ne u ye, u keghi rhan obọ gba otọe hia." 
Job22:9 Ẹ i re u ma ru iyobọ ne avbe ẹgbẹ ọkpa, sokpan deba ọnii, u keghi do avbe emọ ne ẹ i mwẹ erha emwi hẹ, u na gha ru iran khọ." 
Job22:10 Eban nian, uye hia lẹga ruẹ, ohan ọbanban ọ re ọ ghi muẹn na." 
Job22:11 Ebiebi so sẹrriọ wẹ, u i ghi bẹghe odẹ, ẹzẹ lẹ rhuẹ ginna otọ." 
Job22:12 Ẹ i re ehe ne ọ yo sẹẹ vbe ẹrinmwi ọ re Osanobua ye, ọ ghi gha ghe avbe orhọnmwẹ ginna otọ, egbe ne iran rhe ya rre ehe ne ọ yo." 
Job22:13 Sevba, te uwẹ ye nọ wẹẹ, ‘De emwi ne Osanobua rẹnrẹn? Ikpakpaiso degue ẹre nẹ, vbe ọ ghi na sẹtin gha bu ohiẹn ima hẹ?’" 
Job22:14 Te uwẹ ro wẹ ikpakpa iso ne ọ mwẹ imi degue ẹre odẹ ra? Vbe ehe ne ọ na khian vbe uwu ne ọ rre ẹkpo agbọn vbe ẹrinmwi. 
Job22:15 “Ẹire te uwẹ ghi wa ta ẹe nẹ nian wẹ, odẹ ne ọmwa dan lele, ọ re uwẹ ra vbe gha la?" 
Job22:16 Sokpan, orogho lẹ iran gha rrie, vbe ọ ma he sẹ ẹghẹ iran." 
Job22:17 Avbe emwa ni he Osanobua ye otọ ọ re ena khin, iran na yayi wẹ ẹ i miẹn emwi ru iran re." 
Job22:18 Vbe rriọ Osanobua, ọ re ọ zẹ agbọn ne ọ maa iran, mẹ ma rẹn vbene emwa dan ro iro hẹ." 
Job22:19 Emwa esi ghi gha ghọghọ, emwa ni ma rria abe ghi vbe gha giẹ. Vbe iran gha miẹn ighẹ a rri emwa dan oya." 
Job22:20 A fuẹn emwi hia ne ọmwa dan mwẹ uan, erhẹn keghi giẹn emwikemwi ne ọ te kẹe." 
Job22:21 “E Job, ya dọlọ ne Osanobua ruẹ, ghẹ ghi ka ẹe ye oghian ruẹn; u gha lae vberriọ, ọ gha fiangbe uẹ." 
Job22:22 Gha ya emwi ne ọ ma ruẹn re ru emwi rhie ẹmwẹ ọnrẹn mwẹ vbe ekhọe ruẹ. 
Job22:23 Ẹn, hẹko ya imuegberriotọ werriegbe bu Osanobua. Ne u kie ehia ukpe ighẹ avbe emwi dan ne a ru vbe owa ruẹ." 
Job22:24 Filo avbe igoru ruẹ kua; hihiẹ avbe igoru ruẹ ni maa sẹẹ ye otọ ẹzẹ ne amẹ i ghi ye. 
Job22:25 Gie Osanobua ne Oghodua gha re igoru ruẹ ne u vbe giẹ irẹn gha re esiliva ne a si gbo ne uẹn. 
Job22:26 Ẹghẹ nii, te u gha mu ẹtin yan Osanobua vbe ẹghẹ hia. U ghi do miẹn wẹ obọ ẹre oghọghọ ruẹ kerre." 
Job22:27 U gha na erhunmwu, ọ ghi họn we ghi vbe gha ha emwi ne u ve." 
Job22:28 Emwi ne u ru hia ghi dinna odẹ ne uẹn uwan mwẹ ghi gha wan ye odẹ ne u la. 
Job22:29 Osanobua si ọmwa itengbemu gbe otọ ọ keghi miẹn ne ọ mu egbe rriotọ fan. 
Job22:30 Ọ gha miẹn ruẹn fan adeghẹ u ma rria a be adeghẹ uyinmwẹ ruẹn gba ẹe.” 
Job23:1 E Job keghi wanniẹn wẹẹ, “Te I ye sọtẹ ọre, I na vbe gui ẹzọ ẹre ighẹ Osanobua I i sẹtin dobọ ikhiẹkhiẹ egbe yi." 
Job23:2  
Job23:3 Vbọrrọ nian wẹ I rẹn ehe ne I gha na miẹn ọẹn kevbe wẹ I rẹn vbene a ya sẹ ehe ne ọ ye hẹ. 
Job23:4 Te I gha ya gui ẹzọ mwẹ ma rẹn I gha talọ ẹmwẹ hia ni gha ya ẹzọ mwẹ dia. 
Job23:5 I ho ne I rẹn vbene ọ gha te kha hẹ, kevbe ewanniẹn ne ọ gha te rhie mẹ." 
Job23:6 Osanobua gha te wa ya ẹtin ẹnrẹn hia gunmwẹ gbinna ra? Ẹn o, ọ gha danmwehọ vbe i a gha guan." 
Job23:7 Ekhọe mwẹ ma, I gha te gu Osanobua zẹ iro, ọ gha te bu asẹ mẹ, vbene a na ta ẹe mu olọ yan rẹn." 
Job23:8 “I ya gualọ odẹ Ahọ, Osanobua i rre odọ, I vbe ya gualọ odẹ Orrie, I ma miẹn ọẹn." 
Job23:9 Osanobua winna nẹ vbe odẹ Okuo kevbe Ekẹn, sokpan, mẹ ma he miẹn ọẹn." 
Job23:10 Sevba, Osanobua rẹn dọmwadẹ owẹ ni I zẹ vbotọ. Ọ gha danmwẹ mwẹ ghe, ọ gha miẹn wẹ, I i mwẹ iruẹn." 
Job23:11 Odẹ ne ọ zẹ ye otọ ọ re I wa lele I i vbe ghe obọ na ra obọ nii. 
Job23:12 Emwi ne Osanobua tae ọ re I ru vbe ẹghẹ hia; emwi ne ọ ho ọre I ru, ẹ i re ọghomwẹ." 
Job23:13 “Rẹn i fi werriẹ, a i miẹn ne ọ sẹtin gu ẹe vẹn. Ra ne ọ da ẹre obọ emwi ne ọ ho ne ọ ru yi." 
Job23:14 Ọ gha mu emwamwa ne ọ mwamwa ye otọ mẹ sẹ. Ọkpa kẹkan vbe uwu emwamwa ni bun ne ọ mwẹ ọre ọnii khin. 
Job23:15 Ohan mu mwẹ, I kegha guọ vbe odaro ẹre." 
Job23:16 Osanobua ne Udazi ya mwẹ khian avbiẹrẹ nẹ, Osanobua ọ re ohan rẹn mu mwẹ ighẹ ẹ i re ebiebi. A gha rhe miẹn wẹ, nene ebiebi rhu mwẹ aro nẹ.”" 
Job23:17  
Job24:1 “Vbọzẹ ne Osanobua na ma rhie ẹghẹ ibuohiẹn ye otọ yi. Ẹdẹ ohiẹn ata ne iran ni ga ẹe? 
Job24:2 “Emwa ghi gha silo irri ne a ya fian uwu, ne iran miẹn ehe na mu otọ ba otọ. Iran gha du ohuan mu, iran ghi ya mu ba oghẹn ohuan iran." 
Job24:3 Iran ghi mu ekẹtẹkẹtẹ ọghe emọ ne ẹ i mwẹ erha, iran ghi da ẹkhuia ẹmila ẹgbẹ yi ọ te do ha iran osa ne ọ re vbe obọ iran." 
Job24:4 Iran i giẹ emwi ne ọ khẹ ke ovbiogue sẹ ọre obọ. Iran ghi khu e ne ẹ i mwẹ ne ọ ya lẹre. 
Job24:5 “Rhunmwuda ọnii, avbe ivbiogue ghi gha gualọ evbare, vbe ẹgbo ne ọ kae, zẹ vbe ekẹtẹkẹtẹ oha. Ehe ọvbehe i ghi rrọ ne iran na miẹn evbare rhie ne emọ." 
Job24:6 Iran imwẹ ugbo ne a na rhọ emwi okọ, iran ghi ya gha rhọ ni kharha kua vbe ugbo emwa dan." 
Job24:7 Asọn gha rre, iran ghi lovbiẹ vbe ne a i na ye ukpọn hin egbe. Emwi ne iran ya gbe oni i rrọ." 
Job24:8 Amẹ ni rhọ vbe uhunmwu oke ghi gbe iran. Iran ghi ya si mama ye ọkpẹn okuta nekhua ne ọ degue iran. 
Job24:9 “Emwa dan ghi gha ya emobọ ne ẹ i mwẹ erha ru eviẹn, ọ ghi viọ ivbi ovbiogue ya ha osa." 
Job24:10 Sokpan, te ivbiogue gha ya irhunmwirhun ladian. Ohanmwẹ ghi gha gbe iran vbe iran a gha fian ọka." 
Job24:11 Iran ghi gha minọ ẹvbi oliv ladian, iran ghi vbe minọ ayọn alimo ladian, sokpan, ovbamẹ amẹ ghi gha gbe iran tobọ iran." 
Job24:12 Iran ne a kuanrẹn kevbe ni wulo khian, gha tulo vbe avbe ore nekhua, sokpan, Osanobua i zẹ ye erhunmwu iran." 
Job24:13 “Emwa eso rrọ ni he uwanmwẹ ye otọ. Iran ma rẹn otọ ẹre ra ne iran la ehe ne ọ viọ iran la. 
Job24:14 Ẹdẹ gha da gbe, izigha ghi kpaegbe, ọ ghi ladian ya gbe ovbiogue ua, asọn gha rre, ọ ghi gha rha." 
Job24:15 Ọmwa ne ọ miẹn amwẹ ẹrrẹe ghi gha khẹ ne ẹdẹ gha gue, ọ ghi mu emwi gue aro ne ọmwarhọkpa ghẹ bẹghe irẹn." 
Job24:16 Asọn gha rre, oyi ghi gbe urho la owa, sokpan, ọ gha sẹ avan, iran ghi lẹre, iran ghi gha lẹ ne uwanmwẹ." 
Job24:17 Ohan uwanmwẹ vbe mu iran, sokpan asọn i mwẹ orrirri vbe obọ iran." 
Job24:18 “Orogho ghi lẹ emwa dan kua Osanobua fi otọ ẹre unu. Ẹ i ghi yo ya winna vbe ogba azara ẹre. 
Job24:19 Zẹ vbe ne esia khian ne ahobẹkun vbe owowo kevbe uyunmwu, erriọ ọ re a ho ọmwa dan bẹkun vbe otọe emwa ni ma he wulo." 
Job24:20 Uhin ighẹ iye ẹe ma ghi ye ẹre rre nian, ọkhọe rriọ rua, ọ kẹkẹ ua vbe erhan ne ọ de." 
Job24:21 Emwi vberriọ mian rẹn rhunmwuda obọ dan ne ọ ya mu avbe ẹgbẹ, ọ ma vbe tohan avbe agan." 
Job24:22 Osanobua ya ẹtin ẹnrẹn fuẹn iran ni wegbe ua. Osanobua ru emwi, ọmworukhọ wu fua." 
Job24:23 Osanobua sẹtin giee gha rrọọ vbe a i mwẹ ẹbe, sokpan ọ wa baba ẹe vbe ẹghẹ hia." 
Job24:24 Agbọn ghi gha maa ọmwa dan vbe ovbi ẹghẹ kherhe, sokpan, banbanna, ọ ghi luẹluẹ ua vbe irunmwu. Zẹ vbe ukhu emwi okọ ne a fian gbotọ." 
Job24:25 De ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹtin kha yi ighe ẹ i re erriọ ọ na gele ye? Ọmwa rhọkpa gha sẹtin rhie maa ra wẹ, ẹmwẹ ne I ta ẹe i re ẹmwata?”" 
Job25:1 Ẹre Bildad ne ovbi ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Siua na wanniẹn wẹẹ, “Osanobua mwẹ ẹtin, wa giẹ emwa hia ya ohan mudia vbe odaro ẹre. Ọ ya ọfumwegbe mu arriọba ẹrinmwi ẹnrẹn." 
Job25:2  
Job25:3 A gha miẹn ne ọ gha sẹtin ka avbe odibo ni ga ẹe ra? Ihe ọkpa rrọọ ra ne uwanmwẹ Osanobua i na wan muotọ? 
Job25:4 A gha miẹn ọmwa ne ọ re ọmwata kevbe ne ẹ i mwẹ iruẹn vbe odaro Osanobua ra? 
Job25:5 Uki ne arengbe i mwẹ uwanmwẹ vbe odaro ẹre, a ma wẹ ne avbe orhọnmwẹ gha re ne ẹ i mwẹ iruẹn." 
Job25:6 Inu-inu ghi nọ ne ọmwa nagbọn, ne ọkhọe, ne atete! De ive ne ọ rre ọmwa uhunmwu vbe odaro Osanobua?”" 
Job26:1 Ẹre na wanniẹn wẹẹ, “U miẹn iyobọ ne u ru mẹ na, mẹ ne ogue ne mitanmitan." 
Job26:2  
Job26:3 U ru ibude esi, u kevbe ghae vbe irẹnmwi ruẹn ne akpa vbene I ye na." 
Job26:4 De ọmwa ne uwẹ ro ighẹ ọ gha họn ẹmwẹ uwẹ na hia? Gha ọ gua ekhọe ruẹ kpao ne u ya guan vbenian na? 
Job26:5 “Orhiọn iran ni wulo nẹ gha guọ vbe uwu amẹ ne ọ rre ototọ otọe na. 
Job26:6 Odaro Osanobua ọ re agbọn iran ni wulo nẹ ye. Emwi ne ọ degue ẹre hin ehe ne ọ ye rre i rrọ. 
Job26:7 Osanobua ọ re ọ tan iso ne ọrre odẹ okuọ. Ọ na mu agbọn na rrọ ye ideghedeghe. 
Job26:8 Osanobua ọre ọ ye amẹ vuọn ikpakpa iso, ọ ma vbe giẹ ukhuamwẹ ihẹ ne ọ mu, ya ẹe vẹ ua." 
Job26:9 Ọ rhie uki ne ọ koo urro lẹre ye iyeke okuku amẹ. 
Job26:10 Ọ ya uviẹn okhiokhi ne ọ vin ye okun, ọ ma vbe giẹ ukhuamwẹ ihẹ ne ọ mu, ya ẹe vẹ ua, wannọ uwanmwẹ hin ebiebi rre." 
Job26:11 Ọ gha zẹ aro mu avbe orre ni da iso yi, ohan ghi ya iran gha guọ, vbe gha mian zẹghẹzẹghẹ." 
Job26:12 Ẹtin ẹnrẹn ọ re ọ khọnmiotọ okun. Ẹwaẹn ẹnrẹn ọ re ọ ya fuẹn Rehab ne Ugbogiorinmwi. 
Job26:13 Uhiọnrọnmwẹ ọnrẹn ọ re ọ ya iso huan, obọ ẹre ọ re ọ gbe ugbogiorinmwi ne ọ te ra lẹfua." 
Job26:14 Sokpan, ẹmwẹ ne ọ ya ha ọmwa ehọ, ọ re ena khin vbe ekpa ẹtin ẹnrẹn. Ewẹwẹwẹ ne ọ fi la ehọ. De ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹtin rẹn vbene ọ gele kpọlọ sẹ he ẹe?”" 
Job27:1 E Job keghi dọlegbe suẹn gha guan ọ wẹẹ, “I ya ẹe vin ihẹn ighẹ Osanobua ne Udazi ne ọ rrọọ, ne ọ ma giẹ a bu asẹ mẹ. Ọ na ya ẹdẹ agbọn mwẹ khian nọ rriara wẹ," 
Job27:2  
Job27:3 vbe uwu ẹghẹ ne Osanobua gha rhie mẹ ya hiọnrọn sẹ," 
Job27:4 akhuarhamwunu mwẹ i ra ta ẹmwẹ dan, aranmwẹ mwẹ i ra ta ohoghe." 
Job27:5 I i ra ta ẹe ẹdẹ ighẹ ẹmwata ọ re uwa na ta; te I ra mu ẹẹn gba ye unu gha ta wẹ I ma rriabe, ọ te do sẹ ẹdẹ ne I ra wu." 
Job27:6 “Te I ra gha ta ẹe khian ighẹ I ma rukhọ; ekhọe mwẹ ma bu abe gbe mwẹ. 
Job27:7 “Iran hia ni mu aro da mwẹ gha gunmwẹ gbinna, te a gha rri iran oya zẹvbe emwa dan ni i ru emwi esi." 
Job27:8 De idaehọ ne emwa dan mwẹ yi, vbe ẹghẹ ne Osanobua gha na nọ orhiọn iran vbe obọ iran." 
Job27:9 Ukpokpo gha rre, Osanobua gha họn utumwẹ iran ra?" 
Job27:10 Oghogho ne ọ rhie rre gha te gha yẹ iran. Te iran gha na erhunmwu gha ere vbe ẹghẹ hia. 
Job27:11 “Gunmwẹ ma ruẹn vbene orhiọn Osanobua kpọlọ hẹ, ne I vbe rhan otọ emwi ne Osa ne Udazi mwamwa ye otọ." 
Job27:12 Ẹn o, a rhe ta ẹẹ na, wa tobọ uwa ya aro uwa miẹn ọẹn nẹ; vbe uwa a ghi na guan ẹmwẹ oya vberriọ hẹ yi?" 
Job27:13 “Vbe nian zẹẹ ọre Osanobua ya rria iran ikhi ighẹ emwa dan ne isamwisan. 
Job27:14 Iran sẹtin gha mwẹ emọ ikpia nibun sokpan, okuo ọre iran gha na gbele ehia a. Ivbi iran ma he miẹn evbare re ne ẹko vuọn ẹdẹ." 
Job27:15 Iran ni vbe miẹn uhunmwu vbọ, emianmwẹ ọ ra gbele iran. A mwẹ iran ni de ẹgbẹe i ra vbe khiẹ iran." 
Job27:16 Ọmwadan sẹtin gha mwẹ esiliva ne ẹ i sẹtin ka, kevbe avbe ukpon ni bun sẹẹ ne ọmwaikọmwa gha sẹtin lo." 
Job27:17 Sokpan emwa esi esi ọre ọ ra do rhuan ukpọn ni, kevbe emwa ekhọe esi eso ọre ọ ra viọ esiliva ni." 
Job27:18 Ọmwa dan ghi bọlọ owa zẹ vbe ido akpakpa, ra zẹ vbe irhu ọviẹn ne ọ khẹ ugbo," 
Job27:19 Uhukpa, ẹdẹ ọkpa, iran ya lovbiẹ zẹ vbe ọmwa ẹfe, iran ghẹ ghi rhiọrre, iran ghi ho ẹfe iran bẹkun." 
Job27:20 Orrirri gha gbe ku iran zẹ vbe okpamẹ udomwurri; efi ne ọ lae vbe asọn ghi kpolo iran gha rrie," 
Job27:21 ẹhoho odẹ ahọ ghi kpolo iran hin owa iran rre; 
Job27:22 ọ gha hoho yan iran vbe ne ẹ i na mwẹ itohan. Vbe iran gha te gha ziga ne iran lẹkua. 
Job27:23 Ẹhoho ghi gha so yan iran vbene iran ya rhulẹ khian ni, Ọ ghi gha ye ẹtin ọfuan runran iran.”" 
Job28:1 “A miẹn uvun ne a kẹ zẹlẹ esiliva ladian vbe uwu otọ; a miẹn ehe ne a na ya erhẹn kpe igoru huan. 
Job28:2 Uwu otọ ọ re emwa ke tọnnọ ematọn ladian, o ghi vbe ranran oze ke uwu okuta ladian." 
Job28:3 Emwa ye gualotọ ehe ne ọ dinmwi vbe uwu otọ. Iran ghi gualotọ ehe ne ọ dinmwi vbe uwu otọ. Iran ghi gha tọnnọ gualọ okuta nekhua khian vbe ebiebi. 
Job28:4 Ehe ne ọ wa rrei ne ọmwa iye, Ra wẹ ne owẹ ọmwa ma he rhanmwẹ ọẹn ẹdẹ. Emwa ghi tọnnọ uvun ne a ke zẹlẹ emwi ighobioye ladian, iran ghi sikan mu irri vbe uwu uvun nii." 
Job28:5 Uwu otọ ọ re evbare ke zọ ladian, Sokpan, vbe ototọ ẹre ighẹ nene otọe na, a yanghan emwi hia a, a kevbe rẹnkhẹn ehia a." 
Job28:6 E safaya rre uwu okuta ni rre otọ, igoru vbe rre ebubẹ ni rrọọ." 
Job28:7 Ahua i miẹn ehe ne a la la uvun emwi ighobioye vbe uwu otọ, ugu i vbe tin la uhunmwu iran gberra." 
Job28:8 Oduma ra aranmwẹ dan ọvbehe, ne ọ la odẹ ne ọ de ivbiẹ ni i rrọọ." 
Job28:9 “Emwa ye tọnnọ uwu okuta ne ọ wegbe sẹẹ, iran tọnnọ oke nekhua la ẹzi hẹ kua." 
Job28:10 Ehe ne iran na tọnnọ uvun zẹ odẹ la uwu okuta gberra ni, iran ghi gha miẹn avbe okuta ighobioye." 
Job28:11 Iran tọnnọ uvun ya sẹ ehe ne ẹzẹ na suẹn. Iran wọlọ otọ emwi ni rhie egbe lẹre ladian. 
Job28:12 “Sokpan de ehe ne a gha na miẹn ẹwaẹn? De ehe ne a gha na ruẹ vbene a ya miẹn ẹwaẹn? 
Job28:13 A i miẹn ewaẹn vbe uwu ẹbu emwa, ọmwa ne ọ mobọ rẹn igho ẹre ẹ i rrọ." 
Job28:14 Odin avbe okun kevbe ẹzẹ nekhua, ta ẹe wẹ a i ra miẹn ẹwaẹn vbe evba." 
Job28:15 A i sẹtin ya esiliva ra igoru dẹ ọẹ," 
Job28:16 Igoru ne ọ ghi maa sẹẹ, ra ikpẹrọnmwọ ighobioye. I sẹtin vba igho ẹre." 
Job28:17 Igho ẹre sẹẹ ọghe igoru, sẹ ovbiukpu itegbe ra ukpu ne ọ ghi mose sẹẹ ehia." 
Job28:18 Igho ẹwaẹn kpọlọ sẹ, igho ivie ra ekristal ra e rupi." 
Job28:19 Etopas ne ọ mose sẹ kevbe igoru ne ọ huan sẹẹ ehia, i zẹdẹ re ne a ya giẹ ive ẹwaẹn." 
Job28:20 “De ehe ne ẹwaẹn ghi ke rre yi khekherriọ? De ehe ne ima gha na ya ruẹ vbene a ya rẹn otọ emwi hẹ? 
Job28:21 Emwi ne a yi ọkpa ne ọ gha sẹtin bẹghe ẹre i rrọọ. Ya sẹ egbe ahianmwẹ ne ọ tin khian. 
Job28:22 Uwu kevbe ọfuan tobọ iran miẹnkue wẹẹ, ‘Awẹawẹ ọ re iran he họn vbe ekpa ẹre.’" 
Job28:23 “Osanobua ọkpa ọ re ọ rẹn nene odẹ. Ọ rẹn ehe ne a gha na miẹn ẹwaẹn. 
Job28:24 Rhunmwuda, te irẹn bẹghe ehe ne agbọn sẹe. Ọ bẹghe emwi hia, ni rre ototọ iso." 
Job28:25 Ẹghẹ ne Osanobua na rhie ẹtin ẹhoho ne ẹẹn, ne ọ na vbe mwa vbene okun gha kpọlọ sẹ hẹ." 
Job28:26 Ẹghẹ ne Osanobua na ta ehe ne amẹ gha gha rhọ yi, kevbe odẹ ne avan nukhunmwu gha khian la." 
Job28:27 Ẹghẹ nii ọ re irẹn na miẹn Ẹwaẹn, ọ na mwa inu igho ẹre ghe — rẹn keghi ya obọ yọ vberriọ." 
Job28:28 Osanobua keghi tama emwa nagbọn wẹẹ, ‘Deghẹ wa ho ne uwa gha wan, wa ghi gha ya ọghọ ne Nọyaẹnmwa. Ne uwa miẹn ehe na rẹn otọ emwi, te uwa gha fiwerriẹ hin ọkhọ rre.’ ”" 
Job29:1 E Job keghi dọlegbe suẹn gha guan, ọ wẹẹ," 
Job29:2 “Akpawẹ ẹdagbọn mwẹ gha ye sẹtin do dọlegbe gha ye vbene ọ te ye ẹkpo ne Osanobua na gha wan lẹga mwẹ nian. 
Job29:3 Ẹghẹ nii, te Osanobua wa gha gun mwẹ rrọ vbe ẹghẹ hia. Ọ na gha rhie uwanmwẹ mẹ vbe I a gha khian vbe ebiebi." 
Job29:4 Ẹghẹ nii, agbọn keghi wa gha ma mwẹ. A gu Osanobua ru ẹse kevbe tan ifuẹn gue owa mwẹ." 
Job29:5 Ẹghẹ nii, Osanobua ne Udazi gunmwẹ rrọ, avbe ivbi mwẹ hia keghi yọyọ lẹga mwẹ." 
Job29:6 Ewẹn ẹmila kevbe ọghe ẹwe mwẹ, keghi gha la ẹsẹse, erhan oliv mwẹ kegha wan vbe otọ ne okuta ghi na bun sẹ." 
Job29:7 Ediọn ẹvbo gha ko, I na tota ba iran," 
Job29:8 ibiẹka gha bẹghe mwẹ, iran ghi hẹko biegbe, eniwanrẹn ghi gha kpaegbe ya ọghọ mẹ." 
Job29:9 Avbe ọkaolotu emwa ghi dobọ ẹmwẹ ne a guan yi," 
Job29:10 avbe emwa ni hin ukhuan sẹẹ ghi gbẹdọ. 
Job29:11 “Ọmwa ne ọ rhirhi miẹn mwẹ, ra ni rẹn mwẹ, gha miẹn emwi ọkpa ne ọ maa ta vbe ekpa mwẹ wẹ ghe emwi ne I ru." 
Job29:12 Avbe ivbiogue gha tu ladian, I ghi yi iran obọ. I kegha ru iyohọ ne avbe emọ ne ẹ i mwẹ erha, ni ma miẹn emwa tu ma." 
Job29:13 Emwa ne ẹmwẹ agbọn hie ẹre uke kegha tian mwẹ, I keghi yi avbe ẹgbẹ obọ ne ẹkun sẹ iran otọ." 
Job29:14 Uhẹn uhẹn ọ re I hẹko gha ru emwi re. 
Job29:15 I kegha re aro ne arhuaro, kevbe owẹ ne uke." 
Job29:16 I keghi mudia ye ihe erha ne ivbiogue, I na gha mu ẹzọ orhunmwuyẹn ne ẹ i mwẹ evbare gui." 
Job29:17 I fuẹn ẹtin emwa dan an, I na miẹn avbe oghunmwu iran fan." 
Job29:18 “Te I wa rhie aro ye utọmwẹ vbe ẹghẹ hia, kevbe ne I wu vbe ọfumwegbe ye owa." 
Job29:19 I keghi ye vbe erhan ne inian rẹn miẹn amẹ vbe ẹghẹ hia kevbe ne evbu tuo ye avbe abọ ẹre. 
Job29:20 Te emwa hia wa gha tian mwẹ khian, orhiọn mwẹ ma vbe hiẹ mwẹ ghe ẹdẹ ọkpa." 
Job29:21 I gha bu emwa ude, iran ghi hunwan. Iran ghi kakabọ danmwehọ ẹmwẹ ne I ta;" 
Job29:22 iran i vbe miẹn ẹmwẹ rhie ba ẹre vbe I a guan fo nẹ. Ẹmwẹ ghi la ekhọe zẹ vbe ikpamẹ," 
Job29:23 emwa hia ọ re iran wa maa na, zẹ vbene amẹ maa ne ọwẹe vbe uyunmwu." 
Job29:24 I ghi mumu ogiẹ yan iran vbe ẹtin a te fo iran nẹ, aro ne rọkhọ mwẹ ghi rhie igiọdu ne iran." 
Job29:25 I ghi mu unu gha ta emwi ne a gha ru, I ghi ke odaro ne iran zẹ vbene ọba ke odaro ne ivbiyokuo irẹn. I ghi fu iran ẹko rre vbe egbe a ghi wọ iran ye otọ nẹ.”" 
Job30:1 Sokpan, emwa ni ma sẹ ihua mwẹ gha ya mwẹ gbe ogie nian. Emwa ne erha iran ma sẹ ọmwa ne I gha giẹ lele ekita mwẹ, ne iran ya gha gbe aro ghe ohuan mwẹ." 
Job30:2 Emwa ne esagiẹn ọnrẹn wọn ẹvbi nẹ, ne obọ ẹre ighi guọ emwi rhọkpa ya ru mẹ." 
Job30:3 Obọ gbe iran sẹ vberriọ, wẹ rhunmwuda ohanmwẹ dan ne o gbe iran, iran ghi gha lue inian erhan ni kaka nẹ; vbe asọn kevbe ehe ne ọ de ivbiẹ." 
Job30:4 Iran vbọlọ ivbi erhan ato gha re, uhin ya sẹ egbe erhan owẹ ne ẹ i mwẹ omiẹnmiẹn," 
Job30:5 Te emwa hia kpe khulo iran ladian, vbene a miẹn wẹ oyi ọ re iran go yan." 
Job30:6 Iran na ya gha di uvun okuta ya, avbe uvun ne a tọnnọ ye ototọ oke." 
Job30:7 Iran ghi gha go vbe oha zẹ vbe atita, iran ghi ma yan egbe vbe ototọ erhan." 
Job30:8 Ẹwobi emwa ni ku ogboi nẹ, a keghi khulo iran hin ẹvbo rre." 
Job30:9 “Eban nian, mẹ iran ghi do gha giẹ, emwi igbogiẹ ọ re I ghi khin ne iran." 
Job30:10 Te iran ghi sọnnọ mwẹ, iran wẹ iran maa sẹ mwẹ gbe, iran gha bẹghe mwẹ, iran ghi gha tulo asẹn yọ mwẹ aro." 
Job30:11 Rhunmwuda ne Osanobua na ya mwẹ khian ne ọ mitan ne ẹ i miẹn emwi ru. Te iran ghi wa ye ẹtin iran hia ye ọkpankpan yọ mwẹ egbe. 
Job30:12 Otu igbinna ẹrhia na keghi wa kugbe dekun mwẹ, iran zẹ mwẹ khu; iran mu egbe igbinna ọnaghinọ." 
Job30:13 Iran khui ehe ne I gha la lẹfua, iran na wẹ ne iran wa fuẹn mwẹ uan; a i miẹn ọmwa ne ọ wẹ iran dobọyi." 
Job30:14 Iran ya uhunmwu ha ehe ne I ya khẹ egbe, iran sannọ yan mwẹ ke odukhunmwu rre," 
Job30:15 afianma gbe mwẹ fi otọ; uyi mwẹ hoho ua zẹ vbe ẹhoho ne ọ vẹ kua. Kevbe emwi ẹfe mwẹ zẹ vbe okuku amẹ. 
Job30:16 “Odẹ ẹrinmwi ọre I ghi gbẹn na; oya ne I re i mwẹ erọkhọrọkhọ. 
Job30:17 Asọn gha rre, ugboloko hia ghi gha kpe mwẹ; obalọ ne ọ rriọmwẹ uan i dobọyi." 
Job30:18 Osanobua dobọ mu mwẹ urhu nẹ, ọ keghi khiẹn ukpọn yọ mwẹ ẹkun." 
Job30:19 Ọ rhie mwẹ fianmwẹ otọ vbe uwu ọrho; mẹ ma ghi ma sẹ iruẹn tobọ ọre. 
Job30:20 “I tu tie ruẹ Osanobua, sokpan u ma khuẹnniẹn mwẹ, I vbe na erhunmwu, u ma zẹ yọ mwẹ ẹre." 
Job30:21 Obọ dan ọ re uwa ya mu mwẹ na, u wa ya ẹtin ruẹn hia gha khu mwẹ khian." 
Job30:22 U giẹ ẹhoho hoho mwẹ gha rrie, u kegha fi mwẹ yo fi mwẹ rre, vbe uwu okpẹhoho amẹ ne ọ gbinna." 
Job30:23 I rẹnrẹn ighẹ uwu ọ re u rhie mwẹ rrie na, ẹmwẹ agbọn ne a mwamwa khẹ emwa hia." 
Job30:24 Vbu a na gu ọmwa ne ẹki agbọn gbe nẹ gbinna hẹ yi? Ọmwa ne ẹ i ra miẹn emwi ru gberra, ne ọ diguẹ nọ itohan." 
Job30:25 Mẹ ma gu enọmiẹn ibaro viẹ ra? Ọma vbe danmwẹ ne iran ne ẹ i mwẹ. 
Job30:26 Ọyẹnmwẹ kevbe uwanmwẹ ọre I te rhie aro yi, sokpan ibaro kevbe ebiebi ọ re I ghi miẹn." 
Job30:27 Ohawa kevbe obalọ yanghan mwẹ uan, oya ke ẹdẹ dinna ẹdẹ ọ re I re." 
Job30:28 Ekhọe akhiẹ ọ re I dada khian, vbene uwanmwẹ ọviẹn i na vbe rrọ. I kpaegbe vbe aro agbọn hia rinmwian iyobọ." 
Job30:29 Urhu mwẹ keghi vuọn ne akhiẹ kevbe ohioro, ọ yevbe utumwẹ akuaghagha ra ugomugo." 
Job30:30 Ikpakpa egbe mwẹ keghi khian enekhui, egbe mwẹ tọn rhunmwuda ọnii." 
Job30:31 Ehe ne I na te họn emwi ne a kpe ne ọ rhiẹnrhiẹn yi, ẹzọ uwunu kevbe eve ọ re I ghi họn vbọ.”" 
Job31:1 “Te I wa mobọ yan rẹn, ne I ghẹ ghe ọmọ okhuo ne a ro mwẹ viẹn yọ." 
Job31:2 Vbe Osanobua ne Udazi ru ima hẹ yi? Vbe ọ ya ha osa ye uyinmwẹ emwa nagbọn hẹ? 
Job31:3 Ọ ghi mu ọfuan kevbe ọrhiae, giẹ avbe emwa ni ru emwi dan." 
Job31:4 Osanobua rẹn emwi ne I ru hia, ọ rẹn dọmwadẹ owẹ nẹ I zẹ vbe otọ." 
Job31:5 “I ma he yin uyinmwẹ ika ẹdẹ, I ma he hia ne I rẹrẹ ọmwa ọvbehe," 
Job31:6 Wẹ ne Osanobua ya omwa ẹmwata mwa mwẹ, ọ gha miẹn wẹ I ma rẹn ọkpa I ma rẹn eva." 
Job31:7 Adeghẹ I biegbe lahin odẹ ẹmwata rre, ra ne emwi viẹn yọ mwẹ aro ghe ọkhọ, adeghẹ orukhọ ya iruẹn yọ mwẹ obọ," 
Job31:8 giẹ emwi fuẹn emwi okọ mwẹ hia a, ra ne emwa ọvbehe rri emwi okọ ne I kọe." 
Job31:9 “Adeghẹ amwẹ ogieva mwẹ viẹn yọ mwẹ aro, I na ghi ya mudia lẹre ye ọkpẹn ẹkhu ẹre vbe ore," 
Job31:10 ẹghẹ nii, giẹ ọvbokhan mwẹ le evbare okpia ọvbehe. Ne ọ vbe ya gha vbiẹ ukpo okpia ọvbehe." 
Job31:11 Uwu ọ re ọ kere ne a ya gha rria ikhi emwi dan vberriọ. 
Job31:12 Te ọ gha yevbe erhẹn omurhia ẹrinmwi erhẹn, ne ọ wa giẹn emwi hia ni mwẹ uan." 
Job31:13 “Ọkpa vbe uwu eguọmwadia mwẹ gha talọ ẹmwẹ mwẹ ma ọmwa, te I ye danmwehọ, I gha ye obọ ne ọ kere mu ẹẹn." 
Job31:14 A deghẹ I ma ru vberriọ, vbe i a gha ya sẹtin mudia ye odaro Osanobua hẹ? Osanobua gha do bu ohiẹn mwẹ vbe i a ra miẹn ta?" 
Job31:15 Osanobua ọkpa nii ne ọ yi imẹ ọ re ọ vbe yi avbe eguọmwadia mwẹ. 
Job31:16 “I ma he he ẹdẹ ne I ru iyobọ ne ovbiogue, I ma he giẹ agbọn khan avbe ẹgbẹ ẹdẹ," 
Job31:17 ra ne I giẹ ohanmwẹ gbe emọ ne ẹ i mwẹ erha, vbe imẹ a gha rri evbare." 
Job31:18 Vbe ẹdẹ agbọn mwẹ hia, te I gha gbe aro ghe iran," 
Job31:19 I gha miẹn ọmwa ne ọ vbabọ emwi, ne ẹ i mwẹ igho ne ọ gha ya de ukpọn," 
Job31:20 I ghi viọ ukpọn ne a ya eto do ne ẹẹn, eto ne ọ ke oghẹn ohuan mwẹ rre, ẹghẹ nii, ọ ghi ya ekhọe ẹre hia tian mwẹ." 
Job31:21 “Adeghẹ I he mu ọmọ ne ẹ i mwẹ erha ru ẹdẹ, rhunmwuda ighẹ I rẹnrẹn ighẹ, I gha rria asẹ ẹre vbe iko," 
Job31:22 te ekuabọ mwẹ gha vbiolo ua, te a gha yannọ iran hin izabọ mwẹ rre." 
Job31:23 Rhunmwuda ighẹ ohan irria ikhi Osanobua mu mwẹ, ohan i gunmwẹ danmwẹ emwi vberriọ ghe." 
Job31:24 “I ma he mu ẹtin yan ẹfe ẹdẹ," 
Job31:25 ra ne I ya ẹfe mwẹ gha hio. 
Job31:26 I ma he gọn ugie ovẹn ne ọ yunmwu ẹdẹ, ra uki vbe uwu ọse ẹre hia." 
Job31:27 A ma he bibi mwẹ odẹ ya ọghọ ne iran ẹdẹ ne I hiẹnhiẹn atataobọ mwẹ ya ya ọghọ ne iran. 
Job31:28 Uwu ọ re ọ kere ne a ya rria ikhi egbe orukhọ vberriọ, te ọ siẹn Osanobua ne Udazi." 
Job31:29 “I ma he ghọghọ vbe oghian mwẹ a gha rri oya ẹdẹ, ra ne I sẹ ọyẹnmwẹ vbe ẹbe a rruan iran," 
Job31:30 I ma he rukhọ ne I na erhunmwu wẹ ne iran wulo ẹdẹ. 
Job31:31 Emwa hia ni winna mẹ rẹnrẹn, wẹ te I wa rhan obọ miẹn erhunmwuyẹn." 
Job31:32 Te I tie ekhẹn la owa mwẹ, I i vbe giẹ iran vbiẹ ughe." 
Job31:33 “Emwa ọvbehe ho ne iran gha gbe gue orukhọ iran, sokpan ima he gbegue ọghomwẹ ẹdẹ?" 
Job31:34 Ohan ẹmwẹ ne emwa gha ta ma he mu mwẹ ẹdẹ, I ma he hunwan ẹdẹ ra ne I khui egbe ye owa, rhunmwuda ighẹ ohan ogie iran mu mwẹ." 
Job31:35 “A i miẹn ne ọ gha danmwehọ ẹmwẹ ne I guan ra? I vẹn ihẹn adeghẹ ẹ i re ẹmwata ehia khin. Gie Osanobua ne Udazi zẹ ẹmwẹ wanniẹn mwẹ. “Akpawẹ te a gbẹnnẹ ehia ye otọ nian, ighẹ ifi ẹzọ ne iran ni gunmwẹ gui ba mwẹ re, ne I miẹn ehe na gha bẹghe iran," 
Job31:36 I gha muẹn yan izabọ ya gha hio, I gha muẹn rhuẹ ye uhunmwu zẹ vbe ẹde." 
Job31:37 I gha talọ emwi ne I he ru hia ma Osanobua, egbe ghẹ gha mu mwẹ wẹsẹwẹsẹ vbe odaro ẹre." 
Job31:38 “A deghẹ te I dẹ otọ ne ugbo mwẹ mu, a na gbe emwa ne ọ wa yan rẹn miẹn iran ẹre —" 
Job31:39 a deghẹ I re vbe evbare ne ọ zọ vba, a na giẹ ohanmwẹ gha gbe avbe ọwẹe ni gbe ẹe —" 
Job31:40 ẹghẹ nii, ne ọka ẹsin kevbe ọka irhuarhua gha na te zọ vbọ, ogigban kevbe ọkọsọ ọ re ọ gha zọ ladian.” Ẹmwẹ ne Job talọe fo nẹ." 
Job32:1 Rhunmwuda ighẹ ekhọe e Job wa ta ẹe rhuan ma rẹn nẹ wẹ rẹn ma rukhọ, ikpia eheha nii keghi dobọyi vbe ewanniẹn ne iran rhie ye ọre ẹmwẹ." 
Job32:2 Sokpan, orhiọnkpa ne ọ mudia gha ghe ughe, ne a tie eni ẹnrẹn Elihu, ma ghi sẹtin ziengbe ohu ne ọ mu ẹẹn ọvbehe, rhunmwuda ne Job na kha ighẹ rẹn rria asẹ ọ na gha ba Osanobua ifi ẹzọ. (Elihu na, ovbi e Barakel nọ, ovbi uniẹn e Buz, ọ kevbe gha re ẹwae Ram)." 
Job32:3 Ohu avbe ọsie Job kevbe gha muẹn. Iran ma miẹn ewanniẹn rhie ye Job ẹmwẹ, ọ na keghi do yevbe ne a miẹn wẹ Osanobua ọre ọ rria abe." 
Job32:4 Rhunmwuda ne Elihu na re ọvbokhan vbe evba, ọ keghi ziengbe ne emwa hia guan fo nẹ." 
Job32:5 Ọ ghi miẹn wẹ iran eheha ma sẹtin rhie ewanniẹn ne Job, ohu keghi muẹn." 
Job32:6 Ọre ọ na suẹn gha guan, ọ wẹẹ, “Ọvbokhan mẹ khin, eniwanrẹn wa khin, rhunmwuda ọnii, ohan ma gunmwẹ tama uwa vbene imẹ rorẹe yi." 
Job32:7 I kegha ta ẹe ma egbe mwẹ wẹ, ọ kere ne uwa guan, wẹ ọ kere ne uwa ne eniwanrẹn san ibo ma egbe." 
Job32:8 Sokpan, orhiọn Osanobua ne Udazi ọre ọ bu ọmwa rre ọ ghi rhie ẹwaẹn ne iran." 
Job32:9 Ẹ i re a khian enọwanrẹn ọre ọ rhie ẹwaẹn ne ọmwa, ra ne ọ ya emwa rẹn emwi ne ọ gha ẹe." 
Job32:10 Rhunmwuda ọnii nian, I ho ne uwa danmwehọ mwẹ, I ho ne I tama uwa vbene imẹ roro ẹe yi." 
Job32:11 “Te I wa hẹko gbe ekhọe ke otọ gha danmwehọ vbe uwa guan, I keghi mudia vbe uwa ye ekhọe gualọ ẹmwẹ ẹwaẹn na guan." 
Job32:12 I kakabọ danmwẹ họ, I keghi họn vbe uwa baeku; wa ma sẹtin rhie ma ighẹ ohoghe ọ re ẹmwẹ ne Job tae khin." 
Job32:13 Vbe uwa ghi na kha hẹ yi ighẹ uwa wan? Osanobua ọ ghi ra zẹ ẹmwẹ wanniẹn e Job, rhunmwuda, wa baeku nẹ." 
Job32:14 Wa ọre Job gha gu guan ighẹ ẹ i re imẹ. Sokpan, ẹ i re vbene uwa ta ẹe ni ọ re imẹ gha ya zẹ ẹmwẹ wanniẹn ọẹn." 
Job32:15 E Job, iran ma ghi miẹn ẹmwẹ ta, iran ma miẹn ẹmwẹ zẹ wanniẹn ọn." 
Job32:16 Te imẹ ghẹ ghi ye gha khẹ ra, ugbẹn vbe iran guẹ unu nẹ? Iran mudia vbe evba, vbene iran i ghi na mwẹ, ẹmwẹ ọkpa ne iran gha ta." 
Job32:17 Ẹn o, I gha rhie ewanniẹn obọ mwẹ yọ nian, ne I tama ruẹn vbene imẹ rorẹe yi." 
Job32:18 I i ghi sẹtin mudia ne I ghẹ guan I i ghi sẹtin khui ẹmwẹ ni ye unu. 
Job32:19 Adeghẹ I ma miotọ na guan, I gha sa fua vbe ọgọ ohian ne a mu ayọn ọmutuo yi." 
Job32:20 Egbe mwẹ i guae, I gha guan." 
Job32:21 Mẹ i ra gbe ghe obọkpa vbe imuaemwẹ na, mẹ i ra vbe kpe ọmwarhọkpa ye ewọwọ," 
Job32:22 I gha vbe ru ẹe, te Osanobua rria mwẹ ikhi ẹgiẹgiẹ." 
Job33:1 “Banbanna nian, u ghi hẹko danmwehọ, e Job. A vbe ẹmwẹ ne I mwẹ ne I ra ta." 
Job33:2 I mu egbe ne I ya ta ẹmwẹ ne ọ rrọmwẹ ekhọe. 
Job33:3 Ẹmwẹ ne ọ ke ekhọe rre ọ re ẹmwẹ mwẹ hia khin ẹmwata ọ re I vbe ta. 
Job33:4 Orhiọn Osanobua ọ re ọ yi mwẹ ọ na vbe rhie arrọọ mẹ. 
Job33:5 “U ghi rhie ewanniẹn mẹ a deghẹ u gha sẹtin, mwamwa ẹmwẹ ne u ra ta ye otọ." 
Job33:6 Ọkpa ọ re mẹ vbe ruẹ khin vbe odaro Osanobua, obuẹ ọ re a ya ma ima eveva." 
Job33:7 Rhunmwuda ọnii, emwi ọkpa ne Ọ gha ya ohan mwẹ gha muẹn, ẹ i rrọọ, mẹ i ra de yan ruẹn." 
Job33:8 “Ẹmwẹ ne I họẹn vbe u ta ẹe ọ re ọna khin wẹẹ," 
Job33:9 ‘I ma rri abe. I ma rukhọ, I ma rẹn ọkpa I ma rẹn eva, orukhọ i gue mwẹ." 
Job33:10 Te Osanobua wa gheghe ho emwi ne ọ gha ru mwẹ re. Ọ na gha ru mwẹ zẹ vbe oghian rẹn. 
Job33:11 Ọ rrọ ọgiọrọ yọ mwẹ owẹ, ọ na gha baba mwẹ vbe emwi ne I ru hia.’" 
Job33:12 “Sokpan, ne I tama ruẹn Job, u wa baeku. Osanobua kpọlọ sẹ ọmwaikọmwa." 
Job33:13 Vbe uwa na ba Osanobua ifi ẹzọ hẹ wẹ, ẹ i zẹyọ vbe ọmwa a ya gui ma rẹn?" 
Job33:14 A gha rhe miẹn wẹ kugbakẹghẹrẹ ọ re Osanobua ya guan; a i miẹn ne ọ rhie ẹmwẹ ne ọ ta ẹe. 
Job33:15 Emwa gha vbiẹ vbe asọn, Osanobua ghi ya umian kevbe imina gha gu iran guan." 
Job33:16 Ọ ghi wẹ ne iran danmwehọ ẹmwẹ ne irẹn ta, iran ghi runran vbe ọ gha ya obọ sekhae ne iran." 
Job33:17 Te Osanobua gu iran guan ne iran miẹn ehe na dobọ orukhọ ne a ru yi, kevbe ne a ghẹ miẹn wẹ te iran ghi tọn egbe mu." 
Job33:18 Rẹn i ra kue ne a fuẹn iran an, ọ ghi miẹn iran fan vbe obọ uwu tobọ ọre." 
Job33:19 Osanobua giẹ emianmwẹ ya dia ọmwa ye odẹ, ọ ghi vbe ye obalọ gba ẹre egbe." 
Job33:20 Evbare i khọn ọmwa ne ọ khuọnmwi te evbare ne ọ ghi rhiẹnrhiẹn sẹ wia so ẹe. 
Job33:21 Egbe ẹre ghi siẹn uan khian ọrhiae, a ghi gha bẹghe uvẹ ọre hia," 
Job33:22 ehe ne iran ni wulo nẹ ye ọ re ọ ghi ra gha rrie na. 
Job33:23 “U gha ghe odibosa gha rrọ ẹre rre, ọkpa vbe uwu odibo arriaisẹn, inu ne ọkhin ne Osanobua mwẹ, iran ni ye emwa iwinna ne ọ khẹke iran rre." 
Job33:24 Odibosa nii ghi ya itohan kha wẹẹ, ‘Wa fan ẹẹn ye otọ. Ẹ i rrie ehe ne iran ni wulo nẹ ye. Wa ghe emwi ne a ya dẹ ọẹ werriegbe, ne u wa rhan rẹn.’" 
Job33:25 Egbe ẹre ghi do dọlegbe gha ru ọvbokhan ọvbokhan, ọ ghi situa." 
Job33:26 Ọ gha na erhunmwu, Osanobua ghi họn. Ọ ghi ye oghọghọ gha ga Osanobua. Osanobua ghi do dọlegbe dọlọ emwi hia yi ne ẹẹn." 
Job33:27 Ọ ghi ta ẹe ne agbọn họn wẹẹ, ‘I rukhọ. I ma ru vbene ọ kere, sokpan, Osanobua ye miẹn mwẹ fan." 
Job33:28 Ọ ma gunmwẹ gha rrie ehe ne iran ni wulo nẹ ye. I ye rre agbọn.’ 
Job33:29 Te Osanobua wa ru emwi vbenian yan egbe yan egbe," 
Job33:30 ọ gha miẹn ọmwa fan ye agbọn nẹ, ọ ghi rhie oghọghọ arrọ ne ẹẹn." 
Job33:31 Banbanna nian, danmwehọ ẹmwẹ ne I ta, e Job, hunwan ne u gunmwẹ guan." 
Job33:32 Sokpan, a deghẹ u mwẹ ẹmwẹ ne u ra ta, gunmwẹ gha họn ẹn nian. Oghọghọ ọ re I gha wa vbe ya kha wẹ ẹmwata u ta." 
Job33:33 Sokpan, adeghẹ ẹ i re erriọ, wẹ hunwan ne u danmwehọ mwẹ, I gha ma ruẹn vbene a ya wan hẹ.”" 
Job34:1 Ọre Elihu na kha wẹẹ, “Wa na wa wan ẹsẹse, wa vbe guẹ emwi, wa danmwehọ ẹmwẹ ne I ta nian." 
Job34:2  
Job34:3 A gha danmwẹ evbare, ọ re a na rẹn ne ọ rhiẹnrhiẹn vbọ sokpan a i ya ehọ rẹn ẹmwẹ ẹwaẹn vbe a gha họn ẹn." 
Job34:4 Iwinna ima nọ ne a bu ohiẹn na. 
Job34:5 E Job wẹẹ rẹn i mwẹ abe rhọkpa, wẹẹ te Osanobua ma bu ohiẹn ẹmwata ne irẹn." 
Job34:6 Ọ keghi kha wẹẹ, ‘I gha kha wẹ I rria abe, ohoghe ọre I ta ẹe, obọ da mwẹ gbe sokpan, I ma rukhọ.’" 
Job34:7 “Wa he miẹn ọmwa ne ọ ye vbe Job na ẹdẹ ra? Ẹ i da ne Osanobua. 
Job34:8 Ẹbu emwa dan ọ re ọ yẹ ọre, rẹn kevbe emwa orukhọ ọ re ọ gba mu obọ." 
Job34:9 Ọ wẹ uhunmwu agbọn I zẹdẹ rrọ, ne a gha ru emwi esi ne a hia ne a lele vbene Osanobua ho." 
Job34:10 “Wa danmwehọ mwẹ, wa ni rẹn otọ emwi, Osanobua ne Udazi gha ru emwi ne ọ ma gba ra?" 
Job34:11 Te irẹn san emwa ẹse emwi ne iran ru, ọ ghi vbe gha ru iran emwi ne ọ maa iran." 
Job34:12 Osanobua ne Udazi i ru emwi dan, ẹ i vbe ru ọmwarhọkpa emwi ne ọ ma kei." 
Job34:13 Ọmwa ọvbehe rrọ ne ọ rhie ẹtin ne ọ gue Osanobua ne ẹẹn ra? Ọmwa rrọ ne ọ mu agbọn ne ẹẹn gha gbearoghe ra? 
Job34:14 Osanobua gha rhie uhiọnrọnmwẹ arrọọ werriegbe," 
Job34:15 te emwa ni rrọ hia gha wulo. Iran ghi dọlegbe khian ekẹn. 
Job34:16 Banbanna nian danmwehọ, a deghẹ u gele wan." 
Job34:17 Te uwẹ bu abe gbe Osanobua ne ọmwata ra? Te uwẹ ro ighẹ ohiẹn ẹmwata i yẹ ọre ra? 
Job34:18 Osanobua ghi gha bu abe gbe avbe ọba kevbe iran ne irriegie, vbe iran a gha re ẹwobi kevbe emwa dan." 
Job34:19 Ẹ i ya egbe ba iran ne irriegie, ra ne ọ ye aro esi ghe iran ni fe sẹ ivbiogue, rhunmwuda rẹn ọ re ọ yi emwa hia." 
Job34:20 Ọmwa sẹtin wa wu uwu udomwurri vbe asọn, Osanobua sẹtin kinmwi emwa fua, iran ghi la ọrhiae rrie, ọmwa ne ọ wegbe i vbe zẹdẹ lọghọ irẹn ugbemwẹ hiehiere." 
Job34:21 Ọ wa ghe owẹ hia ne dọmwadẹ ọghọe zẹ. 
Job34:22 Ebiebi ne ọ so sẹ ne ọ gha degue ọmwa orukhọ ne Osanobua, ẹ i rrọọ." 
Job34:23 Osanobua i vbe bu ẹdẹ yọ ne emwa ya rre ne irẹn bu ohiẹn iran. 
Job34:24 Ẹ i vbe gualọ ọmwa ne ọ gha gualotọ emwi nẹ, ọ ke rhie ọkaolotu hin rre, ne ọ rhie ọvbehe ye ihe ẹre." 
Job34:25 Rhunmwuda ighẹ ọ rẹn emwi ne iran ru; asọn gha rre, ọ ghi filo iran gbotọ rẹnkhẹn iran an." 
Job34:26 Ọ ghi rrie emwa orukhọ oya vbe ehe ne emwa hia gha na miẹn ọẹn," 
Job34:27 rhunmwuda, iran ma ghi lele ẹe, iran kevbe yangbe uhi ẹre hia." 
Job34:28 Iran ghi ru ovbiogue ne iran ya tu nọ Osanobua iyobọ, rẹn keghi họn utumwẹ iyobọ, ne iran tu tie ẹre." 
Job34:29 Osanobua gha kha ighẹ rẹn i zẹdẹ guan yọ, ọmwa ne ọ ra nọ rẹn ẹ i rrọọ. Ọ gha rhie aro ẹre lẹre, ọghe emwa nagbọn fo." 
Job34:30 Emwi ọkpa ne agbọn uhunmwu ẹvbo ra miẹn ru i rrọ, ne emwa dan ni hin emwa unu, ghẹ ghi khaemwisẹ yan iran." 
Job34:31 E Job, u miẹn orukhọ ruẹ kue ma Osanobua nẹ ra? Ne u vbe yan ne u ghẹ ghi ru ọvbehe." 
Job34:32 U nọ Osanobua nẹ ra ne ọ rhie abakuru ruẹ ma ruẹn? U vbe kue nẹ ra ne u dobọ emwi dan ne a ru yi? 
Job34:33 Vbene uwẹ ghi na gui ye emwi ne Osanobua ru nii nian, wẹ yayi wẹ rẹn gha vbe gha ru egbe emwi ne uwẹ ho? Wẹ ọ re ọ gha ta ne u ho vbọ ẹ i re imẹ, tama ima nian vbene ọ ye hẹ vbe ekhọe ruẹ." 
Job34:34 Ọmwa ne ọ ghi wan nẹ hiehie gha yobọ yọ, ọmwa ne ọ họn ẹmwẹ ne I ta ẹe gha kha wẹ," 
Job34:35 a ma rẹn sẹ ọ re Job ya guan, ne ọ gbae ọkpa i vbe rre ẹmwẹ ne ọ ta ẹe." 
Job34:36 Wa roro ẹmwẹ hia ne Job talọe wa gha miẹn wẹ te ọ guan vbe ọmwa dan. 
Job34:37 Ọ vbe rhie isọtẹ ba orukhọ ne ọ ru, ọ kevbe sirra ima hia gha ya Osanobua gbe ogiẹ.”" 
Job35:1 Elihu keghi wanniẹn wẹẹ, “Ọ ma kei ne uẹn Job, ne u gha kha wẹ u ma rẹn ọkpa, u ma rẹn eva vbe odaro Osanobua;" 
Job35:2  
Job35:3 ra ne u vbe gha nọ Osanobua wẹẹ, ‘De ne o kan ruẹn vbe orukhọ ne I ru? De ere ne I gha miẹn vbọ rhunmwuda ighẹ I ma ru orukhọ?’" 
Job35:4 I gha rhie ewanniẹn ne uwẹ vbe avbe ẹse ruẹ ba ẹre. 
Job35:5 Tọn aro mu ghe iso! Ghe vbene avbe ikpakpa iso rre hẹ! 
Job35:6 U gha rukhọ, ọnii ma mwẹ emwi ne ọ ru Osanobua ẹre. Deghẹ te u vbe gha ru orukhọ yan egbe, ọ ma si emwi rhọkpa ye ọre egbe." 
Job35:7 A deghẹ te u ghi vbe re ọmwata ọ mwẹ iyobọ ne u ya ẹe ru ne Osanobua ra? Emwi ọkpa irrọ ne Osanobua ra ho sẹ obọ ruẹ. 
Job35:8 Ọmwa nagbọn ne ihua ọ re ọ rri oya orukhọ ne u ru, rẹn ọ re emwi esi ne u ru vbe ru iyobọ na." 
Job35:9 “A ghe zẹ emwa kpokpo, iran ghi gha zẹ uyọn; iran ghi gha tu tie ọmwa ne ọ gha miẹn iran fan." 
Job35:10 Sokpan, iran i bu Osanobua ne ayi ne ọ yi iran gha khian. Ọmwa ne ọ rhie idaehọ ne iran vbe ẹghẹ iran ne ọ so ebiebi sẹ." 
Job35:11 Iran i yo ọghe Osanobua ne ọ rhie ẹwaẹn ne ọmwa, ne ima na wan sẹ aranmwẹ ra ahianmwẹ ne ọ rhirhi gha khin." 
Job35:12 Iran gha tu nọ iyobọ, Osanobua i zẹ yọ rhunmwuda, emwa dan ni tọn egbe mu ọ re iran khin." 
Job35:13 Utumwẹ ne iran tu ladian i mwẹ esa ne ọ ye; Osanobua ne Udazi ma deghẹ iran a ma wẹ ọ gha vbe họn urhu iran. 
Job35:14 E Job, u wẹ u i sẹtin deghẹ Osanobua. Sokpan, hẹko zin egbe, ẹzọ ruẹ rre odaro ẹre nẹ."
